query: Kya Pandavon aur mera putra Kurukshetra mein kya kiya?
document: धृतराष्ट्र उवाच । धर्मक्षेत्रे कुरुक्षेत्रे समवेता युयुत्सवः मामकाः पाण्डवाश्चैव किमकुर्वत सञ्जय ॥...|Dhrtarashtra asked of Sanjaya: O SANJAYA, what did my warrior sons and those of Pandu do when they were gathered at KURUKSHETRA, the field of religious activities? Tell me of those happenings.

query: Kya Duryodhan ne apne guru Drona ko kya kaha?
document: सञ्जय उवाच । दृष्ट्वा तु पाण्डवानीकं व्यूढं दुर्योधनस्तदा आचार्यमुपसङ्गम्य राजा वचनमब्रवीत् ॥ १.२ ...|Sanjaya explained: Now seeing that the army of the PANDAVAS was set up properly, the Price DURYODHANA called his teacher, DRONA, to his side and spoke these words:

query: Krishna ka kya kaha hai Pandu ke putron ki sena ke bare mein?
document: पश्यैतां पाण्डुपुत्राणामाचार्य महतीं चमूम् । व्यूढां द्रुपदपुत्रेण तव शिष्येण धीमता ॥ १.३ ॥|Behold O, Master, the mighty army of the sons of PANDU, led by the son of DRUPADA, your talented disciple.

query: Kun koi mahabali senapati the jo Arjun aur Bhim ke saman yogya the?
document: अत्र शूरा महेष्वासा भीमार्जुनसमा युधि । युयुधानो विराटश्च द्रुपदश्च महारथः ॥ १.४ ॥|Present here are the mighty archers, peers or friends, in warfare, of ARJUNA and BHIMA. Their names are: YUYUDHANA, VIRATA and DRUPADA, the great chariot-warrior. Other great warriors were also present on the battlefield: DHRSHTAKEUT, CHEKITANA and the brave and noble King of Kasi, KUNTIBHIJA and SAIBYA; these are among the great warriors. Other courageous and great chariot-warriors were: YUDHAMANYU, the brave UTTAMAUJA, SAUBHADRA, and the sons of DRAUPADI.

query: Kunje kis logon ki aayat aayi hai jinhone yuddh mein bada yogdan diya tha?
document: धृष्टकेतुश्चेकितानः काशिराजश्च वीर्यवान् । पुरुजित्कुन्तिभोजश्च शैब्यश्च नरपुङ्गवः ॥ १.५ ॥|Dhrishtaketu, Chekitana, and the valiant king of Kashi, Purujit and Kuntibhoja and Saibya, the best of men.

query: Krishna ne kis logon ko prashikshit kiya tha?
document: युधामन्युश्च विक्रान्त उत्तमौजाश्च वीर्यवान् । सौभद्रो द्रौपदेयाश्च सर्व एव महारथाः ॥ १.६ ॥|The strong Yudhamanyu and the brave Uttamaujas, the son of Subhadra and the sons of Draupadi, all of them, divisional commanders.

query: Krishna ke saath kya baat hui thi jismein unhone apne guru ko kuchh bataaya tha?
document: अस्माकं तु विशिष्टा ये तान्निबोध द्विजोत्तम । नायका मम सैन्यस्य संज्ञार्थं तान्ब्रवीमि ते ॥ १.७ ॥|Duryodhana spoke unto his master Drona: O Best of the twice born, I name all of those who are our distinguished Chiefs, the leaders of my army, of your information only.

query: Krishna ne kaha hai ki jeevan mein kya hai jo sabse mahatvapoorn hai?
document: भवान्भीष्मश्च कर्णश्च कृपश्च समितिंजयः । अश्वत्थामा विकर्णश्च सौमदत्तिस्तथैव च ॥ १.८ ॥|Your wise self, BHISMA, KARNA, KRIPA, the victorious in fight; ASVATTHAMA, VIKARNA and SAUMADATTI as well.

query: Krishna ke saath kya baat hui thi jab Duryodhana ne apne senaon ko samarpit hone ke liye kaha?
document: अन्ये च बहवः शूरा मदर्थे त्यक्तजीविताः । नानाशस्त्रप्रहरणाः सर्वे युद्धविशारदाः ॥ १.९ ॥|Duryodhana further said to Drona: Yet several other heroes and great men, well-trained in combat, armed with assorted powerful weapons and missiles, are ready to lay down their lives for me!

query: Krishna ke saath kya hua tha jab unke bhai Bhima ke sena ke baare mein unhone kaha tha ki ve kamzor hain?
document: अपर्याप्तं तदस्माकं बलं भीष्माभिरक्षितम् । पर्याप्तं त्विदमेतेषां बलं भीमाभिरक्षितम् ॥ १.१० ॥|Duryodhana explained with pride to Drona: Our army, led by BHISMA, is numerous and skilled. The army led by BHIMA, however, is weak and lacking in strength and power.

query: Krishna ke saath kya hua tha jiske baad Bhishma unki sena ke leader ban gaye?
document: अयनेषु च सर्वेषु यथाभागमवस्थिताः । भीष्ममेवाभिरक्षन्तु भवन्तः सर्व एव हि ॥ १.११ ॥|Duryodhana instructed his army: Now all of you quickly assume your proper positions for battle, your main goal being to protect and fight alongside BHISMA, your leader, by all means.

query: Krishna kaha hai ki Bhishma ne kaise apne sena ko ladai ke liye utarna hua tha?
document: तस्य सञ्जनयन्हर्षं कुरुवृद्धः पितामहः । सिंहनादं विनद्योच्चैः शङ्खं दध्मौ प्रतापवान् ॥ १.१२ ॥|To bring joy to DURYODHANA’s heart, the great grandsire BHISMA, the oldest and most famous of the KAURAVAS, roared loudly like a lion (a battle-cry), and blew his conch to signal the army to advance towards the enemy.

query: Kya Arjun ko yuddh ke samay kaisa darshana hua?
document: ततः शङ्खाश्च भेर्यश्च पणवानकगोमुखाः । सहसैवाभ्यहन्यन्त स शब्दस्तुमुलोऽभवत् ॥ १.१३ ॥|Tremendous noise followed. Conches, kettle-drums, tabors, and trumpets and cowhorns blared across the battlefield.

query: Krishna aur Pandavon ke chariot mein kya the?
document: ततः श्वेतैर्हयैर्युक्ते महति स्यन्दने स्थितौ । माधवः पाण्डवश्चैव दिव्यौ शङ्खौ प्रदध्मतुः ॥ १.१४ ॥|MADHAVA (Lord Krishna) and PANDAVA were seated in their magnificent chariote attached to white horses and they blew gracefully their divine conches.

query: Krishna kaun se shankh ka sound suna raha tha?
document: पाञ्चजन्यं हृषीकेशो देवदत्तं धनञ्जयः । पौण्ड्रं दध्मौ महाशङ्खं भीमकर्मा वृकोदरः ॥ १.१५ ॥|The PANCHAJANYA (the name of one of the conches) was blown by HRISHIKESA (Lord Krishna). The conch named DEVADATTA was blown by DHANANJAYA (Arjuna).

query: Kunthi ki putra kisne anantaviyaya naam ki shankh ko phoonkaya?
document: अनन्तविजयं राजा कुन्तीपुत्रो युधिष्ठिरः । नकुलः सहदेवश्च सुघोषमणिपुष्पकौ ॥ १.१६ ॥|The King YUDISHTHIRA. the son of KUNTI blew the great conch called ANANTAVIYAYA: NAKUL and  SAHDEV blew SUGHOSHA and MANIPUSHPAKA (also names of conches).

query: Kaise sabhi shankh uthaye gaye the?
document: काश्यश्च परमेष्वासः शिखण्डी च महारथः । धृष्टद्युम्नो विराटश्च सात्यकिश्चापराजितः ॥ १.१७ ॥|Several conches were also blown by: The ruler of KASI. the great warrior SIKHANDI, DHRSTHTADYUMNA, VIRATA, and SATYAKI, the invincible. DRUPADA and the sons of DRAUPADI, and the mighty armed son of SUBHADRA also blew their several conches.

query: Kiske charnon mein shankh baj gaye the?
document: द्रुपदो द्रौपदेयाश्च सर्वशः पृथिवीपते । सौभद्रश्च महाबाहुः शङ्खान्दध्मुः पृथक्पृथक् ॥ १.१८ ॥|Drupada and the sons of Draupadi, O Lord of the Earth, and the son of Subhadra, the mighty armed, blew their respective conches.

query: Kauravon ko dar lagne wala kya hua tha?
document: स घोषो धार्तराष्ट्राणां हृदयानि व्यदारयत् । नभश्च पृथिवीं चैव तुमुलोऽभ्यनुनादयन् ॥ १.१९ ॥|The earth and sky was filled with the extremely loud and terrible noise of the PANDAVAS’ bugles and voices which struck fear in the hearts of the KAURAVAS (the sons of Dhrtarashtra).

query: Krishna aur Arjun ke beech kya baat hui thi?
document: अथ व्यवस्थितान्दृष्ट्वा धार्तराष्ट्रान्कपिध्वजः प्रवृत्ते शस्त्रसम्पाते धनुरुद्यम्य पाण्डवः हृषीके...|Sanjaya said :Then, my king, seeing the KAURAVAS (the army of Dhrtarashtra), positioned and ready to begin fighting, ARJUNA, whose flag was that of HANUMAN, spoke the following words to SHRI KRISHNA, as he lifted his bow to fight the battle.

query: Arjun ne kya kaha tha?
document: हृषीकेशं तदा वाक्यमिदमाह महीपते |अर्जुन उवाच |सेनयोरुभयोर्मध्ये रथं स्थापय मेऽच्युत ॥ १.२१ ॥|Arjuna said: In the midst of the two armies, place my chariot, O Achyuta, that I may behold those who stand here desirous of fighting and, on the eve of this battle, let me know with whom I must fight.

query: Krishna ne mere rath ko kya karna chahiye?
document: यावदेतान्निरीक्षेऽहं योद्धुकामानवस्थितान् | कैर्मया सह योद्धव्यमस्मिन् रणसमुद्यमे ॥ १.२२ ॥|Place my chariot, O ACHYUTA (Lord Krishna) between the two armies so that I may see those who wish to fight for us and also to see who I have to fight against, in this war.

query: Kya Arjun ko yahaan aane wale sabhi mahabaho rajaon ko dekhne ka ichchha hai?
document: योत्स्यमानानवेक्षेऽहं य एतेऽत्र समागताः । धार्तराष्ट्रस्य दुर्बुद्धेर्युद्धे प्रियचिकीर्षवः ॥ १.२३ ...|I desire to see all of those great warrior kings who have gathered here to fight alongside the evil-minded DURYODHANA (son of Dhrtarashtra).

query: Krishna kya baat karte hain Arjun ko?
document: सञ्जय उवाच । एवमुक्तो हृषीकेशो गुडाकेशेन भारत सेनयोरुभयोर्मध्ये स्थापयित्वा रथोत्तमम् ॥ १.२४ ॥|Sanjaya continued: After being requested by GUDAKESA (Arjun), HRISHIKESA (Lord Krishna), placed ARJUN’s magnificent chariot between the armies. The chariot was now facing BHISMA, the Guru DRONA, and all the rulers of the earth; then Lord KRISHNA spoke to ARJUNA: “O, PARTHA (Arjuna), see yourself all of the KAURAVAS assembled here on the battlefield today.”

query: Krishna ne Bhishma aur Drona ke saamne kya kahaa?
document: भीष्मद्रोणप्रमुखतः सर्वेषां च महीक्षिताम् । उवाच पार्थ पश्यैतान्समवेतान्कुरूनिति ॥ १.२५ ॥|In front of Bhishma and Drona, and all the rulers of the earth, he said, O Partha, behold these Kurus gathered together.

query: Arjun ko apne parivaar ke logon ko yudh ke kshetra mein dekhkar kya hua tha?
document: तत्रापश्यत्स्थितान्पार्थः पितॄनथ पितामहान् आचार्यान्मातुलान्भ्रातॄन्पुत्रान्पौत्रान्सखींस्तथा श्वश...॥ 26 ॥|ARJUNA, gazed upon the army and then saw in both armies, paternal uncles, grandfathers, teachers, maternal uncles, cousins, sons, grandsons, friends, fathers-in-law, and well-wishers. The son of KUNTI (Arjuna), after viewing all of those relatives and friends posted in their positions on the battlefield, became melancholy and filled with compassion (love) for his relatives, and spoke in a sad voice:

query: Krishna ke saath kya baat hui thi jab unke parivaar ke log dono hi senon mein the?
document: श्वशुरान्सुहृदश्चैव सेनयोरुभयोरपि | तान्समीक्ष्य स कौन्तेय: सर्वान्बन्धूनवस्थितान् ॥ १.२७ ॥|(He saw) Fathers-in-law and friends also in both the armies. Then the son of Kunti, seeing all these kinsmen thus standing arrayed, spoke thus sorrowfully, filled with deep pity.

query: Krishna ko kya kaha hai jab Arjun ne apne parivar ke logon ko ladne ke liye aakar dekha?
document: कृपया परयाविष्टो विषीदन्निदमब्रवीत् | अर्जुन उवाच | दृष्ट्वेमं स्वजनं कृष्ण युयुत्सुं समुपस्थितम् |Arjuna said: O KRISHNA, seeing my kinsmen (relatives) standing before me to fight against me in this war, I find myself unable to move my body, and my mouth has become parched. He continued: I have no longer any control over my body; my hair stands on end. I cannot control my bow GANDIVA, and my skin burns all over.

query: Maine apne shareer ko kaise sthir rakha jata hai jab main bada dard ya kathinata ka samna karta hoon?
document: वेपथुश्च शरीरे मे रोमहर्षश्च जायते । गाण्डीवं स्रंसते हस्तात्त्वक्चैव परिदह्यते ॥ १.२९ ॥|My limbs fail and my mouth is parched, my body quivers and my hair stands on end.

query: Maine apne shakti ka haal kya hai?
document: गाण्डीवं स्रंसते हस्तात्त्वक्चै व परिदह्यते |न च शक्नोम्यवस्थातुं भ्रमतीव च मे मन: ॥ १.३० ॥|I can no longer stand; my knees are weak; my mind is clouded and spinning in many directions, and, dear KRISHNA, I am seeing bad signs.

query: Krishna ke paas kya kehna hai jab yeh jaanwaron aur insanon ko ladaai mein maarne se koi faida nahin hai?
document: न च श्रेयोऽनुपश्यामि हत्वा स्वजनमाहवे । न काङ्क्षे विजयं कृष्ण न च राज्यं सुखानि च ॥ १.३१ ॥|I cannot see any good in slaughtering and killing my friends and relatives in battle. O KRISHNA, I have no use nor desire for victory, empire or even materialistic pleasures.

query: Krishna kehne mein kya hai jo rajaon ke liye bhi mahatvapurn hai?
document: किं नो राज्येन गोविन्द किं भोगैर्जीवितेन वा । येषामर्थे काङ्क्षितं नो राज्यं भोगाः सुखानि च ॥ १.३२ ...|O GOVINDA, (Krishna), what in the use of a kindgom, enjoyment or even life?

query: Kya Arjun ko apne raja ki khushiyon ke liye lade hue senaon ke logon ke prati kya vichar aata hai?
document: येषामर्थे काङ्क्षितं नो राज्यं भोगा: सुखानि च | त इमेऽवस्थिता युद्धे प्राणांस्त्यक्त्वा धनानि च  ॥ १.३३ ॥|Those whom we seek these pleasures from (the enjoyment of kingdom), are standing before us staking their lives and property, possessions which I have no desire for.

query: Krishna ne kya kaha hai ki apne guru, bade bhai, saas, pita, pati ki maa, putra, bhai ki patni, aur anya bandhuon ko marne se kyon chhodna chahiye?
document: आचार्या: पितर: पुत्रास्तथैव च पितामहा: | मातुला: श्वशुरा: पौत्रा: श्याला: सम्बन्धिनस्तथा॥ १.३४ ॥|O Lord KRISHNA, I do not want to kill my teachers, uncles, friends, fathers-in-law, grandsons, brothers-in-law, and other relatives and well-wishers.

query: Krishna ne Arjun ko kya kehkar unki utsahit kar diya?
document: एतान्न हन्तुमिच्छामि घ्नतोऽपि मधुसूदन | अपि त्रैलोक्यराज्यस्य हेतो: किं नु महीकृते ॥ १....|Arjuna spoke to the Lord Madhusudhana (Lord Krishna): I could not slay (kill) my relatives even if I had to give my own life away. I could not slay them even for domination of the three worlds; how could I slay them for domination of this earth.

query: Krishna keh rahe hain ki hum apne pyar ke logon ko marne ke liye kyun majboor hain?
document: पापमेवाश्रयेदस्मान्हत्वैतानाततायिनः तस्मान्नार्हा वयं हन्तुं धार्तराष्ट्रान्सबान्धवान् स्वजनं हि क...|O KRISHNA, why should we kill our own loved ones and kinsmen when no happiness or good can come out of so doing?

query: Krishna ke paas kya karna chahiye jab log apne galtiyon ko nahin samajh paate?
document: यद्यप्येते न पश्यन्ति लोभोपहतचेतसः । कुलक्षयकृतं दोषं मित्रद्रोहे च पातकम् ॥ १.३७ ॥|Greed has clouded the minds and overpowered the intelligence of the sons of DHRTARASHTRA and so they feel no guilt, and fail to see the sins they are commiting by betraying friends and destroying their families. Arjuna continued: Why should we not realize, O KRISHNA, the wrong-doings and sins that the sons of DHRTARASATRA cannot see and realize, and save ourselves from committing these sins?

query: Krishna ne parivaar ki harkat ke baare mein kya kaha tha?
document: कथं न ज्ञेयमस्माभिः पापादस्मान्निवर्तितुम् । कुलक्षयकृतं दोषं प्रपश्यद्भिर्जनार्दन ॥ १.३८ ॥|Why should not we, who clearly see evil in the destruction of the family-units, learn to turn away from this sin, O Janardana?

query: Kya Arjun ne apne parivar ke vinaash ke baare mein kaha tha?
document: कुलक्षये प्रणश्यन्ति कुलधर्माः सनातनाः । धर्मे नष्टे कुलं कृत्स्नमधर्मोऽभिभवत्युत ॥ १.३९ ॥|Arjuna explained: When one begins to destroy his own family, then his ancient, respected traditions, customs, moral values, principles, are destroyed as well. By the destruction of these, the whole family becomes evil and huge sins are committed.

query: Krishna kehne mein kya hai jab parivaar mein burey kaam badhte hain?
document: अधर्माभिभवात्कृष्ण प्रदुष्यन्ति कुलस्त्रियः । स्त्रीषु दुष्टासु वार्ष्णेय जायते वर्णसङ्करः ॥ १.४० ॥|O KRISHNA, with the growth of evil in a family, the family women, become impure and evil, and sinning with those of other castes would follow.

query: Kya Krishna ne Arjun ko kya kaha hai jahan unhone varnvaad ke baare mein baat ki?
document: सङ्करो नरकायैव कुलघ्नानां कुलस्य च । पतन्ति पितरो ह्येषां लुप्तपिण्डोदकक्रियाः ॥ १.४१ ॥|By the mixture of castes, families will breed more family destroyers; being deprived of food and water, their ancestors will also fall from heaven.

query: Kya Krishna Arjun ko kis baat ke baare mein keh raha hai?
document: दोषैरेतैः कुलघ्नानां वर्णसङ्करकारकैः । उत्साद्यन्ते जातिधर्माः कुलधर्माश्च शाश्वताः ॥ १.४२ ॥|The everlasting traditions, customs and principles of a caste are destroyed when different castes join together and create mixed-blood generations. This leads to confusion of a caste’s customs.

query: Krishna keh rahe hain ki kya yeh logon ke liye astitva hai jo apne parivaar ki dharmik vyavastha ko todh kar dete hain?
document: उत्सन्नकुलधर्माणां मनुष्याणां जनार्दन । नरकेऽनियतं वासो भवतीत्यनुशुश्रुम ॥ १.४३ ॥|It has been heard, O JANARDHANA (Krishna) that hell is the permanent home for those men whose families’ religious practices have been broken and destroyed.

query: Kya kshatriyo ka kartavya hai apne parivaar ke prati?
document: अहो बत महत्पापं कर्तुं व्यवसिता वयम् । यद्राज्यसुखलोभेन हन्तुं स्वजनमुद्यताः ॥ १.४४ ॥|Moreover, it is a great shame, that knowing and understanding everything, we are still ready to commit such a great sin of killing our kinsmen, just because of greed for kingdom and pleasures.

query: Krishna ne kya kaha hai jab unhe apne pran jana pad raha tha?
document: यदि मामप्रतीकारमशस्त्रं शस्त्रपाणयः । धार्तराष्ट्रा रणे हन्युस्तन्मे क्षेमतरं भवेत् ॥ १.४५ ॥|I think it would be better for me if the sons of DHRTARASHTRA slay me, with their weapons while I remain unarmed and unwilling to fight back

query: Arjun ne kya kiya jab unhe yuddh se pehle kuch samay ke liye rokne ka man hua?
document: सञ्जय उवाच । एवमुक्त्वार्जुनः संख्ये रथोपस्थ उपाविशत् विसृज्य सशरं चापं शोकसंविग्नमानसः ॥ १.४६ ॥|Sanjaya said: Having said this, ARJUNA, still extremely sad and confused sat on the seat of this chariot throwing away his bow and arrows.

query: Krishna kya bol rahe the Arjun ko?
document: संजय उवाच । तं तथा कृपयाविष्टमश्रुपूर्णाकुलेक्षणम् विषीदन्तमिदं वाक्यमुवाच मधुसूदनः ॥ २.१ ॥|Sanjay recounted: MADHUSUDANA (Lord Krishna) then spoke in his divine voice unto ARJUNA, who was terribly upset and overcome with grief and guilt at the thought of war he was about to enter into.

query: Arjun ko kyun dar, gunah aur dukh hua hai?
document: श्रीभगवानुवाच । कुतस्त्वा कश्मलमिदं विषमे समुपस्थितम् अनार्यजुष्टमस्वर्ग्यमकीर्तिकरमर्जुन ॥ २.२ ॥|The Blessed Lord asked of Arjuna: Dear Arjuna, why have you been struck with fear, guilt and sorrow at this moment ?

query: Arjun ko kya karna chahiye?
document: क्लैब्यं मा स्म गमः पार्थ नैतत्त्वय्युपपद्यते । क्षुद्रं हृदयदौर्बल्यं त्यक्त्वोत्तिष्ठ परन्तप ॥ २....|O Arjuna, be brave, be a bold, courageous man.  Do not be a coward and a feeble person, it does not suit such a great warrior and killer of enemies as you !

query: Krishna se poochhna hai ki kaise un logon ko mara ja sakta hai jo mere aadar se upar hain?
document: अर्जुन उवाच । कथं भीष्ममहं संख्ये द्रोणं च मधुसूदन इषुभिः प्रतियोत्स्यामि पूजार्हावरिसूदन ॥ २.४ ॥|Arjuna asked the Lord: O Madhusudana (Lord Krishna), the killer of foes, tell me how I am to kill BHISMA and DRONA when they are both worthy of my worship ?

query: Kya Krishna ne Arjun ko kisi mahatvapoorn guruon ko marne se pehle kuchh kaha tha?
document: गुरूनहत्वा हि महानुभावान् श्रेयो भोक्तुं भैक्ष्यमपीह लोके । हत्वार्थकामांस्तु गुरूनिहैव भुञ्जीय भ...|It is much better to live on a beggar’s earnings than to kill the great saints or Gurus.  After killing them I will only enjoy material wealth and pleasure stained with their blood.

query: Krishna ne kya kaha hai dharm aur aatm-santosh ke beech?
document: न चैतद्विद्मः कतरन्नो गरीयो यद्वा जयेम यदि वा नो जयेयुः । यानेव हत्वा न जिजीविषाम- स्तेऽवस्थिताः ...|The sons of DHRTARASHTA stand here before us as our opponents and enemies.  It is difficult to say which is better: whether they should destroy us or whether we should conquer the.  If we choose to slay them, how can we possibly care to live on ?

query: Krishna ji, main apne kartavya aur sukh ka kya hai?
document: कार्पण्यदोषोपहतस्वभावः पृच्छामि त्वां धर्मसम्मूढचेताः । यच्छ्रेयः स्यान्निश्चितं ब्रूहि तन्मे शिष...|Please, Dear Lord, I am your disciple, kindly guide and instruct me, for I have taken refuge and shelter in you.I am confused as to my duties and what is good for me. I beg you to give me knowledge, wisdom and a clear, logical mind.

query: Krishna ji ke paas kya kaha hai jisse yeh sakaratmak vichar aata hai jab koi bada dukh hua hai?
document: न हि प्रपश्यामि ममापनुद्याद्यच्छोकमुच्छोषणमिन्द्रियाणाम् । अवाप्य भूमावसपत्नमृद्धं राज्यं सुराणामपि...|I cannot find any cure for the great great grief I suffer, O KRISHNA, even though by winning this war, I would achieve great power and rule over the earth and the heavens.

query: Krishna se Arjun ne kya baat ki thi jo unhe ladaai se rokne ke liye kaha?
document: सञ्जय उवाच । एवमुक्त्वा हृषीकेशं गुडाकेशः परन्तपः न योत्स्य इति गोविन्दमुक्त्वा तूष्णीं बभूव ह ॥ २...|Sanjaya said: Dear Dhrtarashtra, my great king, after addressing HRISHIKESHA (Lord of the senses).  GUDUKESHA (conqueror of sleep), and PARAMTAPAH (destroyer of all enemies), ARJUN spoke clearly to the great Lord KRISHNA in a determined and assured voice that he would not fight, and then became silent.

query: Krishna kya baat karta hai Arjun ko dwaar ke beech khada karke?
document: तमुवाच हृषीकेशः प्रहसन्निव भारत । सेनयोरुभयोर्मध्ये विषीदन्तमिदं वचः ॥ २.१० ॥|“O ARJUNA,” HRISHIKESA spoke smilingly, as ARJUNA stood between the two armies:

query: Krishna ne Arjun ko kya kehaya tha?
document: श्रीभगवानुवाच । अशोच्यानन्वशोचस्त्वं प्रज्ञावादांश्च भाषसे गतासूनगतासूंश्च नानुशोचन्ति पण्डिताः ॥ ...|ARJUNA, you show your grief and compassion for those who do not deserve your grief, compassion or sympathy. Although your words are filled with wisdom, you must remember, the wise men never grieve for the living or the dead.”

query: Krishna ne Arjun ko kya kehaya tha jismein unki aatma kee aadi aur ant ke bare mein baat hui thi?
document: न त्वेवाहं जातु नासं न त्वं नेमे जनाधिपाः । न चैव न भविष्यामः सर्वे वयमतः परम् ॥ २.१२ ॥|ARJUNA”, always remember, there has never been a time when you or any of the great warriors present here, were not alive or non-existent, nor will we all, at any time, cease to exist and live on in the future.

query: Krishna kehte hain ki atma ka kya hota hai jab yeh ek sharir se doosre sharir mein jaata hai?
document: देहिनोऽस्मिन्यथा देहे कौमारं यौवनं जरा । तथा देहान्तरप्राप्तिर्धीरस्तत्र न मुह्यति ॥ २.१३ ॥|Lord Krishna continued:Dear ARJUNA, the wise never get confused by the fact that the ATMA or Soul goes through the stages of childhood, youth and old age along with the body. When one body ceases to function, the soul passes on to another body. The cycle is then repeated once more.

query: Arjun ko kya kaha hai jab unke indriyon ko unke indriya vishayon se milta hai?
document: मात्रास्पर्शास्तु कौन्तेय शीतोष्णसुखदुःखदाः । आगमापायिनोऽनित्यास्तांस्तितिक्षस्व भारत ॥ २.१४ ॥|The Blessed Lord continued: son of KUNTI (Arjuna), when the senses come in contact with their sensual objects, feelings of heat, cold, pain and pleasure. These feelings last only for a short time; they will come and go. Bear them patiently dear ARJUNA.

query: Kya yah kaha gaya hai ki jo vyakti krodh, hriday, adbhut, adbhut, shringar, bhaya, dainya, vishada, krodh, adbhut aur anya anubhavon se prabhavit nahin hota hai?
document: यं हि न व्यथयन्त्येते पुरुषं पुरुषर्षभ । समदुःखसुखं धीरं सोऽमृतत्वाय कल्पते ॥ २.१५ ॥|Only he who is not affected by these senses and sensual objects becomes immortal, for he is considered the best of men because he is well balanced in pain and pleasure.

query: Krishna keh rahe hain ki kya hai jo kabhi nahin hota?
document: नासतो विद्यते भावो नाभावो विद्यते सतः । उभयोरपि दृष्टोऽन्तस्त्वनयोस्तत्त्वदर्शिभिः ॥ २.१६ ॥|The Blessed Lord stated:The unreal does not exist and the real always exists. Those with peaceful, pure and wise minds, know the truth about both the real and unreal.

query: Kya Bhagwan ka kya vishisht lakshan hai?
document: अविनाशि तु तद्विद्धि येन सर्वमिदं ततम् । विनाशमव्ययस्यास्य न कश्चित्कर्तुमर्हति ॥ २.१७ ॥|He who is completely indestructible, present everywhere in the universe, and is imperishable, regard Him as God O ARJUNA.

query: Krishna ne Arjun ko kya kaha tha?
document: अन्तवन्त इमे देहा नित्यस्योक्ताः शरीरिणः । अनाशिनोऽप्रमेयस्य तस्माद्युध्यस्व भारत ॥ २.१८ ॥|The Blessed Lord explained: O ARJUNA, only the body can be destroyed; but the soul is indestructible, permanent and immortal. Therefore ARJUNA, pick up your weapons and fight!

query: Kya Arjun ko kisi ke marne se atma ki mrityu hoti hai?
document: य एनं वेत्ति हन्तारं यश्चैनं मन्यते हतम् । उभौ तौ न विजानीतो नायं हन्ति न हन्यते ॥ २.१९ ॥|O ARJUNA, he who thinks of the Soul as a killer and he who thinks that Soul can be killed, is ignorant, because the Soul can never be killed nor can it kill anyone or anything.

query: Arjun ko kya kaha hai ki atma kaise hota hai?
document: न जायते म्रियते वा कदाचि- न्नायं भूत्वा भविता वा न भूयः । अजो नित्यः शाश्वतोऽयं पुराणो न हन्यते ह...|The Blessed Lord said: Dear ARJUNA, the ATMAN or Soul can neither be born nor can it die. It is forever immortal, eternal and ancient. The Soul in a body does not die when the body itself perishes and ceases to exist. The Soul always lives on.

query: Kya Arjun ko kaha gaya hai ki jo jeev ko amar manaata hai?
document: वेदाविनाशिनं नित्यं य एनमजमव्ययम् । कथं स पुरुषः पार्थ कं घातयति हन्ति कम् ॥ २.२१ ॥|ARJUNA, he who knows the Soul to be eternal, indestructible, permanent unborn, and endless, that person can neither kill nor be killed.

query: Krishna kya kehta hai body ko pahle wala kya hota hai jab use nayi body milti hai?
document: वासांसि जीर्णानि यथा विहाय नवानि गृह्णाति नरोऽपराणि । तथा शरीराणि विहाय जीर्णा- न्यन्यानि संयाति ...|The Blessed Lord said: Just as a person gets rid of old clothing and replaces the old clothing with new ones, similarly, the soul changes from one body to a new body when its body has become old worn out and has stopped functioning.

query: Kya aatma ko haathiyon se kaatna, aag se jalna, hawa se ghulna ya paani se bhigona hai?
document: नैनं छिन्दन्ति शस्त्राणि नैनं दहति पावकः । न चैनं क्लेदयन्त्यापो न शोषयति मारुतः ॥ २.२३ ॥|The Soul cannot be cut by weapons, burnt by fire, absorbed by air, nor can water wet the Soul.

query: Kya Arjun ko Krishna ne kya kehaya ki atma kya hai?
document: अच्छेद्योऽयमदाह्योऽयमक्लेद्योऽशोष्य एव च । नित्यः सर्वगतः स्थाणुरचलोऽयं सनातनः ॥ २.२४ ॥|The Soul is eternal, everlasting. It cannot be destroyed, broken or burnt; it cannot become wet nor become dried. The Soul is the most stable thing in the universe, it is immovable and present throughout the universe.

query: Kya Arjun ko kuch bhi dekhkar dukh nahin karna chahiye?
document: अव्यक्तोऽयमचिन्त्योऽयमविकार्योऽयमुच्यते । तस्मादेवं विदित्वैनं नानुशोचितुमर्हसि ॥ २.२५ ॥|The Soul cannot be seen, With this mind, dear changed by any means. With this mind, dear ARJUNA, one should never grieve.

query: Arjun ko kya kaha gaya hai jab use lagta hai ki atma janm aur mrityu ke cycle mein hamesha chalti hai?
document: अथ चैनं नित्यजातं नित्यं वा मन्यसे मृतम् । तथापि त्वं महाबाहो नैवं शोचितुमर्हसि ॥ २.२६ ॥|Even if you incorrectly believe. O ARJUNA, that the Soul is constantly taking birth and dying, you should still not become upset and filled with grief and sadness.

query: Kya Arjun ko Krishna ne mrityu ke baare mein kuchh kehne ke liye bulaya tha?
document: जातस्य हि ध्रुवो मृत्युर्ध्रुवं जन्म मृतस्य च । तस्मादपरिहार्येऽर्थे न त्वं शोचितुमर्हसि ॥ २.२७ ॥|Dear ARJUNA, knowing the fact that anything that takes birth will eventually die, it seems pointless to grieve over someone’s death, especially if you knew that the death had to take place anyway.

query: Krishna ne Arjun ko kya kaha tha ki janm se pahle, janm ke baad aur mrityu ke baad sabhi jeevon ko kaise dekha jaata hai?
document: अव्यक्तादीनि भूतानि व्यक्तमध्यानि भारत । अव्यक्तनिधनान्येव तत्र का परिदेवना ॥ २.२८ ॥|ARJUNA, all beings are unseen before birth, are seen after birth and during their lives; again, however, all beings are unseen after death. So what cause is there to worry?

query: Kya Atma ka sandeha kis tarah se samajh sakte hain?
document: आश्चर्यवत्पश्यति कश्चिदेन- माश्चर्यवद्वदति तथैव चान्यः । आश्चर्यवच्चैनमन्यः शृणोति श्रुत्वाप्येनं...|Few look upon “the Soul” with curiosity. Some talk and hear of “the Soul” with curiosity and enchantment, but in the end, there is nobody who can really understand and comprehend “the Soul.”

query: Kya Arjun ko kuchh bhi ghamand karne ki zaroorat nahin hai?
document: देही नित्यमवध्योऽयं देहे सर्वस्य भारत । तस्मात्सर्वाणि भूतानि न त्वं शोचितुमर्हसि ॥ २.३० ॥|ARJUNA, although the body can be slain, the Soul cannot. The Soul of a being lives on forever, therefor it is not necessary to grieve over anybody’s death because the most important part of them never dies at all, and that is, their Souls.

query: Arjun ko kya kshatriya ke roop mein apni kartavya ko dekhkar karna chahiye?
document: स्वधर्ममपि चावेक्ष्य न विकम्पितुमर्हसि । धर्म्याद्धि युद्धाच्छ्रेयोऽन्यत्क्षत्रियस्य न विद्यते ॥ २....|Looking upon your duty, ARJUNA, as a Kshatriya (warrior), you should never be afraid, but be courageous, because there is nothing better for a Kshatriya than to fight in a righteous war.

query: Kya Arjun ko yuddh mein bhagya se prapt hua hai?
document: यदृच्छया चोपपन्नं स्वर्गद्वारमपावृतम् । सुखिनः क्षत्रियाः पार्थ लभन्ते युद्धमीदृशम् ॥ २.३२ ॥|Dear ARJUNA, you should consider yourself a very lucky warrior to fight in a war where for the victor, the prize is entrance to the gates of heaven.

query: Arjun ko yuddh nahi karne se kya hua?
document: अथ चेत्त्वमिमं धर्म्यं संग्रामं न करिष्यसि । ततः स्वधर्मं कीर्तिं च हित्वा पापमवाप्स्यसि ॥ २.३३ ॥|By not fighting this war, O ARJUNA, you are committing a sin because you fail to perform your duty as a warrior and you also will lose your honour.

query: Kya Arjun ko kisi cheez se bhi zyada dar hota hai?
document: अकीर्तिं चापि भूतानि कथयिष्यन्ति तेऽव्ययाम् । सम्भावितस्य चाकीर्तिर्मरणादतिरिच्यते ॥ २.३४ ॥|People will talk and look upon you, O ARJUNA, with disrespect. There is only one thing worse than death itself, and that is, disrespect for a respectable man.

query: Arjun ko yuddh mein nahi ladaane par kya hoga?
document: भयाद्रणादुपरतं मंस्यन्ते त्वां महारथाः । येषां च त्वं बहुमतो भूत्वा यास्यसि लाघवम् ॥ २.३५ ॥|O ARJUNA, your high esteem and reputation will become ruined if you do not fight this battle. The mighty warriors will consider you lower than them and will believe that you did not fight the battle because you feared the opponent.

query: Kya Arjun ko apne dushmanon ki chhidiyon aur galiyon se kuchh dard hota hai?
document: अवाच्यवादांश्च बहून्वदिष्यन्ति तवाहिताः । निन्दन्तस्तव सामर्थ्यं ततो दुःखतरं नु किम् ॥ २.३६ ॥|You will experience tremendous pain when your enemies laugh at your lack of strength and courage and say many shameful and humiliating things about you, O ARJUNA.

query: Krishna ne Arjun ko ladai mein kyun shamil hone ki kahaani sunayi?
document: हतो वा प्राप्स्यसि स्वर्गं जित्वा वा भोक्ष्यसे महीम् । तस्मादुत्तिष्ठ कौन्तेय युद्धाय कृतनिश्चयः ॥ ...|O ARJUNA, if you fight this battle, think of how it shall benefit you. If you die during battle, you will go to heaven and be in eternal peace. If you shall be victorious O ARJUNA, you will be the ruler of this Kingdom. O ARJUNA, stand up, take courage, and fight!

query: Arjun ko kya kaha gaya hai jo jeet haari, khushi dukh, faayda nuksaan ko ek samaan dikhane par koi paap nahin karta?
document: सुखदुःखे समे कृत्वा लाभालाभौ जयाजयौ । ततो युद्धाय युज्यस्व नैवं पापमवाप्स्यसि ॥ २.३८ ॥|The Blessed Lord spoke unto Arjuna: O ARJUNA, by considering victory and defeat, pleasure and pain, gain and loss with indifference, you will not commit any sin.

query: Arjun ko kya karna chahiye jisse unke karma ka bandhan tod jaaye?
document: एषा तेऽभिहिता सांख्ये बुद्धिर्योगे त्विमां शृणु । बुद्ध्या युक्तो यया पार्थ कर्मबन्धं प्रहास्यसि ॥ ...|O ARJUNA, you already have been presented knowledge. Now you must put this knowledge to practical use O ARJUNA, with selfless KARMYOGA, O ARJUNA, by doing your duty and leaving the results of your actions to the Lord, you will break the bonds of KARMA.

query: Yoga se kya labh hota hai?
document: नेहाभिक्रमनाशोऽस्ति प्रत्यवायो न विद्यते । स्वल्पमप्यस्य धर्मस्य त्रायते महतो भयात् ॥ २.४० ॥|When one practises Yoga, there is no fear of destruction; the person does not suffer a loss of honest effort in whatever he or she attempts. Even by practising a little bit of Yoga, one is protected from great fear ( of death or danger). Peace of mind is slowly obtained.

query: Kya yehi sabhi karyaon mein nirnay lene wale log hain?
document: व्यवसायात्मिका बुद्धिरेकेह कुरुनन्दन । बहुशाखा ह्यनन्ताश्च बुद्धयोऽव्यवसायिनाम् ॥ २.४१ ॥|Those with a firm mind, O ARJUNA, are decisive about everything. Those whose minds are infirm are not decisive in their actions and their intellect wanders in many directions.

query: Kya Arjun ko kuch logon ne Vedon ka upyog karte hue materialichhichhayein aur anand ke liye hi kiyaa?
document: यामिमां पुष्पितां वाचं प्रवदन्त्यविपश्चितः । वेदवादरताः पार्थ नान्यदस्तीति वादिनः ॥ २.४२ ॥|O ARJUNA, unwise people who think of nothing but material desires and pleasures, and who believe in the Vedas as well, think that heaven means the absolute end of oneself.

query: Kya karein jo swarg ki ichchha rakhte hain aur anand aur adhipatya prapt karne ke liye kai karyon ka nirdesh dete hain?
document: कामात्मानः स्वर्गपरा जन्मकर्मफलप्रदाम् । क्रियाविशेषबहुलां भोगैश्वर्यगतिं प्रति ॥ २.४३ ॥|Full of desires, having heaven as their goal, they utter flowery words, which promise new birth as the reward of their actions, and prescribe various specific actions for the attainment of pleasure and Lordship.

query: Kya kisi ko jo swatantrata aur anand mein bharosa karte hain, unki man mein yog aur samadhi ke liye taiyar hona mushkil hai?
document: भोगैश्वर्यप्रसक्तानां तयापहृतचेतसाम् । व्यवसायात्मिका बुद्धिः समाधौ न विधीयते ॥ २.४४ ॥|For, those who cling to joy and Lordship, whose minds are drawn away by such teaching, are neither determinate and resolute nor are they fit for steady meditation and SAMADHI.

query: Krishna kya kehta hai gunon ko door karne ke liye?
document: त्रैगुण्यविषया वेदा निस्त्रैगुण्यो भवार्जुन । निर्द्वन्द्वो नित्यसत्त्वस्थो निर्योगक्षेम आत्मवान् ॥...|The Blessed Lord spoke: The Vedas deal mainly with the three Gunas (qualities and nature). One of these is known as the material portion of life in the world. You must overcome all of these Gunas, O ARJUNA. Get rid of all you doubts. Free yourself of all frustrations and grief and devote mind and soul to God. This is true peace and happiness.

query: Krishna kya keh raha hai ki Vedon ka kya mahatva hai?
document: यावानर्थ उदपाने सर्वतः संप्लुतोदके । तावान्सर्वेषु वेदेषु ब्राह्मणस्य विजानतः ॥ २.४६ ॥|O ARJUNA, to an enlightened soul, the Vedas are only as useful as a tank of water during a flood.

query: Kya karm ka parinaam karein ya nahin karna chahiye?
document: कर्मण्येवाधिकारस्ते मा फलेषु कदाचन । मा कर्मफलहेतुर्भूर्मा ते सङ्गोऽस्त्वकर्मणि ॥ २.४७ ॥|O ARJUNA, always remember what I am about to say to you for it is the law of KARMA, a law that one should always obey in life should he/she ever feel resentment, frustration, anxiety, or grief:You have the right only to perform your actions, duties and responsibilities in life; however, the results of these actions should not concern you at all. You should not even desire results for your actions because the results are simply not in your hands, but in the hands of the Lord. Neither should you lean towards inaction. (This is the most important shloka describing Karmyoga.)

query: Arjun ko kya kaha tha ki unke kaam karte samay unki man mein shanti honi chahiye?
document: योगस्थः कुरु कर्माणि सङ्गं त्यक्त्वा धनंजय । सिद्ध्यसिद्ध्योः समो भूत्वा समत्वं योग उच्यते ॥ २.४८ ॥|The Divine Lord said: O ARJUNA, perform all your actions with an even mind. In other words, do not feel overjoyed at the successes in your life and do not allow yourself to feel overcome with grief because of any failures you may encounter on life. Rid yourself of any attachments to material things and always remember that the results of your actions is in the Lord’s hands. If you react the same way, regardless of the result of your actions, you are performing what is known as KARMYOGA.

query: Arjun ko kya Krishna ne kaha tha ki kya karne se vyakti ka jeevan behtar hota hai?
document: दूरेण ह्यवरं कर्म बुद्धियोगाद्धनंजय । बुद्धौ शरणमन्विच्छ कृपणाः फलहेतवः ॥ २.४९ ॥|The Blessed Lord said unto ARJUNA:When actions are performed by a person for any selfish motive or gain, that person shall always suffer and remain disappointed in life. Those, however, who practice KARMYOGA  or the Yoga of even-mindedness, are free from any worries or disappointments for they do not care for the results of their actions and duties.

query: Kya karmayoga se koi apne man mein shakti ki ichcha nahin rakhta hai?
document: बुद्धियुक्तो जहातीह उभे सुकृतदुष्कृते । तस्माद्योगाय युज्यस्व योगः कर्मसु कौशलम् ॥ २.५० ॥|That person who devotes himself to a life of KARMYOGA with no selfish motives in mind does not become hungry for power, nor does he become attached to any of the bad and disgusting things in life. Therefore, O ARJUNA, always strive to achieve selfless KARMYOGA, for this is the path of perfection in life.

query: Karmayoga se kya labh hota hai?
document: कर्मजं बुद्धियुक्ता हि फलं त्यक्त्वा मनीषिणः । जन्मबन्धविनिर्मुक्ताः पदं गच्छन्त्यनामयम् ॥ २.५१ ॥|Those individuals who have devoted their lives to the practice of KARMYOGA, they not only free themselves of the worries that accompany anticipation of results after performing certain actions, but also free themselves of all sins and achieve the supreme state of everlasting peace and happiness.

query: Kya jeevan ke sambandhit saral aur samvedansheel vichar karne ke liye manushya ka manushya ka manushya ka manushya ka manushya ka manushya ka manushya ka manushya ka manushya ka manushya ka manushya ka manushya ka manushya ka manushya ka manushya ka manushya ka manushya ka manushya ka manushya ka manushya ka manushya ka manushya ka manushya ka manushya ka manushya ka manushya ka manushya ka manushya ka manushya ka manushya ka manushya ka manushya ka manushya ka manushya ka manushya ka manushya ka manushya ka manushya ka manushya ka manushya ka manushya ka manushya ka manushya ka manushya ka manushya ka manushya ka manushya ka manushya ka manushya ka manushya ka manushya ka manushya ka manushya ka manushya ka manushya ka manushya ka manushya ka manushya ka manushya ka manushya ka manushya ka manushya ka manushya ka manushya ka manushya ka manushya ka manushya ka manushya ka manushya ka manushya ka manushya ka manushya ka manushya ka manushya ka manushya ka manushya ka manushya
document: यदा ते मोहकलिलं बुद्धिर्व्यतितरिष्यति । तदा गन्तासि निर्वेदं श्रोतव्यस्य श्रुतस्य च ॥ २.५२ ॥|When you finally reach the state where your mind is free from all attachments and pleasures in life, your intellect will clear and will give you the ability to think logically, and wisely, whenever you need to.

query: Arjun ko kya pradaan karta hai jisse vah sach aur asach ko alag kar sakta hai?
document: श्रुतिविप्रतिपन्ना ते यदा स्थास्यति निश्चला । समाधावचला बुद्धिस्तदा योगमवाप्स्यसि ॥ २.५३ ॥|Your intellect, O ARJUNA, will then allow you to distinguish between the real and the unreal in life. You will no longer have conflicts about opinions of life’s many aspects and characteristics. You will know what is of importance and of no importance. Finally, you will reach the state where you will have achieved KARMYOGA, a state of long-lasting peace and happiness.

query: Krishna kee baat sunaayein, un logon kee kya visheshataaen hain jo bahut hi budahee hain aur unke man mein ek shaktishaali dhairya hai?
document: अर्जुन उवाच । स्थितप्रज्ञस्य का भाषा समाधिस्थस्य केशव स्थितधीः किं प्रभाषेत किमासीत व्रजेत किम् ॥ ...|Arjuna asked the Lord:Dear KESHAVA (Krishna), what are the characteristics of a man who is very wise, has a firm intellect and is placed or engrossed in a superconscious state? How does this type of person speak, sit and walk?

query: Krishna keh raha hai Arjun se, kya hai woh manushya jo apne man aur dil se kisi bhi cheez ki ichchha nahin rakhta aur apne andar hi shant ho jata hai?
document: श्रीभगवानुवाच । प्रजहाति यदा कामान्सर्वान्पार्थ मनोगतान् आत्मन्येवात्मना तुष्टः स्थितप्रज्ञस्तदोच्...|The Divine Lord Krishna replied: O ARJUNA, one is said to have steady wisdom if he completely frees himself from desires of the mind and heart and is realistically satisfied within himself, no more having the longing for material pleasures.

query: Kya kisi vyakti ke man ko dukh ya sukh se prabhavit nahin hota hai aur vah sabhi bandhanon aur bhavon se mukt hai?
document: दुःखेष्वनुद्विग्नमनाः सुखेषु विगतस्पृहः । वीतरागभयक्रोधः स्थितधीर्मुनिरुच्यते ॥ २.५६ ॥|He whose mind is unaffected by misery or pleasure and is free from all bonds and attachments, fear and anger, is man, of steady wisdom and decisive intellect.

query: Kya koi vishay hai jo vyakti ko anubhav karne par khushi ya dukh nahin deta?
document: यः सर्वत्रानभिस्नेहस्तत्तत्प्राप्य शुभाशुभम् । नाभिनन्दति न द्वेष्टि तस्य प्रज्ञा प्रतिष्ठिता ॥ २.५...|A man has a decisive intellect, who is no longer attached to anything, shoeing pleasure if something pleasan happens and displeasure if something unpleasant occurs.|

query: Kaise kisi vyakti ko apne indriyon ko manushya kee aakruti kee tarah aakarshit karne se bacha sakta hai?
document: यदा संहरते चायं कूर्मोऽङ्गानीव सर्वशः । इन्द्रियाणीन्द्रियार्थेभ्यस्तस्य प्रज्ञा प्रतिष्ठिता ॥ २.५८...|Just as a tortoise withdraws or retreats its limbs into its shell, a person with a firm mind and decisive intellect can withdraw his senses from sensual objects.

query: Kya jeevan mein aatma-sukha se adhik hai ya aatma-sukha se kam?
document: विषया विनिवर्तन्ते निराहारस्य देहिनः । रसवर्जं रसोऽप्यस्य परं दृष्ट्वा निवर्तते ॥ २.५९ ॥|One who does not use his senses for the enjoyment of sensual objects can overcome and rise above sensual objects. However, he is not able to leave off the attachment to his senses. One who realizes God or the Supreme, gers rid of attachments to the senses as well.

query: Krishna kehte hain ki kaise logon ki manushya chetan ko bhi shakti aur gati se khatra hai?
document: यततो ह्यपि कौन्तेय पुरुषस्य विपश्चितः । इन्द्रियाणि प्रमाथीनि हरन्ति प्रसभं मनः ॥ २.६० ॥|The Blessed Lord said: Even those who are wise and are striving to achieve spiritual happiness and freedom are carried away violently or with great force by their excited senses.

query: Kya yogiyon ko unke indriyon par kaise adhikar hota hai?
document: तानि सर्वाणि संयम्य युक्त आसीत मत्परः । वशे हि यस्येन्द्रियाणि तस्य प्रज्ञा प्रतिष्ठिता ॥ २.६१ ॥|The yogis or My divine devotees have gained or achieved self control; they have complete control of their senses and therefore they have also earned the power of constant wisdom. Their minds are constantly focussed and concentrated on ME, the Supreme Goal.

query: Kya yah hota hai jab koi vyakti aas-paas ke vastuon mein man lagaate rahta hai?
document: ध्यायतो विषयान्पुंसः सङ्गस्तेषूपजायते । सङ्गात्संजायते कामः कामात्क्रोधोऽभिजायते ॥ २.६२ ॥|Those who always think about sensual objects get attached to those objects. Attachment arouses desires and when one does not get what one desires, irritation is aroused, and from irritation stems anger and frustration.

query: Kya krodh se hamaare man mein kya hota hai?
document: क्रोधाद्भवति संमोहः संमोहात्स्मृतिविभ्रमः । स्मृतिभ्रंशाद्बुद्धिनाशो बुद्धिनाशात्प्रणश्यति ॥ २.६३ ॥|The Blessed Lord spoke: From anger, stems delusion (false beliefs or assumptions); delusion causes loss of one’s confused mind; the confused mind makes a person lose his/her ability to reason and lose their power to solve his/her problems. When one loses his/her power to reason, the person will suffer ultimate death and destruction.

query: Kya ek vyakti apne indriyon ko niyantrit karke aur vishayon se aakarshit nahin hone par shanti aur atma ki shuddhata prapt karta hai?
document: रागद्वेषवियुक्तैस्तु विषयानिन्द्रियैश्चरन् । आत्मवश्यैर्विधेयात्मा प्रसादमधिगच्छति ॥ २.६४ ॥|But the disciplined wise man who has control over his senses and is free from attraction and emotional distractions, gains peace and purity of the self.

query: Kya aatma ki shuddhata se sabhi dukh aur klesh door ho jate hain?
document: प्रसादे सर्वदुःखानां हानिरस्योपजायते । प्रसन्नचेतसो ह्याशु बुद्धिः पर्यवतिष्ठते ॥ २.६५ ॥|Purity of self gets rid of all miseries and grief. A person with internal purity soon develops steady wisdom and a clear, unclouded intelligence.

query: Kya aapko yah pata hai ki kaise hamaare mann ko shanti mil sakti hai?
document: नास्ति बुद्धिरयुक्तस्य न चायुक्तस्य भावना । न चाभावयतः शान्तिरशान्तस्य कुतः सुखम् ॥ २.६६ ॥|One who cannot control his senses is one who is lacking in steady wisdom and intelligence, and also lacks proper feelings or sentiments (thoughts). A person who cannot think properly and make decisions with a clear mind, cannot have peace of mind, and without peace of mind there can be no happiness.

query: Kya material samsar mein jhoomne wale logon ki man mein asamajik vichar aate hain?
document: इन्द्रियाणां हि चरतां यन्मनोऽनु विधीयते । तदस्य हरति प्रज्ञां वायुर्नावमिवाम्भसि ॥ २.६७ ॥|The mind of those who run after or pursue material pleasures and sensual objects, is often clouded and let on the wrong path, just as the wind blows away the ship on the waters.

query: Arjun ko kya kaha gaya hai ki unhein kaise shanti aur sukha prapt karne ka marga hai?
document: तस्माद्यस्य महाबाहो निगृहीतानि सर्वशः । इन्द्रियाणीन्द्रियार्थेभ्यस्तस्य प्रज्ञा प्रतिष्ठिता ॥ २.६८...|O ARJUNA, therefore with senses under control, protected from sensual objects, not only does one have the ability to reason things out properly, but also gains peace of mind leading to eternal bliss and happiness.

query: Kya guru ke liye din aur raat ka matlab kya hota hai?
document: या निशा सर्वभूतानां तस्यां जागर्ति संयमी । यस्यां जाग्रति भूतानि सा निशा पश्यतो मुनेः ॥ २.६९ ॥|When it is night for all others, the wise man is always awake. When others are aware and deceived (deluded) by sensual objects, the wise man who knows the truth and has realized God, shuts his eyes to daylight and the misleading material objects that attract people, and considers it night. He is not easily deceived.

query: Kya jeevan mein shanti prapt karne ke baad, kya kram hua hota hai apne ichchhaon se?
document: आपूर्यमाणमचलप्रतिष्ठं समुद्रमापः प्रविशन्ति यद्वत् । तद्वत्कामा यं प्रविशन्ति सर्वे स शान्तिमाप्नोत...|As the river enters the ocean without affecting the ocean or disturbing it, so the desires enter the person who has obtained Supreme peace, but not the person who is already filled with desires and wants more and more.

query: Krishna ne kya kahaa hai, jab man mein koi ichchha nahin rahe aur apne paas ke kuch nahin sochne par shanti aati hai?
document: विहाय कामान्यः सर्वान् पुमांश्चरति निःस्पृहः । निर्ममो निरहंकारः स शान्तिमधिगच्छति ॥ २.७१ ॥|The Blessed Lord said: By giving up all desires, freeing oneself of all attachments and without constantly thinking of oneself or of one’s possessions, only then, one may live in realistic peace.

query: Kya Arjun ko Bhagwan se milne ke baad kya hota hai?
document: एषा ब्राह्मी स्थितिः पार्थ नैनां प्राप्य विमुह्यति । स्थित्वास्यामन्तकालेऽपि ब्रह्मनिर्वाणमृच्छति ॥...|The Blessed Lord spoke: O ARJUNA, this is the state of a person who has truly realized God. After obtaining Supreme Bliss by realizing God, this person cannot be deceived by any of life’s evils. Until the time of death one remains firm in this state and ultimately achieves Supremr Peace and tranquility.

query: Krishna kya kehta hai ki gyan se kaam achha hai, lekin aap mujhe ladai ladiye?
document: अर्जुन उवाच । ज्यायसी चेत्कर्मणस्ते मता बुद्धिर्जनार्दन तत्किं कर्मणि घोरे मां नियोजयसि केशव ॥ ३.१...|Arjuna asked the Good Lord : O Lord KRISHNA, if you claim that Gyan or Knowledge is better than one’s Karma or responsibility, the why do you ask me to fight this battle?

query: Krishna ji ne mujhe do alag-alag rastein ek saath kyun kaha?
document: व्यामिश्रेणेव वाक्येन बुद्धिं मोहयसीव मे । तदेकं वद निश्चित्य येन श्रेयोऽहमाप्नुयाम् ॥ ३.२ ॥|I am confused dear Lord, by the advice you have given to me. You have told me to take two opposite and different courses of action at once. Please, O KRISHNA, tell me of just one wise solution and course of action that would lead out of this problem safely.

query: Krishna ne Arjun ko kya do raste bataye the?
document: श्रीभगवानुवाच । लोकेऽस्मिन्द्विविधा निष्ठा पुरा प्रोक्ता मयानघ ज्ञानयोगेन सांख्यानां कर्मयोगेन योग...|The Blessed Lord replied : O Arjuna, always remember in life that there are only two definite paths of action as I have described before. One of these is known as Sankhyayoga or the path of knowledge, and the other is Karmayoga, or the path of performing duty and action without expecting any result.

query: Kya Arjun ko karmayoga aur sankhyayoga ke mukhya lakshyon ko samajhne ki avashyakta hai?
document: न कर्मणामनारम्भान्नैष्कर्म्यं पुरुषोऽश्नुते । न च संन्यसनादेव सिद्धिं समधिगच्छति ॥ ३.४ ॥|O Arjuna, it is not only important to understand the meanings of Sankhyayoga and Karmayoga, but it is also important to understand the aims or goals behind each of these courses of action.The aim of Karmayoga is to achieve freedom from action. One cannot achieve the goal by total inaction or by not performing any action at all. The goal of Sankhyayoga is the realization of God. When one has fully realized God, he has reached a state of perfection. Once simply cannot attain this state of perfection by giving up or retreating from the performance of one’s actions.

query: Krishna kaunse shabdon se kaha hai ki har vyakti kuchh hi kaam karta hai, chaahe vah koi bhi ho?
document: न हि कश्चित्क्षणमपि जातु तिष्ठत्यकर्मकृत् । कार्यते ह्यवशः कर्म सर्वः प्रकृतिजैर्गुणैः ॥ ३.५ ॥|Lord Krishna continued:There is nobody who is living that does not perform an action of some sort even for a moment. Everyone is forced to perform actions by natural tendencies (human nature).

query: Arjun ko kya kaha gaya hai jo apne kaam karne wale aankhon se kuchh prapt karne ki ichchha karte hain lekin unke man mein usse prapt karne ki koshish nahin karte?
document: कर्मेन्द्रियाणि संयम्य य आस्ते मनसा स्मरन् । इन्द्रियार्थान्विमूढात्मा मिथ्याचारः स उच्यते ॥ ३.६ ॥|O Arjuna, those who have learned to control the organs of action, yet still think in their minds of the pleasures that they can get from those organs, are fooling only themselves by pretending to have certain qualities that do not really exist within them.

query: Arjun ko kya kaha hai jo apne man aur indriyon ko shant rakhta hai aur apne kaam mein aatma-samarpan karta hai?
document: यस्त्विन्द्रियाणि मनसा नियम्यारभतेऽर्जुन । कर्मेन्द्रियैः कर्मयोगमसक्तः स विशिष्यते ॥ ३.७ ॥|The Blessed Lord spoke: O Arjuna, one who has fully learned to control his senses with his mind and practises selfless Karmayoga keeping his senses controlled and not allowing them to interfere and disrupt his action, is truly a great person.

query: Kya karna hoga jab koi kuch nahin karega?
document: नियतं कुरु कर्म त्वं कर्म ज्यायो ह्यकर्मणः । शरीरयात्रापि च ते न प्रसिद्ध्येदकर्मणः ॥ ३.८ ॥|Perform the actions that you have been obliged to perform, or that have been prescribed for you. Action is always better than inaction, If one is inactive, he cannot live, simply because he is not performing the action of maintaining his body.

query: Krishna ne Arjun ko kya kaha tha ki vyakti kya kare?
document: यज्ञार्थात्कर्मणोऽन्यत्र लोकोऽयं कर्मबन्धनः । तदर्थं कर्म कौन्तेय मुक्तसङ्गः समाचर ॥ ३.९ ॥|The Lord continued: O Arjuna, all the actions that a person performs in this world, except of course those associated with sacrifice or Yagya, tie that person to the world. Therefore, O Arjuna to break free from this link, perform all your actions well without being attached to them.

query: Brahma ne jagat ko kya seva ke saath banaya hai?
document: सहयज्ञाः प्रजाः सृष्ट्वा पुरोवाच प्रजापतिः । अनेन प्रसविष्यध्वमेष वोऽस्त्विष्टकामधुक् ॥ ३.१० ॥|Brahma has created the universe with the spirit of sacrifice. Brahma, the Creator, said unto mankind, “You shall grow and prosper. Yagya (sacrifice) will bring you all that you wish.”

query: Krishna keh raha hai ki yagya karne se devta kaise badhate hain?
document: देवान्भावयतानेन ते देवा भावयन्तु वः । परस्परं भावयन्तः श्रेयः परमवाप्स्यथ ॥ ३.११ ॥|The Lord said unto Arjuna: The Gods or Deities grow with Yagya or sacrifice. When the Deities grow, they will help you to grow. Thus, both Deity and mankind grow continually. they will both achieve their supreme goal.

query: Yagya ke madhyam se kya milta hai?
document: इष्टान्भोगान्हि वो देवा दास्यन्ते यज्ञभाविताः । तैर्दत्तानप्रदायैभ्यो यो भुङ्क्ते स्तेन एव सः ॥ ३.१...|Through the spirit of sacrifice of Yagya, the Deities grow and progress. As they grow, they will provide you with all the pleasures you desire. You should offer part of these pleasures to the Deities.If one is granted pleasures by another person, the one who receives the pleasures should share some of those pleasures with the provider of those pleasures, or else he is as bad as a thief.

query: Krishna kya keh raha hai kisi ke liye khana khaane se pehle kya karna chahiye?
document: यज्ञशिष्टाशिनः सन्तो मुच्यन्ते सर्वकिल्बिषैः । भुञ्जते ते त्वघं पापा ये पचन्त्यात्मकारणात् ॥ ३.१३ ॥|The Blessed Lord Krishna said:People who eat food after offering it for sacrifice are considered pious, pure, and are freed from all sins. People who prepare food only for themselves commit sins and are impure.

query: Kya yagya ke liye kya karna hoga?
document: अन्नाद्भवन्ति भूतानि पर्जन्यादन्नसम्भवः । यज्ञाद्भवति पर्जन्यो यज्ञः कर्मसमुद्भवः ॥ ३.१४ ॥|Food allows people to live. Food is produced from rain. Rain arises from sacrifice. Actions produce sacrifice or Yagna. God produces knowledge. Knowledge produces actions. Actions produce sacrifice or Yagya. Where there is sacrifice, the omnipresent God is there also.

query: Kya Yagya ke baare mein Bhagwan ne kya kaha hai?
document: कर्म ब्रह्मोद्भवं विद्धि ब्रह्माक्षरसमुद्भवम् । तस्मात्सर्वगतं ब्रह्म नित्यं यज्ञे प्रतिष्ठितम् ॥ ३...|Food allows people to live. Food is produced from rain. Rain arises from sacrifice. Actions produce sacrifice or Yagna.God produces knowledge. Knowledge produces actions. Actions produce sacrifice or Yagya.Where there is sacrifice, the omnipresent God is there also.

query: Arjun ko kya kaha hai jo apne jeevan mein ananda ki bhavana ko adhik dhyan dete hain?
document: एवं प्रवर्तितं चक्रं नानुवर्तयतीह यः । अघायुरिन्द्रियारामो मोघं पार्थ स जीवति ॥ ३.१६ ॥|The Blessed Lord said: O Arjuna, he who does not follow the proper course of creation such as that I have just described, but centres his life around the enjoyment of luxuries, this sinful person, in my eyes, leads a useless life. He shall never fully understand and realize me.

query: Kya jis prani ko apne aap mein shanti aur santushti hoti hai, uske liye kaam aur kartavya kya hain?
document: यस्त्वात्मरतिरेव स्यादात्मतृप्तश्च मानवः । आत्मन्येव च सन्तुष्टस्तस्य कार्यं न विद्यते ॥ ३.१७ ॥|He, O Arjuna, who is satisfied and content in himself, and he who is absorbed in himself, actions and duties do not exist (for him).

query: Kya yeh vyakti ka kya sthiti hai jiska koi kaam ya koi vishay us par asar nahin padta?
document: नैव तस्य कृतेनार्थो नाकृतेनेह कश्चन । न चास्य सर्वभूतेषु कश्चिदर्थव्यपाश्रयः ॥ ३.१८ ॥|This type of person has no use for actions (duties performed for the attainment of a certain goal), or inactions (duties performed without the expectation of any results).This type of person has reached a very high stage in the attainment of peace and detachment from all beings and things. He no longer selfishly depends on anybody or anything.

query: Arjun ko kya karna chahiye?
document: तस्मादसक्तः सततं कार्यं कर्म समाचर । असक्तो ह्याचरन्कर्म परमाप्नोति पूरुषः ॥ ३.१९ ॥|Therefore, Arjuna always perform your given duties without feelings of attachment towards any being or anything. A person doing unattached actions, or in other words, “inction” attains the Lord, the key to perfection.

query: Kya Arjun ko apne kaam karne ke liye koi bhavna ya attachment nahin rakhni chahiye?
document: कर्मणैव हि संसिद्धिमास्थिता जनकादयः । लोकसंग्रहमेवापि संपश्यन्कर्तुमर्हसि ॥ ३.२० ॥|Wise men, such as King Janak, all attained the state of perfection by doing their duties and actions without any feelings of attachment to anyone or anything. Therefore, Arjuna, keeping in mind the goodwill and welfare of others in the world, do your duties and perform your actions selflessly.

query: Krishna kehte hain ki koi bhi vyakti agar accha kaam karega to log uske kaam ko karne lagenge.
document: यद्यदाचरति श्रेष्ठस्तत्तदेवेतरो जनः । स यत्प्रमाणं कुरुते लोकस्तदनुवर्तते ॥ ३.२१ ॥|If a great man sets an example for the world, the world will follow him. Whatever standards or values he sets, people generally will follow the same set of standards and values.

query: Krishna kehte hain ki unhein bhi koi vishesh kaam nahin hai, fir bhi ve kya karte hain?
document: न मे पार्थास्ति कर्तव्यं त्रिषु लोकेषु किंचन । नानवाप्तमवाप्तव्यं वर्त एव च कर्मणि ॥ ३.२२ ॥|The Blessed Lord spoke: O Arjuna, take Me for example. There is nothing that is not available for me in this universe, nor is there any specific function or duty for me to perform, still, however, I perform Karma.

query: Krishna ne Arjun ko kya kehaya tha ki yadi vah apne kartavyaon ko nahin karta, toh prithvi par sabhi jeevon ka kya hoga?
document: यदि ह्यहं न वर्तेयं जातु कर्मण्यतन्द्रितः । मम वर्त्मानुवर्तन्ते मनुष्याः पार्थ सर्वशः ॥ ३.२३ ॥|O Arjuna, if I do not perform my duties, the destruction of all regions of the universe will come about. Mixed castes will develop and all the beings on the face of this earth will be destroyed.

query: Kya yadi main koi karya nahin karta, toh main jatiyon ki vyavastha mein chakkar lagata hoon aur in jeevon ko nuksaan pahunchata hoon?
document: उत्सीदेयुरिमे लोका न कुर्यां कर्म चेदहम् । संकरस्य च कर्ता स्यामुपहन्यामिमाः प्रजाः ॥ ३.२४ ॥|These worlds would if I did no do action, I would be the cause of confusion of castes and I would destroy these beings.

query: Krishna keh raha hai ki bhool-bhali logon jaisi hi karm karte hain, waise hi pandit log bhi karm karenge, lekin unhein kuch bhi nahi chahiye.
document: सक्ताः कर्मण्यविद्वांसो यथा कुर्वन्ति भारत । कुर्याद्विद्वांस्तथासक्तश्चिकीर्षुर्लोकसंग्रहम् ॥ ३.२५...|The Blessed Lord said: Just as the ignorant perform actions with attachment to things and/or beings, so should the wise men take action for the preservation of world order, without developing any attachments whatsoever, O Arjuna.

query: Krishna kehne mein kya hai ki ek bada admi apne kaam ko kaise kare aur logon ko kaise samjhaye jo unki baat nahin samajh paate?
document: न बुद्धिभेदं जनयेदज्ञानां कर्मसङ्गिनाम् । जोषयेत्सर्वकर्माणि विद्वान्युक्तः समाचरन् ॥ ३.२६ ॥|It is not a wise man’s concern or responsibility to fill the ignorant person’s mind with doubts, even if the latter is attached to his actions and constantly awaits results.However, he should encourafe these ignorant people just as any great man, by performing his own duties and actions unattached to them, as well as possible.

query: Krishna kya kehte hain ki prakriti ki kis teen gunon se hum sab kuch karte hain?
document: प्रकृतेः क्रियमाणानि गुणैः कर्माणि सर्वशः । अहंकारविमूढात्मा कर्ताहमिति मन्यते ॥ ३.२७ ॥|The Blessed Lord Krishna spoke: O Arjuna, all actions that are performed by beings, are done so by three modes of Prakrithi or three aspects of nature. However, ignorant people claim themselves as the performer of their actions.

query: Arjun ko kya kaha gaya hai ki jo log prakriti ke vibhajan aur aatma-rahit kaarya ko samajhkar, drishya aur drishy ke sambandh ko samajh jaate hain aur kisi bhi jeev aur vastu se jodne ki ichchha nahin karte hain?
document: तत्त्ववित्तु महाबाहो गुणकर्मविभागयोः । गुणा गुणेषु वर्तन्त इति मत्वा न सज्जते ॥ ३.२८ ॥|He who understands fully, O Arjuna, the objects of perception (senses, mind, etc.), divisions of Prakrithi (nature), and selfless action, has the ability to understand the relationship of senses and sensual objects and never gets attached to any beings or objects.

query: Krishna kya kehta hai gunon aur unke kaamon se judne wale logon ke saath kya karna chahiye?
document: प्रकृतेर्गुणसंमूढाः सज्जन्ते गुणकर्मसु । तानकृत्स्नविदो मन्दान्कृत्स्नविन्न विचालयेत् ॥ ३.२९ ॥|The Lord spoke: Those who are deceived by the Gunas of nature or Prakrithi and are deceived by karma, develop an attachment to the Gunas and to their actions.A wise person would not disturb, or have anything to do with these ignorant beings, O Arjuna.

query: Arjun ko kya kaha hai ki unhein apne kaam kisein sambhalne chahiye?
document: मयि सर्वाणि कर्माणि संन्यस्याध्यात्मचेतसा । निराशीर्निर्ममो भूत्वा युध्यस्व विगतज्वरः ॥ ३.३० ॥|Dedicate and surrender all your actions unto me Oh Arjuna. Fix your mind on me, leaving behind you all feelings of hope, attachments and anguish.

query: Kya karm se mukt hone ke liye kya karna hoga?
document: ये मे मतमिदं नित्यमनुतिष्ठन्ति मानवाः । श्रद्धावन्तोऽनसूयन्तो मुच्यन्ते तेऽपि कर्मभिः ॥ ३.३१ ॥|Those wise people, with faith in Me, and those who follow my teaching, are always given freedom from their actions (Karma).

query: Kya Arjun ko kisi kehne par bhi uske guru ki baat nahin mante hain?
document: ये त्वेतदभ्यसूयन्तो नानुतिष्ठन्ति मे मतम् । सर्वज्ञानविमूढांस्तान्विद्धि नष्टानचेतसः ॥ ३.३२ ॥|On the other hand, O Arjuna, those of poor intelligence that do not follow my teaching are ignorant; regard them as mere fools.

query: Kya prakriti ke kaaran sabhi jeevon ko karna padta hai, aur kya yeh koi bhi jeev ko kuch bhi karne se rok sakta hai?
document: सदृशं चेष्टते स्वस्याः प्रकृतेर्ज्ञानवानपि । प्रकृतिं यान्ति भूतानि निग्रहः किं करिष्यति ॥ ३.३३ ॥|All beings, wise or unwise, are forced to act by nature. What can restraint possibly do, O Arjuna?

query: Krishna ne kya kahaa hai ki sansaarik anand ke liye hamaare aas-paas ke gyaan ke astitva ke kaaran kya hota hai?
document: इन्द्रियस्येन्द्रियस्यार्थे रागद्वेषौ व्यवस्थितौ । तयोर्न वशमागच्छेत्तौ ह्यस्य परिपन्थिनौ ॥ ३.३४ ॥|The Divine Lord stated:The enjoyment of sensual objects by their senses (an example of human nature) creates barriers to the path of Bliss and peace if one becomes a victim of attachment to his sesses.

query: Kya apne dharm ko karna shubh hai ya anya ke dharm ko karna?
document: श्रेयान्स्वधर्मो विगुणः परधर्मात्स्वनुष्ठितात् । स्वधर्मे निधनं श्रेयः परधर्मो भयावहः ॥ ३.३५ ॥|One’s own duty (Dharma) is more favourable than the well-established duty of others. To even encounter death, while performing one’s own duties (Dharma), is truly divine. However another person’s duty is filles with menace and fear.

query: Krishna kehne ke baad, Arjun ne poocha: Jis vyakti ko apne vichar se nahin karke, aur doosron ki shakti se kuch galat karna padta hai, uske man mein kya vishwas hai?
document: अर्जुन उवाच । अथ केन प्रयुक्तोऽयं पापं चरति पूरुषः अनिच्छन्नपि वार्ष्णेय बलादिव नियोजितः ॥ ३.३६ ॥|Arjuna asked the Lord: O Lord Krishna, what motivates a person to commit sins that were committed involuntarily or by the force of others?

query: Krishna kya kehta hai rajogun se utpann kya hota hai?
document: श्रीभगवानुवाच । काम एष क्रोध एष रजोगुणसमुद्भवः महाशनो महापाप्मा विद्ध्येनमिह वैरिणम् ॥ ३.३७ ॥|The Divine Lord replied: It is desire and wrath or anger arising from the evil (Rajasik) Guna in the form of the great fire of attachment. In this case, consider this fire the enemy and the sinner.

query: Arjun ko kya kaha gaya hai ki unke man mein kya chhupa hua hai?
document: धूमेनाव्रियते वह्निर्यथादर्शो मलेन च । यथोल्बेनावृतो गर्भस्तथा तेनेदमावृतम् ॥ ३.३८ ॥|Just as the smoke surrounds and covers a fire, just as dust surrounds and covers a mirror, and just as the amnion covers the embryo, similarly. Gyan or knowledge is covered and surrounded by one’s desires. O Arjuna.

query: Kya Arjun ko kis cheez ne gyaan se dhokha diya?
document: आवृतं ज्ञानमेतेन ज्ञानिनो नित्यवैरिणा । कामरूपेण कौन्तेय दुष्पूरेणानलेन च ॥ ३.३९ ॥|The wise men, O Arjuna, have one constant enemy, namely, the unending fire of desire which covers the Gyan or Knowledge of the wise.

query: Arjun ko kya kaha gaya hai ki jo unki ichchha ko badhava deta hai aur unki aatma ko bhedbhav mein daalta hai?
document: इन्द्रियाणि मनो बुद्धिरस्याधिष्ठानमुच्यते । एतैर्विमोहयत्येष ज्ञानमावृत्य देहिनम् ॥ ३.४० ॥|The senses, mind, and one’s intellect are the home of desire O Arjuna. This covers Gyan and confuses the soul.

query: Arjun ko kya kaha tha ki unhein kya pehle karna chahiye?
document: तस्मात्त्वमिन्द्रियाण्यादौ नियम्य भरतर्षभ । पाप्मानं प्रजहि ह्येनं ज्ञानविज्ञाननाशनम् ॥ ३.४१ ॥|The Blessed Lord advised: Therefore, O Arjuna, restrain the senses first and control your sinful desires, the enemy of Gyan or knowledge.

query: Arjun ko kya kaha gaya hai ki unke man aur indriyon ke beech kya antar hai?
document: इन्द्रियाणि पराण्याहुरिन्द्रियेभ्यः परं मनः । मनसस्तु परा बुद्धिर्यो बुद्धेः परतस्तु सः ॥ ३.४२ ॥|O Arjuna, never understimate the senses for they are very powerful. The mind is stronger than the senses however, O Arjuna. The intellect is even stronger than one’s mind and the soul is still stronger than one’s intellect.

query: Arjun ko kya kaha gaya hai jo usse apne man ko vyaktigat ichchhaon se bachne ke liye kaha hai?
document: एवं बुद्धेः परं बुद्ध्वा संस्तभ्यात्मानमात्मना । जहि शत्रुं महाबाहो कामरूपं दुरासदम् ॥ ३.४३ ॥|Therefore, Oh Arjuna, knowing that your soul is stronger than your intellect, and being aware that the intellect controls the mind, destroy that invincible and dominating enemy known as desire.

query: Krishna ne kis prajapati ko yoga ka gyan sikha tha?
document: श्रीभगवानुवाच । इमं विवस्वते योगं प्रोक्तवानहमव्ययम् विवस्वान्मनवे प्राह मनुरिक्ष्वाकवेऽब्रवीत् ॥ ...|Lord Krishna continued: I taught this immortal, everlasting “Yoga faction” (Karmayoga) to the Sun God Vivaswan.Vivaswan taught this knowledge to his son Manu and Manu taught this knowledge to his son Ikswaku.

query: Krishna ne kya kaha hai ki yoga ka gyaan kaise gayab ho gaya?
document: एवं परम्पराप्राप्तमिमं राजर्षयो विदुः । स कालेनेह महता योगो नष्टः परन्तप ॥ ४.२ ॥|By handing down this knowledge of Yoga from generation to generation this knowledge slowly deteriorated, and finally disappeared.

query: Krishna kya Arjun ko kisliye yoga ka rahasya batata hai?
document: स एवायं मया तेऽद्य योगः प्रोक्तः पुरातनः । भक्तोऽसि मे सखा चेति रहस्यं ह्येतदुत्तमम् ॥ ४.३ ॥|O Arjuna, I reveal this ancient and most important secret of Yoga unto you because you are My dear devotee and friend.

query: Krishna ka janam kyu suna hua hai aur unhein purana rahasya kya sunaya?
document: अर्जुन उवाच । अपरं भवतो जन्म परं जन्म विवस्वतः कथमेतद्विजानीयां त्वमादौ प्रोक्तवानिति ॥ ४.४ ॥|Arjuna asked Lord Krishna: Dear Lord, your birth on earth is very recent. The Sun however, took birth an extremely long time ago. I find it difficult then to understand how you could have told this ancient secret to Vivaswan the Sun God.

query: Krishna kya kehta hai Arjun ko yeh yaad dilane ke liye?
document: श्रीभगवानुवाच । बहूनि मे व्यतीतानि जन्मानि तव चार्जुन तान्यहं वेद सर्वाणि न त्वं वेत्थ परन्तप ॥ ४....|The Lord looked upon Arjuna and replied: Arjuna, the answer to your question is simple. You are forgetting, O Son of Kunti, the both you and I have taken many births in this world together. However, only I, Lord, can remember this; you cannot.

query: Krishna ka janam aur mrityu kya hai?
document: अजोऽपि सन्नव्ययात्मा भूतानामीश्वरोऽपि सन् । प्रकृतिं स्वामधिष्ठाय संभवाम्यात्ममायया ॥ ४.६ ॥|O Arjuna, although birth and death do not exist for Me, since I am the immortal Lord, I appear on earth, by my Divine powers and ability, keeping My nature (Maya) under control.

query: Krishna kab aate hain jab buraai badh jaati hai?
document: यदा यदा हि धर्मस्य ग्लानिर्भवति भारत । अभ्युत्थानमधर्मस्य तदात्मानं सृजाम्यहम् ॥ ४.७ ॥|The Lord declared solemnly unto Arjuna: O Arjuna, whenever good is overcome by evil, or whenever evil manifests itself throughout the world in such a way that good no longer exists. I will always appear on earth.

query: Krishna ke kya teen mukhya uddeshya hain jisse ve prithvi par aate hain?
document:
परित्राणाय साधूनां विनाशाय च दुष्कृताम् । धर्मसंस्थापनार्थाय सम्भवामि युगे युगे ॥ ४.८ ॥|O Arjuna, I appear on earth from time to time for three main purposes. The first is for the protection and preservation of all that represents good, and of all those pure and saintly people on earth. The second purpose for which I appear on earth is for the destruction and removed and wrong-doers.
The third purpose is, of course, for the establishment and creation (or recreation) of Dharma (Righteousness or reinstating moral values among people on earth.)

query: Krishna kehte hain ki jo log apne kaam ko pavitra samjhte hain, unki janam mrityu se mukti hoti hai, unki kya sthiti hoti hai?
document: जन्म कर्म च मे दिव्यमेवं यो वेत्ति तत्त्वतः । त्यक्त्वा देहं पुनर्जन्म नैति मामेति सोऽर्जुन ॥ ४.९ ॥|O Arjuna, I was born divinely, all my action (Karma) are divine. The one who knows and understands this fully in reality, is not born again after leaving the body. He comes to me in Heaven for eternity.

query: Krishna ke paas kaise pahunch sakte hain?
document: वीतरागभयक्रोधा मन्मया मामुपाश्रिताः । बहवो ज्ञानतपसा पूता मद्भावमागताः ॥ ४.१० ॥|O Arjuna, if one really to seek refuge and be one with Me, he must totally free himself from passion, fear and anger, seek my protection only, and purify himself with the fire of Gyan (knowledge). If one manages to accomplish these thing, he will be able to become one with Me in mind and body.

query: Krishna ke prati kya gunon ka dhyan rakhte hain?
document: ये यथा मां प्रपद्यन्ते तांस्तथैव भजाम्यहम् । मम वर्त्मानुवर्तन्ते मनुष्याः पार्थ सर्वशः ॥ ४.११ ॥|O Arjuna, those people who love, trust and worship Me receive the same love, trust and worship from Me. All wise men follow Me in all respects. They follow my every path.

query: Kya karm ke liye koi apne lakshyon ko prapt karne ke liye karte hain?
document: काङ्क्षन्तः कर्मणां सिद्धिं यजन्त इह देवताः । क्षिप्रं हि मानुषे लोके सिद्धिर्भवति कर्मजा ॥ ४.१२ ॥|O Arjuna, those who do actions or Karma for the fulfillment of their desires and goals and those who worship deities (gods and god desses) for their prosperity, they will undobtedly achieve success quickly.

query: Kya gunon aur karma ke anusar chaturvarnya ka sthaapna kisne kiya hai?
document: चातुर्वर्ण्यं मया सृष्टं गुणकर्मविभागशः । तस्य कर्तारमपि मां विद्ध्यकर्तारमव्ययम् ॥ ४.१३ ॥|The fourfold-caste has been created by Me according to the differentiation of GUNA an d KARMA; though I am the author thereof know Me as non-doer and immutable.

query: Krishna kehte hain ki unhein koi kaam ka phal nahin pasand hai, to unke man mein kya hota hai?
document: न मां कर्माणि लिम्पन्ति न मे कर्मफले स्पृहा । इति मां योऽभिजानाति कर्मभिर्न स बध्यते ॥ ४.१४ ॥|The Lord continued: O Arjuna, since I, the immortal Lord, have no cravings for the fruits of action, I do not desire the reward of Karma. Therefore those who know me well are not affected or bound by Karma (action).

query: Arjun ko kya kaha gaya hai ki ve aaj bhi kya karein?
document: एवं ज्ञात्वा कृतं कर्म पूर्वैरपि मुमुक्षुभिः । कुरु कर्मैव तस्मात्त्वं पूर्वैः पूर्वतरं कृतम् ॥ ४.१...|The Lord continued:O Arjuna, ancient wise men who were searching for salvation in me, knew the facts well. However they even performed actions. Therefore O Arjuna, continue performing your actions doing your Karma as your ancestors once did in the past.

query: Krishna ne Arjun ko kya bataya?
document: किं कर्म किमकर्मेति कवयोऽप्यत्र मोहिताः । तत्ते कर्म प्रवक्ष्यामि यज्ज्ञात्वा मोक्ष्यसेऽशुभात् ॥ ४....|Even the wise men are confused about Karma (action) and Akarma (inaction). I shall now explain to you the truth about Karma. Knowing the truth, O Arjuna, you will be released from the bondage of Karma.

query: Krishna kehte hain ki kya hai jo karna chahiye aur kya hai jo nahin karna chahiye?
document: कर्मणो ह्यपि बोद्धव्यं बोद्धव्यं च विकर्मणः । अकर्मणश्च बोद्धव्यं गहना कर्मणो गतिः ॥ ४.१७ ॥|One should know the principle of Karma (action) Akarma (inaction) and forbidden Karma, (forbidden action). The philosophy behind Karma is very deep and mysterious. So listen closely.

query: Kya karma aur akarma ke beech kya antar hai?
document: कर्मण्यकर्म यः पश्येदकर्मणि च कर्म यः । स बुद्धिमान्मनुष्येषु स युक्तः कृत्स्नकर्मकृत् ॥ ४.१८ ॥|One who sees action (Karma) in inaction (Akarma), and inaction in action, is a wise man and a great sage. That man who has accomplished all actions is a Yogi.

query: Kya karm karte samay kisi ke liye ichcha nahi honi chahiye?
document: यस्य सर्वे समारम्भाः कामसंकल्पवर्जिताः । ज्ञानाग्निदग्धकर्माणं तमाहुः पण्डितं बुधाः ॥ ४.१९ ॥|One who does all Karma without desire or attachment for the fruits of his Karma and one whose actions are burnt up in the of Gyan or wisdom, is regarded by even the wise men as a sage.

query: Krishna keh rahe hain ki koi vyakti jo karya ke phal se alag rehkar, har karya mein khush aur santusht rehta hai, aur jo kisi par nirbhar nahin hota, vah kya karta hai?
document: त्यक्त्वा कर्मफलासङ्गं नित्यतृप्तो निराश्रयः । कर्मण्यभिप्रवृत्तोऽपि नैव किंचित्करोति सः ॥ ४.२० ॥|The Lord proclaimed: He who is totally unattached to the rewards of action, is forever happy and satisfied, who depends on nobody in this world, and is constantly involved in action, is really performing no action at all.

query: Kya koi vyakti jo apne shareer aur man ko jeet chuka hai, aur jisne duniya ki anand aur khushi ko chhod diya hai, apne shareer ko banaye rakhne ke liye hi kaam karta hai, usse paap ka samna nahin karna padta hai?
document: निराशीर्यतचित्तात्मा त्यक्तसर्वपरिग्रहः । शारीरं केवलं कर्म कुर्वन्नाप्नोति किल्बिषम् ॥ ४.२१ ॥|That person, O Arjuna, who has conquered his body and mind, who has given up all enjoyments and pleasures of the world, and who performs action only for the sake of maintaining his body, does not encounter or subiect himself to sin.

query: Kya jo vyakti apne paas ke liye santusht hai, aur uske paas koi anya cheezon ki ichchha nahin hai, aur koi shak nahin hai, aur jo usne apne jaloon ko door kar diya hai aur jeet aur haar dono mein ek-dusre se alag nahin hota hai, woh kya hota hai?
document: यदृच्छालाभसंतुष्टो द्वन्द्वातीतो विमत्सरः । समः सिद्धावसिद्धौ च कृत्वापि न निबध्यते ॥ ४.२२ ॥|A person who is content with what he has who has no feeling of desire for other things, or uncertainty of any type, who has shed his envious feelings and who is above all even-minded in success and failure, such a person is no longer bound by Karma even if he still performs Karma.

query: Krishna keh raha hai ki koi vyakti jo kisi bhi cheez se juda nahi hai, uska dil gyan prapt karne mein hai, jo uplabdh sab kuch karke bhi koi cheez nahi chahta, aur jo duniya se mukta hai, uske liye sab kuch kaam karna bekaar hai.
document: गतसङ्गस्य मुक्तस्य ज्ञानावस्थितचेतसः । यज्ञायाचरतः कर्म समग्रं प्रविलीयते ॥ ४.२३ ॥|Lord Krishna continued: A person who has no attachment to anything whatsoever in this world, whose heart is set on acquiring Gyan (wisdom), who works for the sake of sacrifice, and is a totally liberated person from the world, all actions for this person melt away and are meaningless.

query: Krishna keh raha hai ki yeh kya hai?
document: ब्रह्मार्पणं ब्रह्म हविर्ब्रह्माग्नौ ब्रह्मणा हुतम् । ब्रह्मैव तेन गन्तव्यं ब्रह्मकर्मसमाधिना ॥ ४.२...|The offerings in a sacrifice are Brahma (God), the sacrificial fire is Brahma (God), the one who performs the sacrifice is Brahma, the sacrifice itself is Brahma, the person performing the action of sacrifice is placed in Brahma and will reach Brahma, the ultimate goal of sacrifice.

query: Kya yah kaha gaya hai ki kuch yogi devon ki pooja karke tyaag karte hain?
document: दैवमेवापरे यज्ञं योगिनः पर्युपासते । ब्रह्माग्नावपरे यज्ञं यज्ञेनैवोपजुह्वति ॥ ४.२५ ॥|The Lord continued: Some Yogis prefer to perform sacrifice through the worship of deities (gods and god esses): other Yogis perform sacrifice to Brahma in the form of fire.

query: Kya yah kaha gaya hai ki kaise koi apne aap ko adhik shaktishali banata hai?
document: श्रोत्रादीनीन्द्रियाण्यन्ये संयमाग्निषु जुह्वति । शब्दादीन्विषयानन्य इन्द्रियाग्निषु जुह्वति ॥ ४.२६...|Some offer, in the fire of self-control, one of their senses such as their hearing. (This signifies that the signifies has no attachment to any of his senses.)Others offer sensual objects (objects of perception), such as sound, in the fire of controlled senses.Signifying that the sacrificer has the will-power and restraint not to let his senses be influenced by evil, sin, or sensual objects of destruction.

query: Kya yogi ke liye yoga mein gyan ka mahatva hai?
document: सर्वाणीन्द्रियकर्माणि प्राणकर्माणि चापरे । आत्मसंयमयोगाग्नौ जुह्वति ज्ञानदीपिते ॥ ४.२७ ॥|Some Yogis sacrifice all the functions of their senses ans all their vital functions of life, into the fire of Yoga, in the shape of self control, which is kindled by Gyan (wisdom). (This signifies the sacrificer’s one-mindedness with the Lord, the Supreme Goal).

query: Kya kuchh bhi karna hoga jo apne liye nuksaan kare aur anya ko labh de?
document: द्रव्ययज्ञास्तपोयज्ञा योगयज्ञास्तथापरे । स्वाध्यायज्ञानयज्ञाश्च यतयः संशितव्रताः ॥ ४.२८ ॥|Sacrifices come in many forms. Giving away material wealth for charity is a sacrifice. Austerity is a sacrifice. Yoga is a sacrifice. Making vows and promises involve sacrifice. Even self-study is a sacrifice.

query: Kya Pranayam se jeevan ki lambai badh sakti hai?
document: अपाने जुह्वति प्राणं प्राणेऽपानं तथापरे प्राणापानगती रुद्ध्वा प्राणायामपरायणाः अपरे नियताहाराः प्र...|Other Yogis (wise men) perform sacrifice by controlling the amount of breaths they take. By holding in their breath for a long periond of time whilepronouncing My name, they increase their life’s longevity. This act is known as PRANAYAM.Others perform sacrifice by controlling what they eat,(fasting). Those whose sins have been destroyed by sacrifice, understand the power and importance of sacrifice.

query: Kya Pranayam ke madhyam se hamaare jeevan ki lambai badh sakti hai?
document: सर्वेऽप्येते यज्ञविदो यज्ञक्षपितकल्मषाः । यज्ञशिष्टामृतभुजो यान्ति ब्रह्म सनातनम् ॥ ४.३० ॥|Other Yogis (wise men) perform sacrifice by controlling the amount of breaths they take. By holding in their breath for a long periond of time whilepronouncing My name, they increase their life’s longevity. This act is known as PRANAYAM.Others perform sacrifice by controlling what they eat,(fasting). Those whose sins have been destroyed by sacrifice, understand the power and importance of sacrifice.

query: Krishna keh rahe hain ki kya hai woh karya jo logon ko Brahma tak le jaata hai?
document: नायं लोकोऽस्त्ययज्ञस्य कुतोऽन्यः कुरुसत्तम ॥ ४.३१ ॥|O Arjuna, only those people who have sacrificed to achieve wisdom and knowledge of Gyan, go to Brahma, (the creator of all beings and God of Wisdom in the World). Without performing some sort of sacrifice in life, one cannot possibly remain happy in this world, not to mention the afterworl

query: Arjun ko kya kaha gaya hai ki kaise apne kaam se nirlepakta hoga?
document: एवं बहुविधा यज्ञा वितता ब्रह्मणो मुखे । कर्मजान्विद्धि तान्सर्वानेवं ज्ञात्वा विमोक्ष्यसे ॥ ४.३२ ॥|The Lord continued:O Arjuna, many sacrifices are mentioned extensively throughout the Vedas. All of these sacrifices involve some sort of action or Karma to be performed. With this knowledge in mind, you will achieve the state of unattached Karma, or action done without the expectation of any results.

query: Arjun ko kya kaha gaya hai ki gyaan ka tyaga kya hai?
document: श्रेयान्द्रव्यमयाद्यज्ञाज्ज्ञानयज्ञः परन्तप । सर्वं कर्माखिलं पार्थ ज्ञाने परिसमाप्यते ॥ ४.३३ ॥|O Arjuna, sacrifice of wisdom (Gyan) is always better than sacrifice of material objects because all actions end with Gyan.

query: Krishna ne Arjun ko kya seekhaya tha?
document: तद्विद्धि प्रणिपातेन परिप्रश्नेन सेवया । उपदेक्ष्यन्ति ते ज्ञानं ज्ञानिनस्तत्त्वदर्शिनः ॥ ४.३४ ॥|The Lord advised:O Arjuna, learn the principles of Gyan and ask questions about Gyan respectfully and with determination, from those who fully understand the principles of Gyan. Thay will explain “Gyan” to you. Knowing Gyan, you will never be in the confused state as you are in now.

query: Arjun ko kya kaha gaya hai ki gyaan se unhe kya dekhne ko milta hai?
document: यज्ज्ञात्वा न पुनर्मोहमेवं यास्यसि पाण्डव । येन भूतान्यशेषेण द्रक्ष्यस्यात्मन्यथो मयि ॥ ४.३५ ॥|The Lord continued:O Arjuna, through Gyan, you will see all beings within yourself, and thereafter, all beings in Me.

query: Arjun ko kya kaha gaya hai ki uske paapon ko kaise chhod sakte hain?
