document: अपि चेदसि पापेभ्यः सर्वेभ्यः पापकृत्तमः । सर्वं ज्ञानप्लवेनैव वृजिनं सन्तरिष्यसि ॥ ४.३६ ॥|O Arjuna, even if you are the greatest sinner in the world, this river of sins can be crossed with the boat of Gyan.

query: Kya Gyan ke aag se Karma ka kya hota hai?
document: यथैधांसि समिद्धोऽग्निर्भस्मसात्कुरुतेऽर्जुन । ज्ञानाग्निः सर्वकर्माणि भस्मसात्कुरुते तथा ॥ ४.३७ ॥|O Arjuna, as the burnig fire reduces fuel to ashes, in this same way, Karma (attached Karma binding a person to the material world), is burnt down with the fire of Gyan.

query: Arjun ko kya kaha gaya hai ki jisey puri karne mein koi bada shuddhikaran nahin hai?
document: न हि ज्ञानेन सदृशं पवित्रमिह विद्यते । तत्स्वयं योगसंसिद्धः कालेनात्मनि विन्दति ॥ ४.३८ ॥|In this world, O Arjuna, there is no greater purifier than Gyan or wisdom itself. The person who has mastered Yoga to perfection feels wisdom in his soul at the proper time.

query: Kaise hamaare mann ko shanti prapt karne ke liye pratham kadam uthana chahiye?
document: श्रद्धावाँल्लभते ज्ञानं तत्परः संयतेन्द्रियः । ज्ञानं लब्ध्वा परां शान्तिमचिरेणाधिगच्छति ॥ ४.३९ ॥|To abtain Gyan, one must conquer the senses, and develop a real devotion and faith towards the Lord. When one obtains Gyan, he has discovered the key to Supreme peace.

query: Kya kisi ke man mein shakhaayein hain to use kya prapt hota hai?
document: अज्ञश्चाश्रद्दधानश्च संशयात्मा विनश्यति । नायं लोकोऽस्ति न परो न सुखं संशयात्मनः ॥ ४.४० ॥|If a person is ignorant of the Knowledge of God, the person who lacks faith in God and the one who is full of doubts in his own self, will undoubtedly be destroyed. If one has doubts, he can never achieve peace and Bliss in the world, nor in the after-world.

query: Kya yog aur gyan ke madhyam se apne kaam se mukt hokar, atma-sakshatkar prapt karne wala vyakti kya hota hai?
document: योगसंन्यस्तकर्माणं ज्ञानसंछिन्नसंशयम् । आत्मवन्तं न कर्माणि निबध्नन्ति धनंजय ॥ ४.४१ ॥|One who has rid himself of attached Karma by practising Yoga and one who has rid himself of doubts by achieving Gyan, he is a self-realized person and is not bound by attached Karma.

query: Krishna ne Bharat ko kya kaha tha?
document: तस्मादज्ञानसम्भूतं हृत्स्थं ज्ञानासिनात्मनः । छित्त्वैनं संशयं योगमातिष्ठोत्तिष्ठ भारत ॥ ४.४२ ॥|Hence, be established in yoga by cutting the ignorance born doubt about the self with the sword of knowledge. Stand up, O Bharata.

query: Krishna kehte hain ki yoga aur sannyaas dono kya hain?
document: अर्जुन उवाच । संन्यासं कर्मणां कृष्ण पुनर्योगं च शंससि यच्छ्रेय एतयोरेकं तन्मे ब्रूहि सुनिश्चितम् ...|Arjuna asked the Great Lord: Dear Krishna, I am still confused. I have heard praise of Yoga as well as of Sannyaas (Holy Pilgrimage), from You. Which one of these two O Lord, is the best path for me?

query: Krishna kya kehta hai yoga aur sannyaas ke beech?
document: श्रीभगवानुवाच । संन्यासः कर्मयोगश्च निःश्रेयसकरावुभौ तयोस्तु कर्मसंन्यासात्कर्मयोगो विशिष्यते ॥ ५....|Oh Arjuna, both the paths of Yoga and Sannyaas lead one to supreme bliss and happiness. However, I shall always regard Yoga as the better path to the attainment of supreme peace and unity with Me, than the path of Sannyaas.

query: Kya ek sannyaasi ke liye koi vishay nahin hota jo uske liye samasya ban sakta hai?
document: ज्ञेयः स नित्यसंन्यासी यो न द्वेष्टि न काङ्क्षति । निर्द्वन्द्वो हि महाबाहो सुखं बन्धात्प्रमुच्यते ...|Oh Arjuna a true Sannyaasi is one who has no doubts about anything he does or encounters in his life; who has no enemies whatsoever, and above all, who is free from all desires (for material objects). If he has accomplished all these bondages of the world.

query: Kya Arjun ko Krishna ne yoga aur sannyaas ke beech kya kaha?
document: सांख्ययोगौ पृथग्बालाः प्रवदन्ति न पण्डिताः । एकमप्यास्थितः सम्यगुभयोर्विन्दते फलम् ॥ ५.४ ॥|Oh Arjuna, in essense, Yoga and Sannyaas are the same because both of these achieve the same goal. Those who consider Yoga and Sannyaas as two different paths leading to the achievement of two different goals, are ignorant.When one is fully absorbed and established in either one of Yoga or Sannyaas, he achieves the results of both of these sacred institutions.

query: Kya yoga aur sannyaas dono ke liye ek hi mukhya lakshya hai?
document: यत्सांख्यैः प्राप्यते स्थानं तद्योगैरपि गम्यते । एकं सांख्यं च योगं च यः पश्यति स: पश्यति ॥ ५.५ ॥|Yoga or Sannyaas (together known as Sankyoga) both attain the same goal for he who follows either of these paths. Only he who considers Yoga and Sannyaas as one, sees the ultimate Truth (the Lord).

query: Arjun ko kya karna chahiye jisse vah sannyaas prapt kar sake?
document: संन्यासस्तु महाबाहो दुःखमाप्तुमयोगतः । योगयुक्तो मुनिर्ब्रह्म नचिरेणाधिगच्छति ॥ ५.६ ॥|The Blessed Lord spoke in His Divine voice:O my dear Arjuna, in order for one to achieve Sannyaas, he must practise Karmyoga (doing Karma or actions without attachment or desire to see the results of those actions). If one is successful in performing Karmyoga (that is Karma without attachment to results), he shall realize God very quickly.

query: Kya karmyogi ka jeevan kis par aadharit hota hai?
document: योगयुक्तो विशुद्धात्मा विजितात्मा जितेन्द्रियः । सर्वभूतात्मभूतात्मा कुर्वन्नपि न लिप्यते ॥ ५.७ ॥|The Lord spoke onwards:The Karmyogi is a purified being who has conquered the self. He does not centre his life around himeself but around the achievement of being one with God.He detaches himeself from his senses, centering all his thoughts on God and achieving everlasting peace and happiness by breaking free of all material bondage to the world.

query: Kya yogi ka matlab hai?
document: नैव किंचित्करोमीति युक्तो मन्येत तत्त्ववित् । पश्यञ्श्रृण्वन्स्पृशञ्जिघ्रन्नश्नन्\u200cगच्छन्स्वपञ्...|He who comes to the realization that, although he is physically performing actions such as seeing, hearing, touching, smelling, eating, walking, sleeping, breathing, speaking, receiving, sacrificing, opening and closing eyes, and so on, that he is actually doing nothing, is a Yogi. O Arjuna, the truly wise Yogi knows that in reality, only the senses are acting among their sense objects.

query: Kya yogi kaun hota hai jo samajhta hai ki vah jis bhi kaam karta hai, vah asli mein kuch nahin karta?
document: प्रलपन्विसृजन्गृह्णन्नुन्मिषन्निमिषन्नपि । इन्द्रियाणीन्द्रियार्थेषु वर्तन्त इति धारयन् ॥ ५.९ ॥|He who comes to the realization that, although he is physically performing actions such as seeing, hearing, touching, smelling, eating, walking, sleeping, breathing, speaking, receiving, sacrificing, opening and closing eyes, and so on, that he is actually doing nothing, is a Yogi. O Arjuna, the truly wise Yogi knows that in reality, only the senses are acting among their sense objects.

query: Kya karm ka parinaam chhodkar karm karna kya hai?
document: ब्रह्मण्याधाय कर्माणि सङ्गं त्यक्त्वा करोति यः । लिप्यते न स पापेन पद्मपत्रमिवाम्भसा ॥ ५.१० ॥|The Lord declared: One who leaves all the results of his actions to God and performs Karma without attachment, is immune to all sins of the world in the same way as a lotus leaf remains unmoistened when placed in water.

query: Kya yogiyon ko apne mann, sharir, buddhi aur indriyon se judav kee bhavnaon ko mitane ke liye kya karna chahiye?
document: कायेन मनसा बुद्ध्या केवलैरिन्द्रियैरपि । योगिनः कर्म कुर्वन्ति सङ्गं त्यक्त्वात्मशुद्धये ॥ ५.११ ॥|O Arjuna, Yogis purify their souls by abolishing any feelings of attachment within themselves by performing Karma through mind, body, intellect, and senses.

query: Krishna kehte hain ki yogi ki kya bhavishya hota hai jo apne kaam ka phal aur parinaam Bhagwan ke haath mein chhod dete hain?
document: युक्तः कर्मफलं त्यक्त्वा शान्तिमाप्नोति नैष्ठिकीम् । अयुक्तः कामकारेण फले सक्तो निबध्यते ॥ ५.१२ ॥|When a Yogi has reached a state of true self-realization by leaving all fruits and results of Karma in the hands of the Lord, he achieves true peace and happiness.However, he who does Karma (actions) for a selfish motive and for the attainment of fruits of his actions, never becomes free of the bondages of desire for material pleasures.

query: Kya yehi hai jeevan mein nirlepata ki shakti?
document: सर्वकर्माणि मनसा संन्यस्यास्ते सुखं वशी । नवद्वारे पुरे देही नैव कुर्वन्न कारयन् ॥ ५.१३ ॥|A person, having self-control, and mentally freeing himself of all actions (by the uninterest in results of actions), in really performs no actions whatsoever. By mentally detaching himself of all Karma, a man may live in true bliss and peace in his body of nine openings.

query: Kya Bhagwan kahte hain ki ve karm ka karne wala, karm ya karm ka parinaam banate hain?
document: न कर्तृत्वं न कर्माणि लोकस्य सृजति प्रभुः । न कर्मफलसंयोगं स्वभावस्तु प्रवर्तते ॥ ५.१४ ॥|The Lord does not create the performance of actions (or Karma ), nor Karma itself, nor even the result of Karma. It is simply all due to nature performing its function in the world.(However, nature derives its motivation power from God.)

query: Krishna kya kehta hai ki unke aaspaas ke logon ki karmayen un par kaise prabhav karti hain?
document: नादत्ते कस्यचित्पापं न चैव सुकृतं विभुः । अज्ञानेनावृतं ज्ञानं तेन मुह्यन्ति जन्तवः ॥ ५.१५ ॥|I, the all pervading Lord receives neither the good nor the bad Karma of anyone. People are from time to time deluded because their Knowledge (Gyan) is Covered up or blinded by ignorance (Agyan).

query: Krishna keh raha hai ki logon ne apne aap ko jaanne ke liye kaam kiya hai, to unhe aagyaan se mukti mil gayi hai.
document: ज्ञानेन तु तदज्ञानं येषां नाशितमात्मनः । तेषामादित्यवज्ज्ञानं प्रकाशयति तत्परम् ॥ ५.१६ ॥|The Lord continued: People’s achievement of knowledge of their SELF has allowed them to destroy their ignorance or remove their lack of knowledge (Agyan). They soon find that the knowledge they acquire radiates the light of God within them.

query: Kya koi vishay hai jiska dhyan rakhne se moksh aur shanti prapt hoti hai?
document: तद्बुद्धयस्तदात्मानस्तन्निष्ठास्तत्परायणा: | गच्छन्त्यपुनरावृत्तिं ज्ञाननिर्धूतकल्मषा:॥ ५.१७...|The Lord spoke: O Arjuna, total liberation and everlasting peace is achieved only by those whose mind and intellect constantly dwells on God and who have destroyed all sin by achieving Gyan (Knowledge)

query: Kya Bhagwan Krishna ne Arjun ko kya seekh di thi?
document: विद्याविनयसंपन्ने ब्राह्मणे गवि हस्तिनि । शुनि चैव श्वपाके च पण्डिताः समदर्शिनः ॥ ५.१८ ॥|The wise men treat everybody as equals O Arjuna, whether it be a learned and cultured Brahman, a cow, an elephant, or a dog and an outcaste. He not differentiate between anybody.

query: Krishna kehne mein aaya hai ki jo log sabhi ko ek saman dikhate hain, unhein kya milta hai?
document: इहैव तैर्जितः सर्गो येषां साम्ये स्थितं मनः । निर्दोषं हि समं ब्रह्म तस्माद्ब्रह्मणि ते स्थिताः ॥ ५...|O Arjuna, those who are even-minded and treat everybody as equals in all respects, have reached the ultimate goal of life and have conquered the whole world because God is perfect, without defect, and makes no distinction also. Therefore, they are,in reality, one with God.

query: Krishna kehte hain ki kya hota hai jab koi vyakti khushi ya dukh se parat nahi hota?
document: न प्रहृष्येत्प्रियं प्राप्य नोद्विजेत्प्राप्य चाप्रियम् । स्थिरबुद्धिरसंमूढो ब्रह्मविद्ब्रह्मणि स्थ...|One truly becomes established in God when neither good circumstances make him happy, no bad Circumstance make him miserable. When a person reaches this type of balance in intellect and emotion, without a single doubt, with true knowledge of God, becomes eternally fixed in Him.

query: Kya yogi ko apne andar hi shanti mil jaati hai?
document: बाह्यस्पर्शेष्वसक्तात्मा विन्दत्यात्मनि यत् सुखम् । स ब्रह्मयोगयुक्तात्मा सुखमक्षयमश्नुते ॥ ५.२१ ॥|O Arjuna, a person who has totally detached himself from the material world and is happy and satisfied within his own self, attains eternal peace. When a person is truly established in the Yoga of God (service, devotion and prayers to Him), he experiences true, eternal bliss without a doubt, O Arjuna.

query: Kya kuchh aisi cheezen hain jo aapke man ko shikhar par le jaati hain lekin aakhir mein dukh hi deta hain?
document: ये हि संस्पर्शजा भोगा दुःखयोनय एव ते । आद्यन्तवन्तः कौन्तेय न तेषु रमते बुधः ॥ ५.२२ ॥|When one’s senses make contact with sensual, material goods, Arjuna, these desire-evoking objects are the cause of misery (these objects may appear enjoyable to material pleasure-seekers).These enjoyments are temporary, having a beginning and an end. When one develops a habitual desire for these artificial enjoyments. O Arjuna, he falls into deep misery and irrational behaviour as soon as these pleasures have disappeared from him.

query: Kya yogi ko moksha prapt karne ke liye kya karna padta hai?
document: शक्नोतीहैव यः सोढुं प्राक्शरीरविमोक्षणात् । कामक्रोधोद्भवं वेगं स युक्तः स सुखी नरः ॥ ५.२३ ॥|One who is truly happy, peaceful and enlightened with his Soul, that wise man (Yogi) has combined with the supreme Soul (God) as one and attains freedom from all bondages to the world.

query: Krishna kehne mein kya hai ki yogi ka kya hota hai jo apne atma ke saath Paramatma ke sath ek ho jaata hai?
document: योऽन्तःसुखोऽन्तरारामस्तथान्तर्ज्योतिरेव यः । स योगी ब्रह्मनिर्वाणं ब्रह्मभूतोऽधिगच्छति ॥ ५.२४ ॥|One who is truly happy, peaceful and enlightened with his Soul, that wise man (Yogi) has combined with the supreme Soul (God) as one and attains freedom from all bondages to the world.

query: Kya un logon ko moksha prapt hota hai jo apne paapon ko mitaate hain aur anya jeevon ki kalyan mein lagte hain?
document: लभन्ते ब्रह्मनिर्वाणमृषयः क्षीणकल्मषाः । छिन्नद्वैधा यतात्मानः सर्वभूतहिते रताः ॥ ५.२५ ॥|Those wise men or sages who have abolished and destroyed all their sins with the achievement of true Gyan (Knowledge), and who have devoted themselves to the welfare of other beings, attain supreme and eternal peace.

query: Kya yogi ke liye swarg ki prapti ka mool mantra kya hai?
document: कामक्रोधवियुक्तानां यतीनां यतचेतसाम् । अभितो ब्रह्मनिर्वाणं वर्तते विदितात्मनाम् ॥ ५.२६ ॥|O Arjuna, all of those wise men (Yogis) who have learned to control their minds, have learned to conquer and abolish all of the desires and anger within them, and have truly realized God, attain freedom and liberation from worldly ties in all respects.

query: Kya yehi hai jo moksh prapt karne ke liye avashyak hai?
document: स्पर्शान्कृत्वा बहिर्बाह्यांश्चक्षुश्चैवान्तरे भ्रुवोः । प्राणापानौ समौ कृत्वा नासाभ्यन्तरचारिणौ ॥ ...|A person who has totally detached himself from sense objects that give temporary pleasure and enjoyment, he who has learned to control and equalize the number of breaths going outwards and inwards through the nostrils, he who has brought his senses, mind and intellect under full control, and he who is desire less fearless and without anger, is always a free and liberated wise man.

query: Kya ek vyakti jiska man aur indriya khatam hai aur jo apne mann ko sthir rakhta hai, usey moksh prapt hota hai?
document: यतेन्द्रियमनोबुद्धिर्मुनिर्मोक्षपरायणः । विगतेच्छाभयक्रोधो यः सदा मुक्त एव सः ॥ ५.२८ ॥|A person who has totally detached himself from sense objects that give temporary pleasure and enjoyment, he who has learned to control and equalize the number of breaths going outwards and inwards through the nostrils, he who has brought his senses, mind and intellect under full control, and he who is desire less fearless and without anger, is always a free and liberated wise man.

query: Krishna ke paas kya kaha jata hai jo logon ko shanti pradaan karta hai?
document: भोक्तारं यज्ञतपसां सर्वलोकमहेश्वरम् । सुहृदं सर्वभूतानां ज्ञात्वा मां शान्तिमृच्छति ॥ ५.२९ ॥|The Lord declared:O Arjuna, he who shall consider ME the enjoyer of sacrifices and all that is internally pure, and who is devoted to ME, the God of all worlds and well-wisher of all beings, attains true, everlasting peace.

query: Krishna kehte hain ki koi vyakti kya hota hai jo kuchh kaam karta hai lekin usse koi faida nahin chaahta?
document: श्रीभगवानुवाच । अनाश्रितः कर्मफलं कार्यं कर्म करोति यः स संन्यासी च योगी च न निरग्निर्न चाक्रियः ॥...|Lord Krishna continued: A Sannyaasi is one who performs action or duty (Karma) without desiring any reward or other results for his actions. One cannot be a Sannyaasi or a Yogi by simply not petorming Karma.

query: Krishna ne Arjun ko kya kaha ki Sannyaas aur Yoga ek hi hai?
document: यं संन्यासमिति प्राहुर्योगं तं विद्धि पाण्डव । न ह्यसंन्यस्तसंकल्पो योगी भवति कश्चन ॥ ६.२ ॥|O Arjuna, consider Sannyaas and Yoga as one and the same; just as one becomes a Sannyassi by giving up all desires, similarly to be a Yogi one must do the same.

query: Arjun ko kya karna chahiye jinhone yoga mein apni divyaata ko sthapit karne ka ichchha hai?
document: आरुरुक्षोर्मुनेर्योगं कर्म कारणमुच्यते । योगारूढस्य तस्यैव शमः कारणमुच्यते ॥ ६.३ ॥|For one who wishes to establish himself in the divinity of Yoga. O Arjuna, he must follow the method of doing Karma without desires of any sort. For, giving up all worldly thoughts is the path that will lead you to being fully and truly established in Yoga, Dear Arjuna.

query: Kya yoga mein sthapit hone ke liye koi vishesh sambandh ya ichchhaon kee aavashyakata hoti hai?
document: यदा हि नेन्द्रियार्थेषु न कर्मस्वनुषज्जते । सर्वसंकल्पसंन्यासी योगारूढस्तदोच्यते ॥ ६.४ ॥|When one is no longer attached to sensual objects or to the Karma that he does, and when he has totally rid himself of all desires, at that time, a person is considered to be fully and undoubtedly established in Yoga.

query: Kya Arjun ko apne kaam mein safalta ya asafalta ka shikaar hone par kya karna chahiye?
document: उद्धरेदात्मनात्मानं नात्मानमवसादयेत् । आत्मैव ह्यात्मनो बन्धुरात्मैव रिपुरात्मनः ॥ ६.५ ॥|Dear Arjuna, one should lift himself through his own efforts. He success or failure in performing his Karma should be the result of his own doing. Should a man fail, he should not degrade himself, O Arjuna, for he is his own true friend as well as his own true enemy.

query: Arjun ko kya Krishna ne kaha ki apne man, sharir aur indriyon ka kya sthiti hai?
document: बन्धुरात्मात्मनस्तस्य येनात्मैवात्मना जितः । अनात्मनस्तु शत्रुत्वे वर्तेतात्मैव शत्रुवत् ॥ ६.६ ॥|The true self (soul) is only its own friend if it is free from attachment and in control of its own mind, body and senses. However, dear Arjuna, if one’s soul is not in control of mind body and senses, then the soul is its own enemy.

query: Kya aise vyakti ke liye koi vishesh sthiti hoti hai jo apne aap ke saath shanti aur samriddhi ka anubhav karte hain?
document: जितात्मनः प्रशान्तस्य परमात्मा समाहितः । शीतोष्णसुखदुःखेषु तथा मानापमानयोः ॥ ६.७ ॥|One who has truly achieved peace with the self and a balance in cold and heat, joy and sorrow, respect and disrespect, has a purified and liberated soul, God dwells in souls such as these and the soul thereby, becomes truly divine.

query: Kya yehi hai yogi ka mukhya lakshya?
document: ज्ञानविज्ञानतृप्तात्मा कूटस्थो विजितेन्द्रियः । युक्त इत्युच्यते योगी समलोष्टाश्मकाञ्चनः ॥ ६.८ ॥|he Lord explained: When one’s mind is at peace and fully contented with the Gyan (Knowledge or wisdom) it has acquired, one whose mind is constantly stable and fixed in God, who has controlled his senses well and considers dirt, stone and gold as one, is said to have achieved unity with God. He is the perfect Yogi, O Arjuna.

query: Kya ek vyakti ko apne pyar, doston, dushman, nishpaksh, madadgar, dushmani karne wale, parivar, sadhu aur papaon ke saath ek hi vyavhaar karna chahiye?
document: सुहृन्मित्रार्युदासीनमध्यस्थद्वेष्यबन्धुषु । साधुष्वपि च पापेषु समबुद्धिर्विशिष्यते ॥ ६.९ ॥|One who thinks about and behaves with dear ones, friends, enemies, neutral ones, mediators malicious people, relatives, saints and sinful people, in the same manner, is truly a superior person.

query: Kya Arjun ko Krishna ne demoniac logon ke gunon ke bare mein bataya?
document: योगी युञ्जीत सततमात्मानं रहसि स्थितः । एकाकी यतचित्तात्मा निराशीरपरिग्रहः ॥ ६.१० ॥|Harboring insatiable lust, full of hypocrisy, pride and arrogance, the demoniac cling to their false tenets. Thus illusioned, they are attracted to the impermanent and work with impure resolve.

query: Kaise yogi apne dhyan ke liye ek sahi jagah ka chayan karta hai?
document: शुचौ देशे प्रतिष्ठाप्य स्थिरमासनमात्मनः । नात्युच्छ्रितं नातिनीचं चैलाजिनकुशोत्तरम् ॥ ६.११ ॥|For proper meditation, the Yogi should seek a clear spot, covered with grass, deer skin and/or clothing, which is neither very high nor very low, to seat himself.

query: Kya yoga karke man aur atma ko shuddh karne ke liye kya karna chahiye?
document: तत्रैकाग्रं मनः कृत्वा यतचित्तेन्द्रियक्रियः । उपविश्यासने युञ्ज्याद्योगमात्मविशुद्धये ॥ ६.१२ ॥|He should then practice Yoga for the purpose of purifying his mind and soul, focusing his thoughts on one point (God) at all times, and fully controlling the function of mind and senses.

query: Krishna ne Arjun ko kya seekhaya hai meditation ke samay sharir ko kaise sthir rakhna hai?
document: समं कायशिरोग्रीवं धारयन्नचलं स्थिरः । सम्प्रेक्ष्य नासिकाग्रं स्वं दिशश्चानवलोकयन् ॥ ६.१३ ॥|The Lord instructed Arjuna:While meditating one must keep the head, neck and torso (upper body) as straight and as steady as possible, without even a slight movement.firmly looking at the tip of the nose and looking in no other direction whatsoever.

query: Kya achanak karya ka phal kaise hota hai?
document: प्रशान्तात्मा विगतभीर्ब्रह्मचारिव्रते स्थितः । मनः संयम्य मच्चित्तो युक्त आसीत मत्परः ॥ ६.१४ ॥|It is said the fruit of actions performed in the mode of goodness bestow pure results. Actions done in the mode of passion result in pain, while those performed in the mode of ignorance result in darkness.

query: Kya yogi ko shanti aur anand prapt karne ke liye kya karna chahiye?
document: युञ्जन्नेवं सदात्मानं योगी नियतमानसः । शान्तिं निर्वाणपरमां मत्संस्थामधिगच्छति ॥ ६.१५ ॥|In this way, the true, self-controlled Yogi. Will inevitably attain eternal peace and be in the highest state of bliss by fixing his mind on Me during (proper) meditation.

query: Yoga mein kya ho sakta hai jo yogi ko kathinai mein padhne se bachata hai?
document: नात्यश्नतस्तु योगोऽस्ति न चैकान्तमनश्नतः । न चाति स्वप्नशीलस्य जाग्रतो नैव चार्जुन ॥ ६.१६ ॥|There must be a constant balance in everything a Yogi does. Eating too much or eating very little, sleeping too much or sleeping very little, for example, are not methods of succeeding in this Yoga.

query: Kya yog mein safalta prapt karne ke liye apne jeevan mein kya mahatvapurn baat hai?
document: युक्ताहारविहारस्य युक्तचेष्टस्य कर्मसु । युक्तस्वप्नावबोधस्य योगो भवति दुःखहा ॥ ६.१७ ॥|O Arjuna, only those people who eat, live, work and sleep moderately, and destroy all misery, succeed in this Yoga.

query: Kya yoga mein sthir rahne ke liye kya jarurat hai?
document: यदा विनियतं चित्तमात्मन्येवावतिष्ठते । निःस्पृहः सर्वकामेभ्यो युक्त इत्युच्यते तदा ॥ ६.१८ ॥|When one has freed himself of all desires, he will then always be firmly established in Yoga. When one has full control of his mind, he will be fully established in God.

query: Arjun ne kya kaha hai yadi manushya ka manushya ke aas-paas ke vastuon se prabhavit nahin hota hai?
document: यथा दीपो निवातस्थो नेङ्गते सोपमा स्मृता । योगिनो यतचित्तस्य युञ्जतो योगमात्मनः ॥ ६.१९ ॥|The Almighty explained: Just as the flame of a lamp does not flicker in a place without wind, in the same way the controlled mind of the Yogi does not get distracted by worldly objects or pleasures.

query: Yoga se man kaise shanti aur shant aur milta hai?
document: यत्रोपरमते चित्तं निरुद्धं योगसेवया । यत्र चैवात्मनात्मानं पश्यन्नात्मनि तुष्यति ॥ ६.२० ॥|By the practice of Yoga, one’s mind becomes peaceful and calm and the mind that has truly realized God through meditation attains spiritual happiness, enjoyment and bliss only in God.

query: Yogi ko kya milta hai jo sadhu manushyon ko nahin samajh aata?
document: सुखमात्यन्तिकं यत्तद् बुद्धिग्राह्यमतीन्द्रियम् । वेत्ति यत्र न चैवायं स्थितश्चलति तत्त्वतः ॥ ६.२१ ...|O Arjuna, the limitless and everlasting joy and bliss that a true Yogi feels cannot be perceived by the ordinary senses, but can only be felt by a person who has a subtle, keen and clever intellect. When this Yogi has discovered this true happiness, he will never stray or move away from the Truth, Arjuna.

query: Arjun ko kya kaha hai jo yogi ko is avastha mein le aata hai?
document: यं लब्ध्वा चापरं लाभं मन्यते नाधिकं ततः । यस्मिन्स्थितो न दुःखेन गुरुणापि विचाल्यते ॥ ६.२२ ॥|Having achieved this divine state of bliss, Dear Arjuna, the Yogi realizes that no other state or condition could be greater, thus even the most intense pains will never lead the Yogi astray from Truth or devotion to Me, the Supreme Soul.

query: Kya yoga se humare jeevan mein kya faayda hota hai?
document: तं विद्याद्\u200cदुःखसंयोगवियोगं योगसंज्ञितम् ॥ ६.२३ ॥|Yoga is the means to liberate (free) one from all miseries of the world. Yoga should always be practical with a fixed mind and determination.

query: Kya yogi ke liye man ko kaise shanti mein laana chahiye?
document: स निश्चयेन योक्तव्यो योगोऽनिर्विण्णचेतसा । संकल्पप्रभवान्कामांस्त्यक्त्वा सर्वानशेषतः मनसैवेन्द्रि...|Once one has completely given up all desires created from his imagination and once one has learned to mentally control all of his senses, one slowly and gradually becomes peaceful. A true Yogi with a steady intellect fixes his mind only on God and thinks of nothing else but the Lord.

query: Kya yogi ke liye shanti prapt karne ke liye kya karna chahiye?
document: शनैः शनैरुपरमेद्\u200cबुद्ध्या धृतिगृहीतया । आत्मसंस्थं मनः कृत्वा न किंचिदपि चिन्तयेत् ॥ ६.२५ ॥|Once one has completely given up all desires created from his imagination and once one has learned to mentally control all of his senses, one slowly and gradually becomes peaceful. A true Yogi with a steady intellect fixes his mind only on God and thinks of nothing else but the Lord.

query: Kya Krishna ne Arjun ko man ko sthir karna aur Ishwar mein jodna kya kehna hai?
document: यतो यतो निश्चरति मनश्चञ्चलमस्थिरम् । ततस्ततो नियम्यैतदात्मन्येव वशं नयेत् ॥ ६.२६ ॥|The unsteady, wandering and constantly distracted mind should always be controlled and fixed in God.

query: Krishna kaun hain jo yogi hote hain aur unki aatma ek shanti se bhari hoti hai?
document: प्रशान्तमनसं ह्येनं योगिनं सुखमुत्तमम् । उपैति शान्तरजसं ब्रह्मभूतमकल्मषम् ॥ ६.२७ ॥|Lord Krishna explained:The true Yogi has a peaceful mind, is free from sin and all evils of the world, becomes and eternal bliss.

query: Kya yeh yogi ka sthiti hai jiska koi papa nahin hai aur vah sabse badi khushi aur sukoon ka anubhav karta hai?
document: युञ्जन्नेवं सदात्मानं योगी विगतकल्मषः । सुखेन ब्रह्मसंस्पर्शमत्यन्तं सुखमश्नुते ॥ ६.२८ ॥|The sinless Yogi is constantly engaged in Yoga, and experiences no difficulty in achieving the greatest bliss and happiness of all, O Arjuna. That is, uniting and being one with Me, the Lord.

query: Krishna kehne mein kya hai ki yog karte samay koi vyakti kisey bhi vyakti ko apne aaspaas se alag nahin samajhta hai?
document: सर्वभूतस्थमात्मानं सर्वभूतानि चात्मनि । ईक्षते योगयुक्तात्मा सर्वत्र समदर्शनः ॥ ६.२९ ॥|he wiseman who is forever engaged in performing Yoga, never discriminates against anybody because he sees his own self in all beings, and all beings within his own self.

query: Arjun ko kya kaha gaya hai ki jo log mujhe har jagah dekhte hain unhe kya dekhne mein aata hai?
document: यो मां पश्यति सर्वत्र सर्वं च मयि पश्यति । तस्याहं न प्रणश्यामि स च मे न प्रणश्यति ॥ ६.३० ॥|The Lord explained: O Arjuna, he who truly sees Me everywhere he looks, sees me in everything. I am always there within his sight and he is also always within my sight.

query: Kya Bhagwan ka darshan karne ke liye manushya ko kya mahatvapurn guna honi chahiye?
document: सर्वभूतस्थितं यो मां भजत्येकत्वमास्थितः । सर्वथा वर्तमानोऽपि स योगी मयि वर्तते ॥ ६.३१ ॥|The Lord proclaimed: O Arjuna, I am present in all beings. He who worships me with a steady, peaceful and undistracted mind, is a true Yogi and he dwells within Me in My heart always.

query: Kya yogi ko sabhi jeevon ko apne aap ke samaan dikhne ka kya mahatva hai?
document: आत्मौपम्येन सर्वत्र समं पश्यति योऽर्जुन । सुखं वा यदि वा दुःखं स योगी परमो मतः ॥ ६.३२ ॥|Dear Arjuna, the Yogi who looks upon all beings as his own self, treats all beings equally, and considers happiness and misery as the same, is truly a great being himself.

query: Arjun ne Shri Krishna se puchha: Mind ko shant karne ke liye yoga kaun hai?
document: अर्जुन उवाच । योऽयं योगस्त्वया प्रोक्तः साम्येन मधुसूदन एतस्याहं न पश्यामि चञ्चलत्वात्स्थितिं स्थि...|Arjuna asked Shri Krishna: Dear Lord, I simply cannot regard the Yoga of even-mindedness as a firm and stable exercise because of the instability of the mind itself.

query: Krishna kehne mein aapne man ko kya kaha hai?
document: चञ्चलं हि मनः कृष्ण प्रमाथि बलवद्\u200cदृढम् । तस्याहं निग्रहं मन्ये वायोरिव सुदुष्करम् ॥ ६.३४ ॥|Dear Krishna, the mind is truly very unstable, forceful and strong. It is just as difficult to control as the flow of the wind.

query: Kaise man ko sthirta mein laaya ja sakta hai?
document: श्रीभगवानुवाच । असंशयं महाबाहो मनो दुर्निग्रहं चलम् अभ्यासेन तु कौन्तेय वैराग्येण च गृह्यते ॥ ६.३५...|Lord Krishna divinely replied: Dear Arjuna, undoubtedly, the mind, as you say, is difficult to control, yet with paractice, determination and detachment, it can be controlled.

query: Krishna keh rahe hain ki man ko kaise shant karna hai?
document: असंयतात्मना योगो दुष्प्राप इति मे मतिः । वश्यात्मना तु यतता शक्योऽवाप्तुमुपायतः ॥ ६.३६ ॥|Lord Krishna continued: In my opinion, O Arjuna, without a controlled mind, it is difficult for one to attain Yoga (attaining God). However, with a reasonable effort, the Yoga of even-mindedness (path to achieving the Lord) can be achieved by a person who has learned to control his senses.

query: Krishna kehne mein aapko kya hai, jab koi yogi apne man ko yog ki raah se bhool jaata hai?
document: अर्जुन उवाच । अयतिः श्रद्धयोपेतो योगाच्चलितमानसः अप्राप्य योगसंसिद्धिं कां गतिं कृष्ण गच्छति ॥ ६.३...|Arjuna asked the Lord: Dear Lord Krishna, what becomes of a man who has a firm belief in Yoga and has set foot on the path of Yoga, but allows his mind to deviate or stray from this path which leads to perfection?

query: Krishna keh rahe hain ki agar koi vyakti is yog marg par aage nahin badh sakta hai, toh uska kya hoga?
document: कच्चिन्नोभयविभ्रष्टश्छिन्नाभ्रमिव नश्यति । अप्रतिष्ठो महाबाहो विमूढो ब्रह्मणः पथि ॥ ६.३८ ॥|Arjuna continued: What happens to a man who can no longer continue on this path leading to the attainment of God (Yoga)? Is he destroyed and does he lose both worlds of Yoga (God-realization) and that of worldly enjoyment just as the clouds are scattered by the winds?

query: Kripa karo, kis shloka mein Krishna ji ne apne aap ko sabhi shankaon ko door karne ke liye kaha hai?
document: एतन्मे संशयं कृष्ण छेत्तुमर्हस्यशेषतः । त्वदन्यः संशयस्यास्य छेत्ता न ह्युपपद्यते ॥ ६.३९ ॥|Lord Krishna, this is one of the doubts I have in my mind. You can remove it entirely. If anybody can remove all my doubts Krishna, it is You, and only You. Nobody else can clear My doubts completely.

query: Krishna keh rahe hain ki yogi ko kya hota hai?
document: श्रीभगवानुवाच । पार्थ नैवेह नामुत्र विनाशस्तस्य विद्यते न हि कल्याणकृत्कश्चिद्\u200cदुर्गतिं तात ग...|Lord Krishna replied: Dear Arjuna, the answer to your question is quite simple. A person who strives for God-realization (Yoga) never suffers deterioration or destruction. He is never destroyed in this world or in the other world regardless of whether he realizes Me fully or not.

query: Kya yogi ki galti se mukti kaise prapt hoti hai?
document: प्राप्य पुण्यकृतां लोकानुषित्वा शाश्वतीः समाः । शुचीनां श्रीमतां गेहे योगभ्रष्टोऽभिजायते ॥ ६.४१ ॥|The unsuccessful person in Yoga, Dear Arjuna, achieves an abode or home in heaven, the place of pious, pure. He stays there for a long time and after a while, takes birth in the house of noble people of good conduct.

query: Kya yogi parivaar mein janm lena kaisa hota hai?
document: अथवा योगिनामेव कुले भवति धीमताम् । एतद्धि दुर्लभतरं लोके जन्म यदीदृशम् ॥ ६.४२ ॥|Dear Arjuna, if he does not take birth in a noble family of good conduct, then he will be born into a family of wise yogis.Such a birth in the world is difficult to find and can only be achieved if your actions are pious, good-natured and unsinful.

query: Krishna kehne mein kya hai ki jab koi vyakti apne aage ki janm lete hain toh unhein unke purane janm ke puny karmaon se prapt gyaan milta hai?
document: तत्र तं बुद्धिसंयोगं लभते पौर्वदेहिकम् । यतते च ततो भूयः संसिद्धौ कुरुनन्दन ॥ ६.४३ ॥|When a man takes birth in his next life, he attains the wisdom he had achieved from the pious actions he performed in the pious actions of his past life, he tries harder once more to achieve true eternal peace and happiness in God through Yoga.

query: Kya yog se kisi ke man mein bhagwan ke prati ruchi kaise utpann hoti hai?
document: पूर्वाभ्यासेन तेनैव ह्रियते ह्यवशोऽपि सः । जिज्ञासुरपि योगस्य शब्दब्रह्मातिवर्तते ॥ ६.४४ ॥|As a result of the religious practices of his past life, he remains free of attachments and is attracted towards God by constantly practising Yoga although he may be under bad and unfavourable influences.

query: Yoga se kya prapt hota hai?
document: प्रयत्नाद्यतमानस्तु योगी संशुद्धकिल्बिषः । अनेकजन्मसंसिद्धस्ततो याति परां गतिम् ॥ ६.४५ ॥|After practicing Yoga during many births, there by destroying all sins and totally purifying the Self, the Yoga attains the supreme state, i.e. Salvation (total liberation from the world).

query: Krishna kya kehte hain yogi se bade kis logon ko manaate hain?
document: तपस्विभ्योऽधिको योगी ज्ञानिभ्योऽपि मतोऽधिकः । कर्मिभ्यश्चाधिको योगी तस्माद्योगी भवार्जुन ॥ ६.४६ ॥|Lord Krishna stated: O Arjuna, the Yogi is superior to all those who perform religious sacrifices and superior to those who read holy scriptures and, of course, to those who perform attached Karma. Therefore, Arjuna, you should strive to be a Yogi.

query: Kis prakaar ka yogi sabse uttam yogi mana jata hai?
document: योगिनामपि सर्वेषां मद्गतेनान्तरात्मना । श्रद्धावान् भजते यो मां स मे युक्ततमो मतः ॥ ६.४७ ॥|Of all the Yogis, the one who has complete faith in Me, whose mind is attached to Me only, and who continually worships Me, is absolutely the superior among all Yogis.

query: Krishna ne Arjun ko kya kehkar unki samajh badhayi?
document: श्रीभगवानुवाच । मय्यासक्तमनाः पार्थ योगं युञ्जन्मदाश्रयः असंशयं समग्रं मां यथा ज्ञास्यसि तच्छृणु ॥...|Lord Krishna further explained: Dear Arjuna, with your mind fully absorbed in thoughts of Me and in the practice of Yoga as well, with total reliance on Me alone, listen to the secret of how to really know Me in entirety.

query: Krishna keh raha hai ki jis jaankari ko main aapko de raha hoon, usse paane ke baad aapko doosri jaankari ka koi mahatva nahin rahega.
document: ज्ञानं तेऽहं सविज्ञानमिदं वक्ष्याम्यशेषतः । यज्ज्ञात्वा नेह भूयोऽन्यज्ज्ञातव्यमवशिष्यते ॥ ७.२ ॥|After I divulge this secret to you, the knowledge you will have attained from this secret of the Supreme (God) will make all other knowledge seem worthless for you, O Arjuna.

query: Kya kuchh logon ko mere sachchay ko samajhne mein aasani hoti hai?
document: मनुष्याणां सहस्त्रेषु कश्र्चिद्यतति सिद्धये । यततामपि सिद्धानां कश्र्चिन्मां वेत्ति तत्त्वतः ॥ ७.३ ...|It is very difficult to know Me fully in reality, dear Arjuna. Out of thousands of people, only a few special ones (Yogis or divine devotees) try to realize Me. Even out of those perfect people trying to realize Me, only a few succeed in doing so. Hardly anybody know My reality.

query: Arjun ko kya kaha hai ki unki aatma ka kya strot hai?
document: भूमिरापोऽनलो वायुः खं मनो बुद्धिरेव च । अहंकार इतीयं मे भिन्ना प्रकृतिरष्टधा ॥ ७.४ ॥|My nature,dear Arjuna, is formed by eight elements, namely, earth, fire, wind, water, sky, mind, intellect and ego. O Arjuna, understand that the elements I have just mentioned to you are only part of My lower nature. The other part of Me is My higher nature, which preserves the universe.

query: Arjun ko kya kaha hai ki unki prakriti ka kya astha hai?
document: अपरेयमितस्त्वन्यां प्रकृतिं विद्धि मे पराम् । जीवभूतां महाबाहो ययेदं धार्यते जगत् ॥ ७.५ ॥|My nature,dear Arjuna, is formed by eight elements, namely, earth, fire, wind, water, sky, mind, intellect and ego. O Arjuna, understand that the elements I have just mentioned to you are only part of My lower nature. The other part of Me is My higher nature, which preserves the universe.

query: Krishna ka kya do roop hain jo sabko banate aur marte hain?
document: एतद्योनीनि भूतानि सर्वाणीत्युपधारय । अहं कृत्स्नस्य जगतः प्रभवः प्रलयस्तथा ॥ ७.६ ॥|The Lord spoke solemnly: O Arjuna, you must understand that I have created all beings in these two aspects of my nature. Arjuna, Know Me as both the creator and the destroyer of the world.

query: Krishna kya kehta hai apne sarvavyapi swaroop ke baare mein?
document: मत्तः परतरं नान्यत्किंचिदस्ति धनंजय । मयि सर्वमिदं प्रोतं सूत्रे मणिगणा इव ॥ ७.७ ॥|Arjuna, there is in reality absolutely nothing else but Me, I am all there is in this whole universe and everything is threaded into Me like the pearls in a necklace.

query: Krishna kya kehte hain apne swaroop ke baare mein?
document: रसोऽहमप्सु कौन्तेय प्रभास्मि शशिसूर्ययोः । प्रणवः सर्ववेदेषु शब्दः खे पौरुषं नृषु ॥ ७.८ ॥|Dear Arjuna, I am the essence (the life) of water. I am the light in the Moon and the Sun; I am the “OM” in all of the Vedas (Holy Scriptures of the Hindu Religion). I am the sound and vibrations in the sky and the manliness in all men.

query: Krishna ka kya kaha hai jahaan woh prithvi par aaraam hai aur aag mein teja?
document: पुण्यो गन्धः पृथिव्यां च तेजश्चास्मि विभावसौ । जीवनं सर्वभूतेषु तपश्चास्मि तपस्विषु ॥ ७.९ ॥|I am the aroma (fragrance) in the earth, the radiance in the fire. I am “life” in all beings, and I represent the sacrifice in all religious and sacrificial ceremonies.

query: Arjun ko kya kahaa hai jisase sabhi jeevon ka mool hai?
document: बीजं मां सर्वभूतानां विद्धि पार्थ सनातनम् । बुद्धिर्बुद्धिमतामस्मि तेजस्तेजस्विनामहम् ॥ ७.१० ॥|Arjuna, know Me; I am the core of all beings. I am the intelligence in the intelligent, and I represent the valour in the valiant men of this world.

query: Kya Dharmik vyakti ki kshamata aur ichchha se mukt logon mein main kya hota hoon?
document: बलं बलवतां चाहं कामरागविवर्जितम् । धर्माविरुद्धो भूतेषु कामोऽस्मि भरतर्षभ ॥ ७.११ ॥|Arjuna, my dear devotee, I am the strength in those that are strong and who are free from desire and attachment. I am the controlled, passion in all beings not contrary to Dharma.

query: Krishna keh rahe hain ki vah kya hai jo is duniya mein Sattvik, Rajasik aur Tamasik gunon se bante hain?
document: ये चैव सात्त्विका भावा राजसास्तामसाश्च ये । मत्त एवेति तान्विद्धि न त्वहं तेषु ते मयि ॥ ७.१२ ॥|Arjuna, I am also all the thoughts borne out of Sattvik (pure), Rajasik (high activity) and Tamasik (evil) elements that surround this world. Consider them all as created by Me. However, always remember, I am neither in them, nor are they in me.

query: Krishna kehte hain ki prithvi par sab kuch kya hai?
document: त्रिभिर्गुणमयैर्भावैरेभिः सर्वमिदं जगत् । मोहितं नाभिजानाति मामेभ्यः परमव्ययम् ॥ ७.१३ ॥|The whole universe, o Son of Kunti, is deluded by the Sattvik, Rajasik, and Tamasik Gunas (Components or Parts of nature). However,the truth is that I, the Supreme, Imperishable God, am above all of these Gunas.

query: Krishna ke gunon ko door karne ke liye kya karna chahiye?
document: दैवी ह्येषा गुणमयी मम माया दुरत्यया । मामेव ये प्रपद्यन्ते मायामेतां तरन्ति ते ॥ ७.१४ ॥|Because My divine nature (many) consisting of these three parts, is very powerful,only those who continuously worship me, rise above these three Gunas (parts of nature) and cease to be deluded by them.

query: Kis prakaar ke logon ka aapko dhyan hai jo shakti ki ichchha mein apne gyan ko khoya hua hai?
document: न मां दुष्कृतिनो मूढाः प्रपद्यन्ते नराधमाः । माययापहृतज्ञाना आसुरं भावमाश्रिताः ॥ ७.१५ ॥|Those who have lost their Gyan (wisdom) because of the pursuit of power (maya) and those who are evil in nature and are constantly engaged in evil deeds, do not worship Me, O Arjuna.

query: Kiske paas chatur varne ke yogya bhakt hain?
document: चतुर्विधा भजन्ते मां जनाः सुकृतिनोऽर्जुन । आर्तो जिज्ञासुरर्थार्थी ज्ञानी च भरतर्षभ ॥ ७.१६ ॥|In this world there are only four types of pure and divine (pious) people who worship Me,dear Arjuna; those in distress, the seekers of knowledge and wisdom, the wise (Yogis) and those who desire material wealth.

query: Kya Krishna ke prati prem aur bhakti se bhara man lene wale logon ko vishesh sthaan diya gaya hai?
document: तेषां ज्ञानी नित्ययुक्त एकभक्तिर्विशिष्यते । प्रियो हि ज्ञानिनोऽत्यर्थमहं स च मम प्रियः ॥ ७.१७ ॥|Among all of these, O Arjuna, only the wise who are always thinking of Me with true love and devotion, are special and dear to Me, and I am dear to them as well.

query: Krishna ke paas sabhi bhakt mahatvapurn hain, lekin unmein se kis prakaar ka bhakt sabse mahatvapurn mana hota hai?
document: उदाराः सर्व एवैते ज्ञानी त्वात्मैव मे मतम् । आस्थितः स हि युक्तात्मा मामेवानुत्तमां गतिम् ॥ ७.१८ ॥|Although all of those who worship Me,Arjuna, are dear and sublime to Me, But because I regard a Gyani (man of wisdom) or Yogi to be of my own image, that Yogi will always reside in Me, the Almighty.

query: Kya koi vyakti jisne bahut se janam mein mujhe prem se puja kiya hai, use main kya kehlaata hoon?
document: बहूनां जन्मनामन्ते ज्ञानवान्मां प्रपद्यते । वासुदेवः सर्वमिति स महात्मा सुदुर्लभः ॥ ७.१९ ॥|A Gyani or wise man who worship Me with great love and devotion during many or all of his birth, truly realizes Me as the “be-all” and the “end-all”. And he is considered by Me to be a great sage.

query: Kya Bhagwan Krishna ne apne shishyaoon ko kya kehaya hai jo unhein anya devtaon ki pooja karne se rokta hai?
document: कामैस्तैस्तैर्हृतज्ञानाः प्रपद्यन्तेऽन्यदेवताः । तं तं नियममास्थाय प्रकृत्या नियताः स्वया ॥ ७.२० ॥|Driven by the desires which exist in their nature, ignorant people worship other Deities with rituals.

query: Krishna kehte hain ki unki bhakti ke saath kisi bhi devta ko pooja karne wale ko vah kis tarah se vishwas deta hai?
document: यो यो यां यां तनुं भक्तः श्रद्धयार्चितुमिच्छति । तस्य तस्याचलां श्रद्धां तामेव विदधाम्यहम् ॥ ७.२१ ॥|Whichever god (deity) a person wishes to worship with faith, O Arjuna, I am the one who establishes or builds his faith in that deity.

query: Krishna kya kehta hai apne bhakton ko apne ishwar ke roop mein?
document: स तया श्रद्धया युक्तस्तस्याराधनमीहते । लभते च ततः कामान्मयैव विहितान्हि तान् ॥ ७.२२ ॥|Thus, once these people have been given their faith by Me, the devotees try to worship the deities they choose to worship, and they ultimately achieve their desires as ordered and directed by Me, the Deity of deities

query: Kya Bhagwan kee pooja karne wale logon kee prasiddhi kya hoti hai?
document: अन्तवत्तु फलं तेषां तद्भवत्यल्पमेधसाम् । देवान्देवयजो यान्ति मद्भक्ता यान्ति मामपि ॥ ७.२३ ॥|The Lord said solemnly: But the reward of those ignorant people who worship other deities is only temporary. Those who worship other deities go to those deities after death but those who worship Me, attain Me, and come to Me.

query: Krishna ke bare mein kya kehte hain jo logon ko samajh nahi aata?
document: अव्यक्तं व्यक्तिमापन्नं मन्यन्ते मामबुद्धयः । परं भावमजानन्तो ममाव्ययमनुत्तमम् ॥ ७.२४ ॥|Dear Arjuna, those people who have little intelligence fail to regard Me as the Supreme, indestructible, the Almighty, and unmanifest (not readily perceived by the senses); instead, they regard Me as a mere mortal and ordinary human being.

query: Krishna kis logon ko hi dikhayi dete hain?
document: नाहं प्रकाशः सर्वस्य योगमायासमावृतः । मूढोऽयं नाभिजानाति लोको मामजमव्ययम् ॥ ७.२५ ॥|Shrouded by My own Yogmaya (divine powers), I am not visible to everybody. Those who are ignorant, however, do not know Me as unborn and indestructible (eternal). They will never be able to see Me, O Arjuna. Only those who are dear and devoted to Me, see Me.

query: Krishna ke baare mein kya keh rahe hain ki unhein koi nahin samajh sakta?
document: वेदाहं समतीतानि वर्तमानानि चार्जुन । भविष्याणि च भूतानि मां तु वेद न कश्चन ॥ ७.२६ ॥|O Arjuna, although I know of every single being who was in the past, who is at the present, and who will be in the future, nobody really knows Me.

query: Arjun ko kya kaha gaya hai jo logon ko ichchha aur krodh se bhara hua andhakar mein padne se rokta hai?
document: इच्छाद्वेषसमुत्थेन द्वन्द्वमोहेन भारत । सर्वभूतानि संमोहं सर्गे यान्ति परन्तप ॥ ७.२७ ॥|Arjuna, in this world, most beings are confused and deluded by the doubts created by desire and envy, and they become victims of ignorance and Agyan (lack of wisdom).

query: Kis prakaar ke logon ko koi bhi paap nahin lagta aur ve sab kuch se alag rehte hain?
document: येषां त्वन्तगतं पापं जनानां पुण्यकर्मणाम् । ते द्वन्द्वमोहनिर्मुक्ता भजन्ते मां दृढव्रताः ॥ ७.२८ ॥|O Arjuna, there are, however, some pious people whose sins have been destroyed and are free from all worldly attachments, who worship Me with a firm, undeluded mind.

query: Arjun ne kaha hai ki kis prakaar ke logon ko moksh prapt hota hai?
document: जरामरणमोक्षाय मामाश्रित्य यतन्ति ये । ते ब्रह्म तद्विदुः कृत्स्नमध्यात्मं कर्म चाखिलम् ॥ ७.२९ ॥|Arjuna, those who make an effort to attain Me and take refuge in Me, achieve deliverance from old age and death, and they also fully understand Brahma, (the infinite never-ending) Adhyatma (self) and all Karma (actions) in this world.

query: Kya yogi ke liye mukhya hai jo mujhe samajh sake?
document: साधिभूताधिदैवं मां साधियज्ञं च ये विदुः । प्रयाणकालेऽपि च मां ते विदुर्युक्तचेतसः ॥ ७.३० ॥|Only those wise men (Yogis) who truly know Me as being above all elements of the world (Adhibhutha), above all Deities, and above all sacrifices, experience Me even at the end of their existence on earth (death), and they ultimately attain Me, the Supreme Soul.

query: Krishna se poochhe ki Brahman, Adhyatma, Karma, Adhibhutam aur Adhidaivam ka kya arth hai?
document: अर्जुन उवाच । किं तद्ब्रह्म किमध्यात्मं किं कर्म पुरुषोत्तम अधिभूतं च किं प्रोक्तमधिदैवं किमुच्यते...|Arjuna asked the Lord: Dear Krishna, I have often encountered the terms Brahman, Adhyatma, Karma, Adhibhutam and Adhidaivam, yet I fail to understand the true meaning of these.

query: Krishna ko kya kaha jaata hai aur uska sthaan kya hai?
document: अधियज्ञः कथं कोऽत्र देहेऽस्मिन्मधुसूदन । प्रयाणकाले च कथं ज्ञेयोऽसि नियतात्मभिः ॥ ८.२ ॥|Arjuna continued: Furthermore, O Krishna, I am puzzld by the Adhiyoga. Who is he? How does he dwell in one’s body? Lastly, dear Lord, how do true Yogis come to know you in the ultimate end.

query: Krishna kya kehte hain Brahma ki sthiti ke baare mein?
document: श्रीभगवानुवाच । अक्षरं ब्रह्म परमं स्वभावोऽध्यात्ममुच्यते भूतभावोद्भवकरो विसर्गः कर्मसंज्ञितः ॥ ८....|The Lord replied: Dear Arjuna, always remember that Brahma is the Supreme imperishable (everlasting); the Universal Soul. The Jeevatma or the soul within one’s body is known as Adhyatma.Karma is the offering made to the Gods that causes the creation or manifestation and also the preservation or sustenance of beings.

query: Krishna ne kya kaha ki unke shareer mein kis roop mein vah prastut hain?
document: अधिभूतं क्षरो भावः पुरुषश्चाधिदैवतम् । अधियज्ञोऽहमेवात्र देहे देहभृतां वर ॥ ८.४ ॥|The Lord further explained: Adhibhutam represents all perishable or temporary objects. Brahma, the Universal Soul is the Adhidaivam. O Arjuna, I the Vasudeva, am Adhiyga here in this body and form.

query: Krishna ke baare mein mrityu ke samay kya sochne se moksh prapt hota hai?
document: अन्तकाले च मामेव स्मरन्मुक्त्वा कलेवरम् । यः प्रयाति स मद्भावं याति नास्त्यत्र संशयः ॥ ८.५ ॥|Lord Krishna solemnly proclaimed: O Arjuna, he who thinks only of Me at the time of his death, undoubtedly will come to Me.

query: Kya mrityu ke samay jis cheez ka dhyan karta hai, usi cheez mein uska agla janam hota hai?
document: यं यं वापि स्मरन्भावं त्यजत्यन्ते कलेवरम् । तं तमेवैति कौन्तेय सदा तद्भावभावितः ॥ ८.६ ॥|O Arjuna, whatever entity (being or object) one thinks about during the time of his death while leaving his body, that is what he shall become in his next life.

query: Arjun ko yeh kya kehna hai ki unhein har waqt kya sochna chahiye?
document: तस्मात्सर्वेषु कालेषु मामनुस्मर युध्य च । मय्यर्पितमनोबुद्धिर्मामेवैष्यस्यसंशयम् ॥ ८.७ ॥|Therefore,O Arjuna, think of Me at all times, even while you fight this battle. If you surrender your mind and intellect to Me, dear friend, you will undoubtedly come to Me and unite with Me in heaven.

query: Kya aise vyakti ki kya bhagti hoti hai jo sabse oonchi mukti prapt kar sakta hai?
document: अभ्यासयोगयुक्तेन चेतसा नान्यगामिना । परमं पुरुषं दिव्यं याति पार्थानुचिन्तयन् ॥ ८.८ ॥|Arjuna, one who is constantly performing meditation upon God without letting his mind wander in any other direction, achieves supreme salvation (union with God)

query: Krishna ka kya swaroop hai jo sabko dhyan mein rakh sakta hai aur jiska roop koi bhi jeev nahin samajh sakta hai?
document: कविं पुराणमनुशासितार- मणोरणीयांसमनुस्मरेद्यः । सर्वस्य धातारमचिन्त्यरूप मादित्यवर्णं तमसः परस्तात...|Dear Arjuna, one who is constantly fixed in meditation upon God, who is the omniscient (everywhere), omnipotent (ever-powerful), infinite (never-ending) ruler over all being, preserver of everybody, whose form cannot be conceived readily by any being, who is as brilliant as the Sun, and who is beyond the darkness of ignorance.

query: Krishna kehte hain ki koi vyakti apne mritu kaal mein kya karta hai?
document: प्रयाणकाले मनसाचलेन भक्त्या युक्तो योगबलेन चैव । भ्रुवोर्मध्ये प्राणमावेश्य सम्यक् स तं परं पुरुष...|The Lord Continued: That devoted person, at time of death, with a controlled mind, full of devotion to God, by the power of Yoga, fixing his last few breath in his life in between his eyebrows, only remembering the Supreme God, obtains God, the Supreme Divine Being.

query: Krishna kya kehte hain apne gyaanwano aur shuddh manwano logon ke baare mein?
document: यदक्षरं वेदविदो वदन्ति विशन्ति यद्यतयो वीतरागाः । यदिच्छन्तो ब्रह्मचर्यं चरन्ति तत्ते पदं संग्रहे...|The Blessed Lord Spoke: O Arjuna, that which the scholars of the Vedas (those who study and are knowledgeable of the Vedas), who are self-controlled and passion-free. enter into, leading the life of celibacy and detachment from all things and being, this Supreme Being shall be made clear to you briefly.

query: Yogabhyas ke dauraan kya karna chahiye?
document: सर्वद्वाराणि संयम्य मनो हृदि निरुध्य च । मूर्ध्न्याधायात्मनः प्राणमास्थितो योगधारणाम् ॥ ८.१२ ॥|When a Yogi has fully controlled all of his senses, fixes his mind in the heart, concentrates on nothing but God, concentrates all of his life’s breath in his head, fully establishes his being in the practice of Yoga. Just as one is about to leave his body, he should chant “Om” as one of God’s many names, thinking of Me(the Lord) in the last few moments of his life. This is the key to the attainment of the Supreme state known as salvation.

query: Kya brahman ko yaad karke marne par kya hota hai?
document: ओमित्येकाक्षरं ब्रह्म व्याहरन्मामनुस्मरन् > । यः प्रयाति त्यजन्देहं स याति परमां गतिम् ॥ ८.१३ ॥|Uttering the one-syllabled OM — the (symbol of) BRAHMAN — and remembering Me, he who departs, leaving the body, attains the Supreme Goal.

query: Kya yogi ko apne man ko kis tarah se tairna chahiye?
document: अनन्यचेताः सततं यो मां स्मरति नित्यशः । तस्याहं सुलभः पार्थ नित्ययुक्तस्य योगिनः ॥ ८.१४ ॥|O Arjuna, the Yogi who is established in Me, with his mind constantly fixed on Me, continually remembering Me, can easily attain me.

query: Kya Arjun ko kya kaha gaya hai kisi yogi ki aatmik siddhi ke baad unki wapas janm lena padta hai ya nahin?
document: मामुपेत्य पुनर्जन्म दुःखालयमशाश्वतम् । नाप्नुवन्ति महात्मानः संसिद्धिं परमां गताः ॥ ८.१५ ॥|O Arjuna, the great sages (wise men,Yogis) having achieved Supreme perfection in their life, come to Me, and do not take rebirth which is temporary and full of suffering.

query: Krishna ke paas pahunchne ke baad kya hota hai?
document: आब्रह्मभुवनाल्लोकाः पुनरावर्तिनोऽर्जुन । मामुपेत्य तु कौन्तेय पुनर्जन्म न विद्यते ॥ ८.१६ ॥|All the worlds in the universe, including this one, O Arjuna, are subject to appear and disappear, go and return again, to be created and recreated, but, Arjuna, when one has attained Me, he is never born again into this world of suffering and temporary pleasure.

query: Brahma ki ek din kitni yug kati hain?
document: सहस्रयुगपर्यन्तमहर्यद्ब्रह्मणो विदुः । रात्रिं युगसहस्रान्तां तेऽहोरात्रविदो जनाः ॥ ८.१७ ॥|Those who knows that Brahma’s (the Supreme Creator) one day lasts 1,000 yugas and one night ends 1,000 yugus, truly know the essence of time.

query: Kya Brahma ki shuruat mein jagat ki sab kuch kahan se nikalta hai?
document: अव्यक्ताद्व्यक्तयः सर्वाः प्रभवन्त्यहरागमे । रात्र्यागमे प्रलीयन्ते तत्रैवाव्यक्तसंज्ञके ॥ ८.१८ ॥|Dear Arjuna, try to understand that all that is visible in this world comes out from within Brahma (Creator of the world) at the start of his day.

query: Krishna ne Arjun ko kya kahaa hai, ki jeev jeevan mein kabhi kabhi marne aur janm lene ki prakriya se guzarte hain?
document: भूतग्रामः स एवायं भूत्वा भूत्वा प्रलीयते । रात्र्यागमेऽवशः पार्थ प्रभवत्यहरागमे ॥ ८.१९ ॥|O Arjuna, all beings in this world, by the force of their nature, are born again and again, and dissolve repeatedly as well. They perish and join Brahma at the start of his night, and are born again at the start of his day.

query: Krishna ne Arjun ko kya kaha tha jo unhe janm-maran ke cycle se nikaalne ka raasta dikhata tha?
document: परस्तस्मात्तु भावोऽन्योऽव्यक्तोऽव्यक्तात्सनातनः । यः स सर्वेषु भूतेषु नश्यत्सु न विनश्यति ॥ ८.२० ॥|O Arjuna, one should always remember that there is a path that leads out of this cycle and into a world of eternal unmanifest, where one is never subject to being born, destroyed and reborn again. It is a world of immortality in which one lives forever in peace and eternal happiness

query: Krishna ke paas kya hai jo sabhi jeevon ka antima lakshya hai?
document: अव्यक्तोऽक्षर इत्युक्तस्तमाहुः परमां गतिम् । यं प्राप्य न निवर्तन्ते तद्धाम परमं मम ॥ ८.२१ ॥|The unmanifest (uncreated) is eternal and indestructible, O son of Kunti, and is the ultimate goal for all beings to achieve.When one has finally reached this ultimate goal, he does not come back into this world of temporary pleasure and misery. He achieves supreme bliss, peace and contentment. He then lives forever in My Supreme Abode.

query: Krishna ke paas kaise pahuncha sakte hain?
document: पुरुषः स परः पार्थ भक्त्या लभ्यस्त्वनन्यया । यस्यान्तःस्थानि भूतानि येन सर्वमिदं ततम् ॥ ८.२२ ॥|Dear Arjuna, that God within whom all beings are contained and that God who rules over all the universe, can be attained by complete devotion.

query: Arjun ko do raste kya kehte hain jahan yogi wapas aata hai aur jahan yogi wapas nahin aata hai?
document: यत्र काले त्वनावृत्तिमावृत्तिं चैव योगिनः । प्रयाता यान्ति तं कालं वक्ष्यामि भरतर्षभ ॥ ८.२३ ॥|Dear Arjuna, now I shall tell you of the two paths by which the Yogi returns (comes back and is born into this world again) and by which the Yogi does not return (is not born into this world again.)

query: Kya un yogiyon ki kahaani hai jo agni, prakash, din, sukh pratisukh aur uttarayana ka marg apnate hain?
document: अग्निर्ज्योतिरहः शुक्लः षण्मासा उत्तरायणम् । तत्र प्रयाता गच्छन्ति ब्रह्म ब्रह्मविदो जनाः ॥ ८.२४ ॥|Those Yogis who follow the path of fire, light, daytime, bright fortnight, and the six months of the northern path of the sun, go to Brahma and are not born into the world again.

query: Krishna kehne mein kya hai ki yogi jo dhoom ki raah par chalte hain, raat ka samay, andh kaal, dakshin path ke sadma mahine, swarg mein jaate hain aur phir se duniya mein janm lete hain?
document: धूमो रात्रिस्तथा कृष्णः षण्मासा दक्षिणायनम् । तत्र चान्द्रमसं ज्योतिर्योगी प्राप्य निवर्तते ॥ ८.२५ ...|Those Yogis who follow the path of smoke, night-time, the dark fortnight, the six months of southern path, go to heaven and are eventually reborn back into the world.

query: Krishna kaha hai ki duniya mein do hi mool raaste hain, unke baare mein kya kaha gaya hai?
document: शुक्लकृष्णे गती ह्येते जगतः शाश्वते मते । एकया यात्यनावृत्तिमन्ययावर्तते पुनः ॥ ८.२६ ॥|The Blessed Lord Krishna continued: These bright and dark paths are considered to be the two original paths of the universe. By following the bright path, the Yogi reaches the Supreme State from where there is no return. Going by the other path, the Yogi is subject to birth and death as many times as he chooses to follow this path.

query: Krishna ne Arjun ko kya kehkar yog ki aur se prerna di thi?
document: नैते सृती पार्थ जानन्योगी मुह्यति कश्चन । तस्मात्सर्वेषु कालेषु योगयुक्तो भवार्जुन ॥ ८.२७ ॥|O Arjuna, knowing these two paths, no Yogi ever becomes confused, deluded or unhappy. Therefore Arjuna, you should try to achieve Yoga, the Supreme state of happiness, at all times.

query: Yoga se kya milti hai?
document: वेदेषु यज्ञेषु तपःसु चैव दानेषु यत् पुण्यफलं प्रदिष्टम् । अत्येति तत्सर्वमिदं विदित्वा योगी परं स...|Whatever achievements are obtained by the study of the Vedas, by sacrifices, and by giving to charities, the Yogi goes beyond all of these achievements and achieves the ultimate goal and learns the ultimate secret: the attainment of the eternal Supreme state by constantly practising Yoga.

query: Krishna kya kehta hai Arjun ko Brahma se utpann aur is duniya mein janmne wale sabhi ke baare mein?
document: श्रीभगवानुवाच । इदं तु ते गुह्यतमं प्रवक्ष्याम्यनसूयवे ज्ञानं विज्ञानसहितं यज्ज्ञात्वा मोक्ष्यसेऽश...|Lord Krishna continued: Dear Arjuna, I shall explain to you this ultimate secret and Gyan which is the knowledge of all that is manifest (to emerge from Brahma and be born in this world) and all that is unmanifest (to become one with Brahma and forever be liberated from this world of suffering).

query: Krishna ne Arjun ko kya sabse mahatvapoorn rahasya bataya tha?
document: राजविद्या राजगुह्यं पवित्रमिदमुत्तमम् । प्रत्यक्षावगमं धर्म्यं सुसुखं कर्तुमव्ययम् ॥ ९.२ ॥|This Gyan is the most significant secret knowledge in the universe, O Arjuna. It is very pure and helpful to all beings. It produces direct and favourable results. This virtuous secret is easy to practice and is imperishable.

query: Kya un logon ke liye koi upay nahin hai jo is gyaan ko nahin maante?
document: अश्रद्दधानाः पुरुषा धर्मस्यास्य परन्तप । अप्राप्य मां निवर्तन्ते मृत्युसंसारवर्त्मनि ॥ ९.३ ॥|Arjuna, those people who do not have faith in these principles and in this secret knowledge do not attain Me (the ultimate goal) and thus, move into a world if darkness and death.

query: Krishna kehte hain ki ve sab jagah hain, lekin sab jeevon mein nahin.
document: मया ततमिदं सर्वं जगदव्यक्तमूर्तिना । मत्स्थानि सर्वभूतानि न चाहं तेष्ववस्थितः ॥ ९.४ ॥|I am present in all of the universe (on every world) in my unmanifest (unseen) form. All beings are contained in Me but I am not always contained in them.

query: Krishna keh raha hai ki sabhi jeevon mein woh nahin hai, lekin unhein banata aur rakhata hai, kya yeh sach hai?
document:
न च मत्स्थानि भूतानि पश्य मे योगमैश्वरम् । भूतभृन्न च भूतस्थो ममात्मा भूतभावनः ॥ ९.५ ॥|O Arjuna, you must also understand that all the beings in this universe are not within Me.
Behold the effects of My Yoga (spiritual power), though I sustain and create all beings, in reality, My Self dwells not in these beings.

query: Arjun ko kya kaha gaya hai ki sab jeevon ko kaise samajhna chahiye?
document: यथाकाशस्थितो नित्यं वायुः सर्वत्रगो महान् । तथा सर्वाणि भूतानि मत्स्थानीत्युपधारय ॥ ९.६ ॥|Arjuna, you must clearly understand that just as the vast wind moves in all directions in the sky, similarly all beings are placed in Me.

query: Krishna ke paas sabhi jeevon ka kya sthaan hai?
document: सर्वभूतानि कौन्तेय प्रकृतिं यान्ति मामिकाम् । कल्पक्षये पुनस्तानि कल्पादौ विसृजाम्यहम् ॥ ९.७ ॥|O Arjuna, all beings realize and attain My true nature at the end of Brahma’s Day knows as Kalpa. I, the Supreme Being, create them again at the beginning of every Kalpa.

query: Krishna kya kehta hai ki unke Maya ke kaaran hum logon ko kya karan se janam aur mrityu hoti hai?
document: प्रकृतिं स्वामवष्टभ्य विसृजामि पुनः पुनः । भूतग्राममिमं कृत्स्नमवशं प्रकृतेर्वशात् ॥ ९.८ ॥|O Arjuna, I create all beings again and again according to their karma (performed actions in their past life) out of My Maya (spiritually powerful nature).

query: Krishna kya kehta hai apne aap par karma ka prabhav?
document: न च मां तानि कर्माणि निबध्नन्ति धनंजय । उदासीनवदासीनमसक्तं तेषु कर्मसु ॥ ९.९ ॥|Dear Arjuna, Karma has no affect on Me whatsoever. I am unattached and indifferent to Karma. I have no bondage to Karma at all.

query: Krishna kehte hain ki universe ka nirmaan kis tarah hota hai?
document: मयाध्यक्षेण प्रकृतिः सूयते सचराचरम् । हेतुनानेन कौन्तेय जगद्विपरिवर्तते ॥ ९.१० ॥|Dear Arjuna, under My supervision, it is through My Maya (nature) that the universe is created with all animate and inanimate (living and non-living) beings. It is because of this fact that the whole universe revolves around the cycle of birth and death.

query: Krishna ke roop mein kaise logon ko apni mahatva ke bare mein jaankari nahin hoti?
document: अवजानन्ति मां मूढा मानुषीं तनुमाश्रितम् । परं भावमजानन्तो मम भूतमहेश्वरम् ॥ ९.११ ॥|Not knowing and fully understanding My Supreme Nature, all ignorant and unspiritual people in this world regard Me as insignificant when I am in human form. They fail to see and realize that I am the Lord of all beings.

query: Krishna kya kehte hain aise logon ke bare mein jo bharambh ke sapne, beghairat kaarya, aur galat gyaan se bhara hote hain?
document: मोघाशा मोघकर्माणो मोघज्ञाना विचेतसः । राक्षसीमासुरीं चैव प्रकृतिं मोहिनीं श्रिताः ॥ ९.१२ ॥|The Lord spoke onward: These ignorant people with futile hopes, vain actions (Karma), and false knowledge (spiritual and non-spiritual Gyan) have a misleading and evil nature.

query: Krishna ke baare mein kya kaha gaya hai ki unhein sabhi sadhu, yogi aur pandit kis tarah dekhte hain?
document: महात्मानस्तु मां पार्थ दैवीं प्रकृतिमाश्रिताः । भजन्त्यनन्यमनसो ज्ञात्वा भूतादिमव्ययम् ॥ ९.१३ ॥|But, Arjuna, always heed that all saints, Yogis and wise men, with their godly, spiritual nature,regard Me as the prime cause of all beings (the Creator of the world) and indestructible. They worship Me with one-mindedness, never letting their minds go astray and be affected by worldly objects, attachment to Karma, and false Gyan.

query: Arjun ko kya kaha hai jo mere bhakt hain?
document: सततं कीर्तयन्तो मां यतन्तश्च दृढव्रताः । नमस्यन्तश्च मां भक्त्या नित्ययुक्ता उपासते ॥ ९.१४ ॥|True devotees of mine, O Arjuna, always have a firm belief in Me, constantly chant My name, bowing before Me, are always absorbed in My thought and worship Me with true love and devotion.

query: Krishna kee ek hi roop hai, lekin log unke alag-alag tareeke se pooja karte hain.
document: ज्ञानयज्ञेन चाप्यन्ये यजन्तो मामुपासते । एकत्वेन पृथक्त्वेन बहुधा विश्वतोमुखम् ॥ ९.१५ ॥|Several people worship Me in different ways, My dear friend. Some choose to worship Me with their offering of knowledge (Gyan Yagya); others worship Me in my absolute (formless) form as part of their own self; and still others choose to worship Me as their Divine Master, in My several different and diverse forms. However, Arjuna, realize that I am One and Universal even though I take on several forms.

query: Krishna kahaan kehte hain ki ve sab kuch hain jo duniya mein dekha jaata hai?
document:
अहं क्रतुरहं यज्ञः स्वधाहमहमौषधम् । मन्त्रोऽहमहमेवाज्यमहमग्निरहं हुतम् ॥ ९.१६ ॥|Arjuna, you must understand that I am everything in this world.
I am the Vedic rituals; I am the sacrifice and the offerings (Yogya); I am the represent all herbal life
I am the Mantra (Vedic); I am purified butter; I am fire; I am the very act of offering in sacrifices.

query: Krishna kya kehte hain apne aap ko?
document:
पिताहमस्य जगतो माता धाता पितामहः । वेद्यं पवित्रमोंकार ऋक्साम यजुरेव च ॥ ९.१७ ॥|I am the sustainer, the father,mother, and grandfather of the whole universe. I represent all that is knowable and worth knowing
I am the Supreme Purifier of all things in the Universe and I represent all of the Vedas in the Universe also, namely, Rig Veda, Yajur Veda and Sama Veda.

query: Krishna ka kya swaroop hai jo sabhi jeevon ka sthaan aur samarpit hai?
document:
गतिर्भर्ता प्रभुः साक्षी निवासः शरणं सुहृत् । प्रभवः प्रलयः स्थानं निधानं बीजमव्ययम् ॥ ९.१८ ॥|O Dear Arjuna, I support and preserve all the creation in the universe; I am the Supreme Lord of all; the witness of all occurrences, the shelter; the refuge; the well-wisher of all beings; the absolute beginning and origin of things, and the absolute end termination of all things.
Furthermore, Arjuna, I am the resting place and storage place (refuge) into which all beings come together when the time of universal destruction is at hand. Know Me also, as the one imperishable, indestructible seed from which all beings in the universe are cultivated.

query: Kya Prabhu ka kya mahatva hai jeevon ke jeevan mein?
document:
तपाम्यहमहं वर्षं निगृह्णाम्युत्सृजामि च । अमृतं चैव मृत्युश्च सदसच्चाहमर्जुन ॥ ९.१९ ॥|O Arjuna, I am the giver of heat; I am responsible also, for the sending and holding back of rain for the nourishment of all life.
You must understand, My dear friend, that I am the very nectar (the juice) of life within all beings, and at the same time, I am the death of all beings. Arjuna, I am all that is real and unreal in this universe.

query: Kya Gita mein karma ke liye punya phal milta hai?
document: त्रैविद्या मां सोमपाः पूतपापा यज्ञैरिष्ट्वा स्वर्गतिं प्रार्थयन्ते । ते पुण्यमासाद्य सुरेन्द्रलोक-...|Those who perform actions (as described in the three Vedas), desiring fruit from these actions, and those who drink the juice of the pure Soma plant, are cleansed and purified of their past sins. Those who desire heaven, (the Supreme Abode of the Lord known as Indralok) attain heaven and enjoy its divine pleasures by worshipping Me through the offering of sacrifices. Thus, by performing good action (Karma) as outlined by the three Vedas, one will always undoubtedly receive a place in heaven where they will enjoy all of the divine pleasure that are enjoyed by the Deities.

query: Kya Karma ka parinaam kya hai?
document:
ते तं भुक्त्वा स्वर्गलोकं विशालं क्षीणे पुण्ये मर्त्यलोकं विशन्ति । एवं त्रयीधर्ममनुप्रपन्ना गताग...|However, Arjuna, after all of their good Karma (action) has expired, the enjoyment of all of the happiness, joy and peace that they have encountered in heaven ends as well, and therefore, they are reborn in the world (subject to the cycle of birth and death) once more.
Therefore, Arjuna, all beings who perform attached Karma (actions performed for the purpose of gaining something, i.e. fruits, in return for the action), are always born and reborn into this cycle of birth and death according to the three Vedas.

query: Krishna ke paas kya hota hai un logon ke liye jo use nischit man se puja karte hain aur use har samay sochta rehte hain?
document: अनन्याश्चिन्तयन्तो मां ये जनाः पर्युपासते । तेषां नित्याभियुक्तानां योगक्षेमं वहाम्यहम् ॥ ९.२२ ॥|However, Arjuna, for those beings who worship Me with a fixed mind, meditating and constantly thinking of Me, worshipping Me without any desire for rewards in return for their worship, are granted full refuge and salvation in My Supreme Abode (Heaven). These devotees are never reborn in this cycles of birth and death and attain a place in My Abode for Eternity.

query: Kya Arjun ko kaha gaya hai ki jo log mere bhakt hain aur unhein kuchh devtaon ka vishwas hai, ve mujhe hi puja karte hain?
document: येऽप्यन्यदेवताभक्ता यजन्ते श्रद्धयान्विताः । तेऽपि मामेव कौन्तेय यजन्त्यविधिपूर्वकम् ॥ ९.२३ ॥|Arjuna, all of those devotees of mine who perform Attached Karma and who have faith in the various Deities (who are all part of and representatives of Me in reality), actually worship Me. However, this worship is really being done out ignorance, (lack of proper knowledge about Me.)

query: Krishna ke charano mein kya baithke yah koi upasak apne kuchh lakshya ke liye puja karta hai?
document: अहं हि सर्वयज्ञानां भोक्ता च प्रभुरेव च । न तु मामभिजानन्ति तत्त्वेनातश्च्यवन्ति ते ॥ ९.२४ ॥|Arjuna, I am the Supreme Lord and receiver of all sacred sacrifices. However, those devotees who worship Me for some sort of motive or reward, really do not knows Me, and therefore, they shall always fall in this cycle of birth and death.

query: Kya jis prani ko uske pooja karte hue vishay ka prapti hoti hai?
document: यान्ति देवव्रता देवान्पितॄन्यान्ति पितृव्रताः । भूतानि यान्ति भूतेज्या यान्ति मद्याजिनोऽपि माम् ॥ ९...|Arjuna, a person only gets what he worship for. Those who worship Deities, attain them. Those who worship ancestors, attain them. Those who worship the spirits, attain spirits, and of course, those who worship Me, will undoubtedly attain Me.

query: Krishna kya kaha hai apne bhakton se prapt karne wali sabhi prakar ki upahar ko?
document: पत्रं पुष्पं फलं तोयं यो मे भक्त्या प्रयच्छति । तदहं भक्त्युपहृतमश्नामि प्रयतात्मनः ॥ ९.२६ ॥|I accept with love, all of the offerings that My selfless devotees present to Me (devotedly) in the form of leaves, flowers, fruits and water.

query: Arjun ko kya kaha gaya hai ki unke sab karyon ko kiske paas jodna chahiye?
document: यत्करोषि यदश्नासि यज्जुहोषि ददासि यत् । यत्तपस्यसि कौन्तेय तत्कुरुष्व मदर्पणम् ॥ ९.२७ ॥|Arjuna, whatever you do, whatever your actions are, whatever you sacrifice and give, and whatever your religious and sacred parctices may be, offer all of these to Me, dear friend.

query: Krishna ke paas kaise pahunche?
document: शुभाशुभफलैरेवं मोक्ष्यसे कर्मबन्धनैः । संन्यासयोगयुक्तात्मा विमुक्तो मामुपैष्यसि ॥ ९.२८ ॥|With your mind religiously and devotedly established in Sannyaas Yoga (offering all of your actions to Me), and therefore being fully released from the bondages and ties to worldly pleasures which result from attachment to Karma (good and bad Karma), you shall ultimately, and definitely, attain Me.

query: Krishna ke paas kis prakaar ke bhakt hain?
document: समोऽहं सर्वभूतेषु न मे द्वेष्योऽस्ति न प्रियः । ये भजन्ति तु मां भक्त्या मयि ते तेषु चाप्यहम् ॥ ९.२...|I regard all beings with equality and with even-mindedness. I neither hate nor love anybody, nor do I like or dislike anyone. However, those who choose to worship Me, with everlasting and pure devotion, are always in Me, and I am in them.

query: Kya yeh kaha jaata hai ki koi bhi vyakti agar mujhe bhakti se pyaar karta hai, to uska darja kya hota hai?
document: अपि चेत्सुदुराचारो भजते मामनन्यभाक् । साधुरेव स मन्तव्यः सम्यग्व्यवसितो हि सः ॥ ९.३० ॥|O Arjuna, you must realize that even if the most evil of men become My devotee and worship Me with a steady and even mind, fully focusing his thoughts and concentrating on Me, he should be considered a saint and a wise man because he is a man of steady wisdom and intelligence since he possesses a decisive mind.

query: Kya Arjun ko kya sach hai ki uske bhagwan ke bhakt kabhi bhi nuksan nahin pate?
document: क्षिप्रं भवति धर्मात्मा शश्वच्छान्तिं निगच्छति । कौन्तेय प्रति जानीहि न मे भक्तः प्रणश्यति ॥ ९.३१ ॥|This evil man will then soon become a very pure and pious man in time. He will then attain eternal peace and happiness, Realize this truth O Arjuna, that he who is My true devotees, shall never suffer destruction.

query: Krishna kya kah raha hai ki kisi bhi varn aur ashram ke vyakti ko moksha mil sakta hai?
document: मां हि पार्थ व्यपाश्रित्य येऽपि स्युः पापयोनयः । स्त्रियो वैश्यास्तथा शूद्रास्तेऽपि यान्ति परां गति...|Dear Arjuna, by taking refuge in Me, (the true path to bliss and joy), a sinful person, a women, a businessman, and even an untouchable person, will attain, the Supreme state just as the virtuous Brahman, and the devoted great royal sages and wise men.

query: Arjun ko kya kaha hai ki yah duniya kya hai?
document: किं पुनर्ब्राह्मणाः पुण्या भक्ता राजर्षयस्तथा । अनित्यमसुखं लोकमिमं प्राप्य भजस्व माम् ॥ ९.३३ ॥|O Arjuna, this world is one that is quickly passing, very brief and full of sufferings. Having been born here in such a world, the only way that one can attain true happiness and peace is to worship Me.

query: Arjun ko kya karna chahiye?
document: मन्मना भव मद्भक्तो मद्याजी मां नमस्कुरु । मामेवैष्यसि युक्त्वैवमात्मानं मत्परायणः ॥ ९.३४ ॥|Arjuna, fix your mind only on Me; be my true, dedicated and sincere devotee; offer all sacrifices to Me; bow to Me. Having these things with Me always in mind, you will come to Me inevitably.

query: Krishna kya kaha raha hai Arjun ko?
document: श्रीभगवानुवाच । भूय एव महाबाहो शृणु मे परमं वचः यत्तेऽहं प्रीयमाणाय वक्ष्यामि हितकाम्यया ॥ १०.१ ॥|Arjuna, my dear devotee, hear and understand these wise words (full of the highest and most divine knowledge) which I shall disclose to you, for your own good.

query: Krishna ke janam ke raaz ko kya koi jaanta hai?
document: न मे विदुः सुरगणाः प्रभवं न महर्षयः । अहमादिर्हि देवानां महर्षीणां च सर्वशः ॥ १०.२ ॥|Even the Deities and the greatest of wiseman do not know the secret of my birth in this world (in human form). You should understand,my dear friend, that it is from ME that all of these Deities and wisemen originate.

query: Krishna ka sabse bada gun kya hai?
document: यो मामजमनादिं च वेत्ति लोकमहेश्वरम् । असंमूढः स मर्त्येषु सर्वपापैः प्रमुच्यते ॥ १०.३ ॥|The Blessed Lord declared: He who fully understands ME (in all respects) as being without a beginning or an end,and Lord of the universe,is truly the wisest person among all men and is released from all his sins.

query: Krishna kehte hain ki jeevan ke sabhi ghatnaein kya unka mool utpadan hai?
document: बुद्धिर्ज्ञानमसंमोहः क्षमा सत्यं दमः शमः । सुखं दुःखं भवोऽभावो भयं चाभयमेव च ॥ १०.४ ॥|The intellect, the GYAN (Supreme Knowledge), understanding, forbearance, truth, control over the mind and senses, joys, sorrows, birth, death, fear, fearlessness, non-violence, even-mindedness, contentment, austerity, charity, fame, infamy, all of these and other diverse elements that surround life in this world, arise and begin from ME, the Supreme Soul.

query: Kya Bhagwan se prapt huye sab kuch hai ya phir yeh sab kuch apne aap mein hi hai?
document: अहिंसा समता तुष्टिस्तपो दानं यशोऽयशः । भवन्ति भावा भूतानां मत्त एव पृथग्विधाः ॥ १०.५ ॥|The intellect, the GYAN (Supreme Knowledge), understanding, forbearance, truth, control over the mind and senses, joys, sorrows, birth, death, fear, fearlessness, non-violence, even-mindedness, contentment, austerity, charity, fame, infamy, all of these and other diverse elements that surround life in this world, arise and begin from ME, the Supreme Soul.

query: Kya Bhagwan ka kya kaha hai ki unke devotees se kis prakaar ki prajaati utpan hui?
document: महर्षयः सप्त पूर्वे चत्वारो मनवस्तथा । मद्भावा मानसा जाता येषां लोक इमाः प्रजाः ॥ १०.६ ॥|The seven great sages (wisemen), their four elders (such as SANAK and the others) and the fourteen MANUS (the forefathers and originators of man-kind, namely SWAYAMBHU MANU and the generation that followed him), who were all my great devotees and were born out of MY will, all the beings that have evolved in the world are descendents of these devotees of mine.

query: Kya yoga se yogi ko apne saath milne ka moksha prapt karne ka mahaan uddeshya prapt hota hai?
document: एतां विभूतिं योगं च मम यो वेत्ति तत्त्वतः । सोSविकल्पेन योगेन युज्यते नात्र संशयः ॥ १०.७ ॥|He who fully understands my Supreme Glories and the divine powers of Yoga, will undoubtedly achieve the most Supreme goal of a lifetime, and that is, to become united and enjoined with ME. To achieve this Supreme state one must take part in firm and constant meditation, having only Myself fixed in his mind at all times.

query: Krishna ka kya dharm hai?
document: अहं सर्वस्य प्रभवो मत्तः सर्वं प्रवर्तते । इति मत्वा भजन्ते मां बुधा भावसमन्विताः ॥ १०.८ ॥|Arjuna, recognize Me as the eternal source and MAKER of all that exists in this world. It is because of ME that anything can move in this world. Those who truly know and understand this, are wise people and shall always worship ME with full faith and devotion.

query: Kya un logon ki kaisi bhavna hoti hai jo hamesha mere charnon mein dhyan rakhte hain?
document: मच्चित्ता मद्गतप्राणा बोधयन्तः परस्परम् । कथयन्तश्र्च मां नित्यं तुष्यन्ति च रमन्ति च ॥ १०.९ ॥|Those faithful devotees, of MINE whose mind are constantly fixed on ME, enlightening each other spiritually about ME and are always talking about my divine attributes and virtues, are forever contented and delighted.

query: Krishna ke prati kya koi bhakt hain jo usse pyaar se poojate hain?
document: तेषां सततयुक्तानां भजतां प्रीतिपूर्वकम् । ददामि बुद्धियोगं तं येन मामुपयान्ति ते ॥ १०.१० ॥|My true devotees are constantly attached to ME and worship ME with love. I bestow upon these devotees of mine, the Yoga of wisdom by which they are guided to ME, the source of Supreme bliss and eternal contentment.

query: Krishna kya kaha hai apne bhakton ke dil mein rehte hue?
document: तेषामेवानुकम्पार्थमहमज्ञानजं तमः । नाशयाम्यात्मभावस्थो ज्ञानदीपेन भास्वता ॥ १०.११ ॥|While dwelling in the hearts of my devotees, I shed MY divine grace upon them and through the light that emanates from the lamp of knowledge (GYAN), I rid them of their darkness that has evolved from their ignorance.

query: Krishna ka kya gun hain jo sabhi rishiyon ne bhi kaha hai?
document: अर्जुन उवाच । परं ब्रह्म परं धाम पवित्रं परमं भवान् पुरुषं शाश्र्वतं दिव्यमादिदेवमजं विभुम् ॥ १०....|Arjuna said: Dear Lord, You are the highest, the absolute the Supreme, Eternal and everlasting, the greatest purifier, the ultimate resort, Surpasser of all boundaries known to man, the origin of all Deities, the omni-present Spirit, and filled with spiritual Divinity. The greatest seers and divine sages, NARADA, ASIT, DEVAL, VYAS as well as You yourself have said all of these characteristics of You, my Lord.

query: Kya Bhagwan ka kya vishisht lakshan hai jo sabhi devtaon ka mool hai?
document: आहुस्त्वामृषयः सर्वे देवर्षिर्नारदस्तथा । असितो देवलो व्यासः स्वयं चैव ब्रवीषि मे ॥ १०.१३ ॥|Arjuna said: Dear Lord, You are the highest, the absolute the Supreme, Eternal and everlasting, the greatest purifier, the ultimate resort, Surpasser of all boundaries known to man, the origin of all Deities, the omni-present Spirit, and filled with spiritual Divinity.The greatest seers and divine sages, NARADA, ASIT, DEVAL, VYAS as well as You yourself have said all of these characteristics of You, my Lord.

query: Krishna ka kya kaha hai jisse unki utpatti aur moolyaan devaron se bhi samajh mein nahin aati?
document: सर्वमेतदृतं मन्ये यन्मां वदसि केशव । न हि ते भगवन्व्यक्तिं विदुर्देवा न दानवाः ॥ १०.१४ ॥|Lord Krishna, I accept all of the Knowledge that You have bestowed upon ME as true. I have also understood, dear Lord, that your very manifestation and origin is not understood by Deities let alone demons.

query: Krishna ko kya kahaa hai jo sabse pehle hai aur sabke paas hai?
document: स्वयमेवात्मनात्मानं वेत्थ त्वं पुरुषोत्तम । भूतभावन भूतेश देवदेव जगत्पते ॥ १०.१५ ॥|Arjuna continued: O Krishna, Originator of all, Lord of all beings, Lord of all Deities, Master and Creator of the World, the FIRST among all men, you alone in this universe, truly know Yourself.

query: Krishna kya apne gunon ko kaise batate hain?
document: वक्तुमर्हस्यशेषेण दिव्या ह्यात्मविभूतयः । याभिर्विभूतिभिर्लोकानिमांस्त्वं व्याप्य तिष्ठसि ॥ १०.१६ ॥|You should indeed, without reserve, tell me of Your Divine glories by which You exist pervading all these worlds.

query: Krishna ka kai roop kya hain jinke dwara main aapko samajh sakta hoon?
document: कथं विद्यामहं योगिंस्त्वां सदा परिचिन्तयन् । केषु केषु च भावेषु चिन्त्योऽसि भगवन्मया ॥ १०.१७ ॥|Lord Krishna, please, fully describe to me, how I shall truly know you by constantly meditating upon you. In how many different forms can I meditate upon you to completely understand you ?
