query: Krishna ji ke mahimaon aur unki aatmik shakti ko kya kahaa hai?
document: विस्तरेणात्मनो योगं विभूतिं च जनार्दन । भूयः कथय तृप्तिर्हि शृण्वतो नास्ति मेऽमृतम् ॥ १०.१८ ॥|Arjuna demanded further: Lord Krishna, once again, describe fully to me, your divine glories and supreme splendour. My thirst for hearing your sweet and divine words again and again, is not yet quenched.

query: Krishna kya apne swaroop ko kaise samjhaate hain?
document: श्रीभगवानुवाच । हन्त ते कथयिष्यामि दिव्या ह्यात्मविभूतयः प्राधान्यतः कुरुश्रेष्ठ नास्त्यन्तो विस्त...|The Blessed Lord said: You are blessed O Best of the KURUS; hence I will declare to you my Divine Glory by its chief characteristics; there is no end to details of Me.

query: Krishna kahaan ke man mein vasant hai?
document: अहमात्मा गुडाकेश सर्वभूताशयस्थितः । अहमादिश्च मध्यं च भूतानामन्त एव च ॥ १०.२० ॥| O Gudakesha (the conqueror of slumber) am the soul, seated in the heart of all beings. I am the beginning the middle and also the end of all lives.

query: Kya Bhagwan Vishnu ka kaha hai?
document: आदित्यानामहं विष्णुर्ज्योतिषां रविरंशुमान् । मरीचिर्मरुतामस्मि नक्षत्राणामहं शशी ॥ १०.२१ ॥|Among the sons of light I am Vishnu; of radiances, the Glorious Sun. I am the lord of the winds and storms, and of the lights in the night I am the moon.

query: Krishna kya kehte hain apne swaroop ke baare mein?
document: वेदानां सामवेदोऽस्मि देवानामस्मि वासवः । इन्द्रियाणां मनश्चास्मि भूतानामस्मि चेतना ॥ १०.२२ ॥|Of the Vedas I am the Veda of songs, I am Indra, the Chief of Gods I am the mind amongst the senses, and in all living beings I am the light of consciousness.

query: Krishna ka kya kaha hai yahaan ki prithvi par sabse ooncha parvat hai?
document: रुद्राणां शंकरश्चास्मि वित्तेशो यक्षरक्षसाम् । वसूनां पावकश्चास्मि मेरुः शिखरिणामहम् ॥ १०.२३ ॥|And among the RUDRAS I am Shankara; among the YAKSHAS and RAKSHASAS I am the Lord of wealth (KUBERA) ; among the VASUS I am PAVAKA (AGNI) ; and among the mountains I am the MERU.

query: Kya Bhagwan Krishna kahaani hai jismein unhone apne gunon ko kisi prateek ke roop mein bataya hai?
document: पुरोधसां च मुख्यं मां विद्धि पार्थ बृहस्पतिम् । सेनानीनामहं स्कन्दः सरसामस्मि सागरः ॥ १०.२४ ॥|I am the divine priest, Brihaspati among the priest, and among warriers Skanda, the God of war. Of lakes I am the vast ocean.

query: Kya Bhagwan Krishna ne kaha hai ki vah kis cheez ka prateek hai?
document: महर्षीणां भृगुरहं गिरामस्म्येकमक्षरम् । यज्ञानां जपयज्ञोऽस्मि स्थावराणां हिमालयः ॥ १०.२५ ॥|I am Bhrigu among great seers and of words I am OM, the word of eternity. Of prayers I am the prayer of silence; and of things that move not I am the Himalayas.

query: Krishna kaun hain jo jeevan ki peedhi hain?
document: अश्वत्थः सर्ववृक्षाणां देवर्षीणां च नारदः । गन्धर्वाणां चित्ररथः सिद्धानां कपिलो मुनिः ॥ १०.२६ ॥|Of trees I am the tree of life, and of heavenly seers, Narada. Among celestial musicians I am Chitra-Ratha, and among seers of earth, Kapila.

query: Kis prakaar aapko apne aap ko sabse shaktishali ke roop mein samajhate hain?
document: उच्चैःश्रवसमश्वानां विद्धि माममृतोद्भवम् । ऐरावतं गजेन्द्राणां नराणां च नराधिपम् ॥ १०.२७ ॥|I am the horse of Indra among horses; and of elephants, Indra’s elephant Airavat. Among men I am King of men.

query: Krishna ka kya ek vishesh gun hai jiska vishesh arth hai prakritik aandolan ka prabandhan karna?
document: आयुधानामहं वज्रं धेनूनामस्मि कामधुक् । प्रजनश्चास्मि कन्दर्पः सर्पाणामस्मि वासुकिः ॥ १०.२८ ॥|Of weapons I am the thunderbolt, and of cows the cow of wonder. Among creators I am the creator of love, and among serpents the serpent of Eternity.

query: Kya Bhagwan Krishna kya apne swaroop ko kai roopon mein karte hain?
document: अनन्तश्चास्मि नागानां वरुणो यादसामहम् । पितॄणामर्यमा चास्मि यमः संयमतामहम् ॥ १०.२९ ॥|Among the snakes of mystery I am Ananta, and of those born in waters I am Varuna, their Lord. Of the spirits of the fathers am Aryaman, and I am Yama, the ruler of death.

query: Krishna ka kya kaha hai apne vibhinn roopon ke baare mein?
document: प्रह्लादश्चास्मि दैत्यानां कालः कलयतामहम् । मृगाणां च मृगेन्द्रोऽहं वैनतेयश्च पक्षिणाम् ॥ १०.३० ॥|Of demons I am Prahlada their prince, and of all things I am the measure of time. Of beasts I am the king of beasts, and beasts and birds I am Vainateya who carries a god.

query: Krishna ka kya kaha hai apne swaroop ke baare mein?
document: पवनः पवतामस्मि रामः शस्त्रभृतामहम् । झषाणां मकरश्चास्मि स्रोतसामस्मि जाह्नवी ॥ १०.३१ ॥|I am the wind among things of purification, and among warriors I am Rama, the hero supreme. Of fishes in the sea I am Makara, the wonderful and among all rivers the holy Ganges.

query: Kya Krishna ka kaha hai ki vah sab kuchh ka shuruwat, madhya aur ant hai?
document: सर्गाणामादिरन्तश्च मध्यं चैवाहमर्जुन । अध्यात्मविद्या विद्यानां वादः प्रवदतामहम् ॥ १०.३२ ॥|I am the beginning and the middle and the end of all that is. Of all knowledge I am the knowledge of the Soul. Of the many paths of reason I am the one that leads to Truth.

query: Kya Bhagwan Krishna ne kaha hai ki vah kya hai?
document: अक्षराणामकारोऽस्मि द्वन्द्वः सामासिकस्य च । अहमेवाक्षयः कालो धाताहं विश्वतोमुखः ॥ १०.३३ ॥|Of sounds I am the first sound ‘A’. Of compounds I am coordination. I am time, never ending time. I am the Creator who sees all.

query: Kya Krishna yahaan kya kaha raha hai?
document: मृत्युः सर्वहरश्चाहमुद्भवश्च भविष्यताम् । कीर्तिः श्रीर्वाक्च नारीणां स्मृतिर्मेधा धृतिः क्षमा ॥ १०...|I am death that carries off all things, and I am the source of things to come. Of feminine nouns I am Fame and Prosperity; speech, Memory and Intelligence, Constancy and Forgiveness.

query: Kya Vedaon mein sabse bada Gita hai?
document: बृहत्साम तथा साम्नां गायत्री छन्दसामहम् । मासानां मार्गशीर्षोऽहमृतूनां कुसुमाकरः ॥ १०.३५ ॥|I am the Brihat song of all songs in the Vedas. I am the Gayatri of all measures in Verse. Of months I am the first of the year, and of all the seasons the season of blossoms.

query: Kya Krishna yeh kaha hai ki vah sabse sundar cheezon ka sundarta hai?
document: द्यूतं छलयतामस्मि तेजस्तेजस्विनामहम् । जयोऽस्मि व्यवसायोऽस्मि सत्त्वं सत्त्ववतामहम् ॥ १०.३६ ॥|I am the cleverness in the gambler’s dice. I am the beauty of all things beautiful. I am victory and the struggle for victory. I am the goodness of those who are good.

query: Krishna kaun hai?
document: वृष्णीनां वासुदेवोऽस्मि पाण्डवानां धनंजयः । मुनीनामप्यहं व्यासः कवीनामुशना कविः ॥ १०.३७ ॥|Of all the children of Vrishni I am Krishna; and of the sons of Pandu I am Arjuna, Among seers in silence I am Vyasa; and among poets the poet Usana.

query: Kya Krishna ka kya kaha hai jisne rajaon ke rajaon ka darpan banaya hai aur jeet ke liye sochne walo ki shaktishali niti hai?
document: दण्डो दमयतामस्मि नीतिरस्मि जिगीषताम् । मौनं चैवास्मि गुह्यानां ज्ञानं ज्ञानवतामहम् ॥ १०.३८ ॥|I am the sceptre of rulers of men; and I am the wise policy of those who seeks victory. I am the silence of hidden mysteries, and I am the knowledge of those who know.

query: Krishna kehne mein aapko kya kaha hai?
document: यच्चापि सर्वभूतानां बीजं तदहमर्जुन । न तदस्ति विना यत्स्यान्मया भूतं चराचरम् ॥ १०.३९ ॥|Arjuna, know that I am the seed of all things that are, and that no being that moves or moves not can ever be without Me.

query: Krishna ne Arjun ko kya kehkar dikhaaya tha?
document: नान्तोऽस्ति मम दिव्यानां विभूतीनां परन्तप । एष तूद्देशतः प्रोक्तो विभूतेर्विस्तरो मया ॥ १०.४० ॥|There is no end of my divine qualities, Arjuna. What I have spoken here to thee shows only a small part of my infinity.

query: Krishna kehte hain ki unke apne swaroop se hi sab kuch sundar aur shaktishali hai, toh kya unke swaroop ka arth kya hai?
document: यद्यद्विभूतिमत्सत्त्वं श्रीमदूर्जितमेव वा । तत्तदेवावगच्छ त्वं मम तेजोंऽशसंभवम् ॥ १०.४१ ॥|Whatever is beautiful and good, whatever has glory and power is only a portion of My own radiance.

query: Krishna kehte hain ki unke ek hisse se hi sab kuch hai, to unhein kya fayda hai apne vishal roop ko samajhne se?
document: अथवा बहुनैतेन किं ज्ञातेन तवार्जुन । विष्टभ्याहमिदं कृत्स्नमेकांशेन स्थितो जगत् ॥ १०.४२ ॥|But of what help is it to you to know this diversity? Know that with one single fraction of My Being I pervade and support the Universe and know that I am.

query: Arjun ne kya kahaa hai Lord Krishna se?
document: अर्जुन उवाच । मदनुग्रहाय परमं गुह्यमध्यात्मसंज्ञितम् यत्त्वयोक्तं वचस्तेन मोहोऽयं विगतो मम ॥ ११.१ ...|Arjuna thankfully replied: O Lord it is because of Your mercy alone that the mystery of the self which has confused me until now, has become clear in the mind.

query: Krishna ne apne charanon se janm aur mrityu ke baare mein kya kaha tha?
document: भवाप्ययौ हि भूतानां श्रुतौ विस्तरशो मया । त्वत्तः कमलपत्राक्ष माहात्म्यमपि चाव्ययम् ॥ ११.२ ॥|The origin and destruction of beings verily, have been heard by me in detail from You, O Lotus-eyed Krishna, and also Your inexhaustible greatness.

query: Krishna ka swaroop kya hai jo unhone apne aap ko is tarah se vartit kiya hai?
document: एवमेतद्यथात्थ त्वमात्मानं परमेश्वर । द्रष्टुमिच्छामि ते रूपमैश्वरं पुरुषोत्तम ॥ ११.३ ॥|(Now) O Supreme Lord! As you have thus described Yourself, I wish to see (actually) Your Form Divine, O PURUSHOTTAMA.

query: Krishna aapne mukhya roop ko kya karna chahte hain?
document: मन्यसे यदि तच्छक्यं मया द्रष्टुमिति प्रभो । योगेश्वर ततो मे त्वं दर्शयात्मानमव्ययम् ॥ ११.४ ॥|O Great Lord of Yoga, if you think of me as being worthy and able to see your Supreme form, then display Your true, eternal self to me dear Lord.

query: Krishna ne Arjun ko kya darshaya tha?
document: श्रीभगवानुवाच । पश्य मे पार्थ रूपाणि शतशोऽथ सहस्रशः नानाविधानि दिव्यानि नानावर्णाकृतीनि च ॥ ११.५ ॥|The Blessed lord said: Behold O Dear Arjuna, as I reveal to you hundreds and even thousands of My various, divine forms of several colours and shapes.

query: Krishna ka kai roop kya kehte hain?
document: पश्यादित्यान्वसून्रुद्रानश्विनौ मरुतस्तथा । बहून्यदृष्टपूर्वाणि पश्याश्चर्याणि भारत ॥ ११.६ ॥|Watch My Dear Devotee, as I disclose to you my various forms. The gods of sun, fire and light; the gods of storm, and lightning and the two beautiful charioteers of Heaven. Behold O Relative of Bharata, vision and sights never before seen by the naked human eyes!

query: Krishna ne Arjun ko kya darshana diya tha?
document: इहैकस्थं जगत्कृत्स्नं पश्याद्य सचराचरम् । मम देहे गुडाकेश यच्चान्यद् द्रष्टुमिच्छसि ॥ ११.७ ॥|Arjuna, see before you now, the whole universe as it both moving and at rest, see whatever you desire. See it all in me because I am in everything and everything is in Me.

query: Krishna ka divya roop kaise dekha ja sakta hai?
document: न तु मां शक्यसे द्रष्टुमनेनैव स्वचक्षुषा । दिव्यं ददामि ते चक्षुः पश्य मे योगमैश्वरम् ॥ ११.८ ॥|However, Dear Arjuna, understand that one can only see My divine form through divine eye-sight. You can never see Me through your mortal eyes. Therefore I will give you divine eye-sight to behold my divine Power and glory.

query: Krishna ne apni vibhinn roopon ko kaise darshaya tha?
document: संजय उवाच । एवमुक्त्वा ततो राजन्महायोगेश्वरो हरिः दर्शयामास पार्थाय परमं रूपमैश्वरम् ॥ ११.९ ॥|Sanjaya (narrator of the Geeta), further explained to his King: Thus, when the great Lord Hari, God of Yoga  had spoken, He revealed to Partha (Arjuna) His Divine Form.

query: Arjun ko kya darshana hua tha jismein bahut se sundar aur adbhut drishya the?
document: अनेकवक्त्रनयनमनेकाद्भुतदर्शनम् । अनेकदिव्याभरणं दिव्यानेकोद्यतायुधम् ॥ ११.१० ॥|Sanjaya Continued: Arjuna had now begun to see the most extra-ordinary and miraculous visions and marvels; several faces; several divine ornaments and a countless amount of heavenly weapons. Sanjaya described Arjuna saw before him, a wide range of heavenly garlands, and garments, with divine perfumes and scents. This heavenly and infinite image, made up of all fantastic wonders,was facing all directions and all the endless marvels seemed to be contained in him.

query: Krishna ka kya swaroop hai jismein sabhi oron ka samna karta hai?
document: दिव्यमाल्याम्बरधरं दिव्यगन्धानुलेपनम् । सर्वाश्चर्यमयं देवमनन्तं विश्वतोमुखम् ॥ ११.११ ॥|1. Wearing divine garlands (necklaces) and apparel, anointed with divine unguents, the All-wonderful, Resplendent, Endless, facing all sides.

query: Krishna ka darshan kaise tha?
document: दिवि सूर्यसहस्रस्य भवेद्युगपदुत्थिता । यदि भाः सदृशी सा स्याद्भासस्तस्य महात्मनः ॥ ११.१२ ॥|The divine radiance and beautiful light that was being emmitted by the glorious vision was so great that it could only be matched by the light of one thousand suns arising in the sky at once.

query: Arjun ne kya dekha tha jismein sab kuchh ek jagah aya tha?
document: तत्रैकस्थं जगत्कृत्स्नं प्रविभक्तमनेकधा । अपश्यद्देवदेवस्य शरीरे पाण्डवस्तदा ॥ ११.१३ ॥|Here, the Pandava (Arjuna) saw the whole universe in its several dimensions and varieties all gathered together in the Supreme Lord of Lords.

query: Krishna se kya baat hui thi jisse Dhananjaya ka man chakkar lag gaya?
document: ततः स विस्मयाविष्टो हृष्टरोमा धनंजयः । प्रणम्य शिरसा देवं कृताञ्जलिरभाषत ॥ ११.१४ ॥|Then, Dhananjaya, filled with wonder, with his hair standing on end, bowed down his head to the God and spoke with joined palms.

query: Krishna ka swaroop kya hai jismein sabhi devta aur prakritik roop dikhai dete hain?
document: अर्जुन उवाच । पश्यामि देवांस्तव देव देहे सर्वांस्तथा भूतविशेषसंघान् । ब्रह्माणमीशं कमलासनस्थ- मृ...|O Lord, I have seen within Thy heavenly body, all of the gods and the infinite variety of being that have been created by You. I see before Me the great Lord Brahma who is seated on the lotus throne, all the seers of light (sages), and the Divine Serpents as well.

query: Krishna ka kya roop hai jismein bahut se hathon, chehre, pet, aankhon aur mukh hote hain?
document: अनेकबाहूदरवक्त्रनेत्रं पश्यामि त्वां सर्वतोऽनन्तरूपम् । नान्तं न मध्यं न पुनस्तवादिं पश्यामि विश्...|   Arjuna explained to the Lord:                                                                                                                         O Krishna, I behold your image as being never-ending, with countless arms, faces, bellies, eyes, and mouth. I sense the divinity and power coming from all parts of Your Superior Being. O Lord of Lords, I am unable to see Thy beginning, middle or end for You are of infinite form!

query: Krishna ka roop kya hai jiska darshan karke Arjun ko aisa lag raha hai ki uska darshan karne se unki aankhon ko kuch nahin dekhne ka samay mil raha hai?
document: किरीटिनं गदिनं चक्रिणं च तेजोराशिं सर्वतो दीप्तिमन्तम् । पश्यामि त्वां दुर्निरीक्ष्यं समन्ता- द्द...|I can clearly see the crown, sceptre and discus glowing upon Your lotus body like a mass of intense light. Your dazzling image is difficult for me to behold and believe, yet I still see You in Your full brilliance as the eternal, flaming fire, the blinding sun and truly as one of a kind.

query: Kya aapko kisi bhi jagat ka sabse adhik moolya kya hai?
document: त्वमक्षरं परमं वेदितव्यं त्वमस्य विश्वस्य परं निधानम् । त्वमव्ययः शाश्वतधर्मगोप्ता सनातनस्त्वं पु...|You are immortal, imperishable and never ending. You are the height of knowledge and the Supreme to be realized by all. You are the support of this large universe. I think you to be the guardian and ruler of the eternal law of purity and virtue. You are the ever-lasting Spirit who is, and always has been, at the very beginning of all things in the universe.

query: Krishna ka kya swaroop hai jo kisi bhi samay aur jagah par bhi hamesha astitva rakhta hai?
document: अनादिमध्यान्तमनन्तवीर्य- मनन्तबाहुं शशिसूर्यनेत्रम् । पश्यामि त्वां दीप्तहुताशवक्त्रं स्वतेजसा वि...|O Great Lord, I see Thee as having no beginning, middle or end; being of endless and infinite power and glory which is all contained in Your unlimited number of divine arms. Thy face resembles an eternal fire that gives light and life to all things in this enormous universe. In Thine eyes I see the sun and the moon, dear Lord.

query: Krishna ka vishvaasneey roop dikhakar, prithvi aur aakasha ke beech ka kya hai?
document: द्यावापृथिव्योरिदमन्तरं हि व्याप्तं त्वयैकेन दिशश्च सर्वाः । दृष्ट्वाद्भुतं रूपमुग्रं तवेदं लोकत्...|This space between earth and the heavens and all the quarters is filled by You alone; having seen this, Your wonderful and terrible form, the three worlds are trembling with fear, O great-souled Being

query: Kya Bhagwan ka darshan karne wale devtaon ka samuh aapko milta hai?
document: अमी हि त्वां सुरसंघा विशन्ति केचिद्भीताः प्राञ्जलयो गृणन्ति । स्वस्तीत्युक्त्वा महर्षिसिद्धसंघाः ...|The many hosts of gods join and come into You my Lord. Out of respect, fear and love for You, they praise and adore You. The great sages and seers all sing praises of Thy glory as well, Almighty Lord.

query: Kya Krishna ne kaha hai ki sabhi devtaon ne unhein kya seva ki hai?
document: रुद्रादित्या वसवो ये च साध्या विश्वेऽश्विनौ मरुतश्चोष्मपाश्च । गन्धर्वयक्षासुरसिद्धसंघा वीक्षन्ते...|The Rudras of destruction, the Adityas, the Vasus, the Sadhyas, and the Visvedevas; the two Asvins (Charioteers) of heaven; the Maruts (Lord of winds and storms); the Spirits of Ancestors; the divine singing choirs of the Gandharvas; the Yakshas (keepers of wealth); the demons of hell; and the Siddhas (those who gained the prestigious goal of perfection on earth), all of these Supreme souls and saints gaze upon Thee with wonder and respect.

query: Krishna ka kya roop hai jiska darshana duniya ke logon ko daravata hai?
document: रूपं महत्ते बहुवक्त्रनेत्रं महाबाहो बहुबाहूरुपादम् । बहूदरं बहुदंष्ट्राकरालं दृष्ट्वा लोकाः प्रव्...|However Dear Lord, the worlds cannot help but tremble at the fearful sight of Your mighty and terrifying forms. The forms consisting of many eyes, mouth, bellies, feet and terrible fangs that are too frightening for the average mortal to gaze upon. However this is but one single aspect of your omniscience (being everything and every-where) in the universe.

query: Krishna ka bada roop kaise dekha?
document: नभःस्पृशं दीप्तमनेकवर्णं व्यात्ताननं दीप्तविशालनेत्रम् । दृष्ट्वा हि त्वां प्रव्यथितान्तरात्मा धृ...|O Lord, when I see Your vast and enormous form which reaches the sky, surrounded by a burning and magnificient glow of several beautiful colours, with mouth opened wide and large, my heart and inmost soul tremble in amazement and terror. My power and peace of mind have also vanished, Dear Vishnu.

query: Krishna ka darshan karke kya ho raha hai?
document: दंष्ट्राकरालानि च ते मुखानि दृष्ट्वैव कालानलसन्निभानि । दिशो न जाने न लभे च शर्म प्रसीद देवेश जगन...|O Lord, seeing Your enormous facial features and frightening teeth like the fire that burns till the end of time and all existence, I find myself truly losing all sense of direction and peace with myself! O Lord have mercy on me! Give me shelter, O Giver of refuge and Supreme Being of this vast universe.

query: Krishna ka roop kya tha jismein bhisma, drona aur karna jaise mahabali senaon ko daraya tha?
document: अमी च त्वां धृतराष्ट्रस्य पुत्राः सर्वे सहैवावनिपालसंघैः । भीष्मो द्रोणः सूतपुत्रस्तथासौ सहास्मदी...|Arjuna began to explain: All the sons of Dhratarashtra together with the other hosts of kings and princes along with Bhisma, Drona, and Karna and other great warriors on our side….Arjuna Continued:…are all being forced to enter the various mouths of your most enormous and terrifying forms, inspiring terror in everyone with those fearful fangs.

query: Krishna ke bade aur daravat bhare roop mein kya keh raha tha?
document: वक्त्राणि ते त्वरमाणा विशन्ति दंष्ट्राकरालानि भयानकानि । केचिद्विलग्ना दशनान्तरेषु संदृश्यन्ते चू...|Arjuna began to explain: All the sons of Dhratarashtra together with the other hosts of kings and princes along with Bhisma, Drona, and Karna and other great warriors on our side….Arjuna Continued:…are all being forced to enter the various mouths of your most enormous and terrifying forms, inspiring terror in everyone with those fearful fangs.

query: Krishna keh rahe hain ki ve kaise yuddh mein bhag lete hain?
document: यथा नदीनां बहवोऽम्बुवेगाः समुद्रमेवाभिमुखा द्रवन्ति । तथा तवामी नरलोकवीरा विशन्ति वक्त्राण्यभिविज...|Your flaming mouths are consuming all of these heroes of our modern world like roaring torrents of rivers rushing forward into the ocean.

query: Krishna ke aag ke aaspaas kya kuchh jeev jante hain?
document: यथा प्रदीप्तं ज्वलनं पतङ्गा विशन्ति नाशाय समृद्धवेगाः । तथैव नाशाय विशन्ति लोका- स्तवापि वक्त्राण...|All of these men are rushing swiftly into the blazing fire coming from Your several mouths, towards their death and destruction just as moths swiftly rush into a burning flame and die.

query: Krishna ka kya kaha hai jismein unke divya roopon ke mukhon se dekhe jaane wale bade aagon ne jagat ka nash karna hai?
document: लेलिह्यसे ग्रसमानः समन्ता- ल्लोकान्समग्रान्वदनैर्ज्वलद्भिः । तेजोभिरापूर्य जगत्समग्रं भासस्तवोग्र...|The large fires that can be seen from within the mouths of Your divine forms, devour all the worlds of the universe. Your glorious, fiery rays fill the whole universe. However, Dear Vishnu, this very same universe is the victim of Your terrible radiant and scorching rays of light!

query: Krishna ka aasli roop kya hai?
document: आख्याहि मे को भवानुग्ररूपो नमोऽस्तु ते देववर प्रसीद । विज्ञातुमिच्छामि भवन्तमाद्यं न हि प्रजानामि...|Dear Lord Supreme, I do not understand Your mysterious ways. Reveal Yourself to me! Who are You in this terrible form? Be gracious to me Dear Lord, and explain to me the secret of Your reality, for I am confused.

query: Krishna kehte hain ki ve samay hain jo sabko marta hai, aur yeh sab log apne aap se hi marte hain.
document: श्रीभगवानुवाच । कालोऽस्मि लोकक्षयकृत्प्रवृद्धो लोकान्समाहर्तुमिह प्रवृत्तः । ऋतेऽपि त्वां न भविष्...|The Blessed Lord spoke: Dear Arjuna, understand that I am the all-powerful entity known as Time, which destroys all beings in this universe. Even without the help of your actions, all of these warriors standing before Me in the opposing armies shall cease to live!

query: Krishna kya kehta hai Arjun ko apne kaam ke liye?
document: तस्मात्त्वमुत्तिष्ठ यशो लभस्व जित्वा शत्रून् भुङ्क्ष्व राज्यं समृद्धम् । मयैवैते निहताः पूर्वमेव ...|Therefore, arise O son of Kunti (Arjuna), win thy glory, conquer your enemies, enjoy a prosperous kingdom! Through the result of their own Karma, I have doomed these people to die and you, My Dear disciple, are simply a means of Mine by which this task shall be accomplished.

query: Krishna ne Arjun ko kya kaha tha?
document: द्रोणं च भीष्मं च जयद्रथं च कर्णं तथान्यानपि योधवीरान् । मया हतांस्त्वं जहि मा व्यथिष्ठा युध्यस्व...|Do not fear O Arjuna! Fight and slay all these great warriors such as Drona, Bhisma, Karna and Jayad-Ratha, who are already doomed for death! Be bold O Arjuna! perform your duty; conquer your enemies in battle and leave the rest up to Me the Supreme Lord.

query: Arjun ne Krishna ke baaton ke baad kya kaha tha?
document: संजय उवाच । एतच्छ्रुत्वा वचनं केशवस्य कृताञ्जलिर्वेपमानः किरीटी । नमस्कृत्वा भूय एवाह कृष्णं सगद...|Sanjaya narrated to his King: When Arjuna had heard the words of Krishna, he folded his hands and bowed his trembling body down before the Great Lord in adoration and in a faultering voice he spoken:

query: Krishna ko kya kaha jata hai aur unki kripa se kya hota hai?
document: अर्जुन उवाच । स्थाने हृषीकेश तव प्रकीर्त्या जगत्प्रहृष्यत्यनुरज्यते च । रक्षांसि भीतानि दिशो द्रव...|Dear Krishna, it is a true fact that countless people sing thy praise and take delight in glorifying You. The Rakshasas (evil-doers) flee in terror in all directions from Your Divine Might! All the great Saint and Seers bow down in love and adoration before You.

query: Krishna ka kya kaha hai Brahma ka Adhipati hai?
document: कस्माच्च ते न नमेरन्महात्मन् गरीयसे ब्रह्मणोऽप्यादिकर्त्रे । अनन्त देवेश जगन्निवास त्वमक्षरं सदसत...|To think that any wiseman would do anything else but bow down before Your infinite greatness. is unwise, O Blessed Lord, Lord of Lords, Spirit Supreme! You are the Lord of Brahma (the Lord of Creation). You, my Dear Lord, are the never-ending, eternal refuge of the world. You are all that exists, that is non-existent, and that is even beyond existence.

query: Krishna ka kya swaroop hai jo sabhi jeevon ka mool hai?
document: त्वमादिदेवः पुरुषः पुराण- स्त्वमस्य विश्वस्य परं निधानम् । वेत्तासि वेद्यं च परं च धाम त्वया ततं ...|You are the first and foremost of Gods; You are the beginning of all existence and are the support of this vast universe. You know all and You are all that is to be known. You are the sole Supreme Goal to be realized by all. You are the Eternal and Omnipresent. From You alone all things have evolved O Krishna!

query: Kya Bhagwan ka koi roop hai jo sabke prajapati hain?
document: वायुर्यमोऽग्निर्वरुणः शशाङ्कः प्रजापतिस्त्वं प्रपितामहश्च । नमो नमस्तेऽस्तु सहस्रकृत्वः पुनश्च भू...|You are the wind (Vayu); Yama (the destroyer); You are the Sea-God (Varuna); the moon (Lord Sasanka); the Grand King of all (Prajapati). Hail to Thee O Lord! A thousand adorations to thee! Again and again to thee everyone hails!

query: Krishna ka kya kaha hai jahan unhein sabhi sthanon se shubh prarthana, vandana aur namaskar aate hain?
document: नमः पुरस्तादथ पृष्ठतस्ते नमोऽस्तु ते सर्वत एव सर्व । अनन्तवीर्यामितविक्रमस्त्वं सर्वं समाप्नोषि त...|May good prayers, adorations, and salutations come to Your greatness from all directions O Mighty Lord Krishna! O Lord of all aspects of this universe, limitless in power and infinite might. You, the most Superior of all, have the ominous power to penetrate  all beings in this universe. You are All, Dear Lord.

query: Krishna ji se kya kaha hai jo apne aapko samajhne se pehle kaha gaya tha?
document:
सखेति मत्वा प्रसभं यदुक्तं हे कृष्ण हे यादव हे सखेति । अजानता महिमानं तवेदं मया प्रमादात्प्रणयेन ...|O Madhava (Krishna). my dear comrade and Lord, for whatever I have unthinkingly said to You, ignorant of the fact  that You are very much more a Greater Being than simply MY companion in battle; for my utter ignorance or maybe out of fondness…
…for whatsoever I have incorrectly presumed about You; for my irreverence and disrespect when alone with You or amongst companions; for making fun or teasing You at play or at rest: for all these things, dear Lord, please find it in Your divine heart to forgive Me for this ignorance.

query: Kya Achyuta ko apne aapko kaise maaf karna chahiye?
document: यच्चावहासार्थमसत्कृतोऽसि विहारशय्यासनभोजनेषु । एकोऽथवाप्यच्युत तत्समक्षं तत्क्षामये त्वामहमप्रमेय...|In whatever way I may have insulted You for the sake of fun, while at play, reposing or sitting, or at meals, when alone (with You), O Achyuta, or in company — that, O Immeasurable One, I implore You to forgive.

query: Krishna ka kya aisa hai jo usse bada ya usse kam hai?
document: पितासि लोकस्य चराचरस्य त्वमस्य पूज्यश्च गुरुर्गरीयान् । न त्वत्समोऽस्त्यभ्यधिकः कुतोऽन्यो लोकत्रय...|Arjuna continued to praise Krishna: You are the divine father of All. The Supreme Master. You are all that is moving and unmoving. You are the single object of worship in all the universe and the Supreme Teacher. Who is like You? Whose power exceeds and goes beyond Your infinite Might?

query: Krishna ka kya kaha hai apne bhakton ke liye?
document: तस्मात्प्रणम्य प्रणिधाय कायं प्रसादये त्वामहमीशमीड्यम् । पितेव पुत्रस्य सखेव सख्युः प्रियः प्रिया...|I kneel before Your greatness O Lord, simply in love and adoration for You! I beg for beg your good grace and mercy on me, O Vishnu. I plead with Thee Shri Krishna, as a friend to his friend or as a lover would to his beloved!

query: Arjun ne kya kaha tha jab unhe Krishna ka darshan hua tha?
document:
अदृष्टपूर्वं हृषितोऽस्मि दृष्ट्वा भयेन च प्रव्यथितं मनो मे । तदेव मे दर्शय देव रूपं प्रसीद देवेश ...|Arjuna expressed gratefully:
The vision that I have seen because of your divine Grace, no mortal man has seen before, At the same time, I rejoice with extreme joy and my heart trembles with fear of You, O Lord! Have mercy on Me, O Lord of all the Lords, Be gracious O Refuge of this universe! Please show me your human form once more.

query: Krishna ka purv roop kya tha jismein unke chaar haathon mein chakra aur gada tha?
document: किरीटिनं गदिनं चक्रहस्त- मिच्छामि त्वां द्रष्टुमहं तथैव । तेनैव रूपेण चतुर्भुजेन सहस्रबाहो भव विश...|I desire to see You as before, crowned, bearing a mace, with a discus in hand, in Your Former Form only, having four arms, O Thousand-armed, O Universal Form.

query: Krishna ne Arjun ko apni sachchai ki roop se kya dikhaaya tha?
document: श्रीभगवानुवाच । मया प्रसन्नेन तवार्जुनेदं रूपं परं दर्शितमात्मयोगात् । तेजोमयं विश्वमनन्तमाद्यं ...|The Lotus-colured Lord Krishna said: Through My divine Power and Grace, Dearest Arjuna, I have shown you the form Supreme made of a divine glow, which is the infinite, endless and true form of mine from beginning of all existence. I have revealed to you O devotee of Mine, the luminous vision of Me which no mortal has observed before.

query: Arjun ko kya kaha tha ki ve kaise apne aasli roop ko dekh pate the?
document: न वेदयज्ञाध्ययनैर्न दानै- र्न च क्रियाभिर्न तपोभिरुग्रैः । एवंरूपः शक्य अहं नृलोके द्रष्टुं त्वदन...|The Blessed Lord spoke solemnly: O Arjuna, you the greatest of Kurus alone has seen My true and Supreme form. Consider yourself fortunate for neither through the Vedas, nor through sacrifices, nor studies, nor through ceremonial rites, rituals or fearful actions of worship can a mere mortal man hope to see My Supreme form.

query: Krishna ne kya kaha hai apne darshana ke baad?
document: मा ते व्यथा मा च विमूढभावो दृष्ट्वा रूपं घोरमीदृङ्ममेदम् । व्यपेतभीः प्रीतमनाः पुनस्त्वं तदेव मे ...|Be not afraid, nor bewildered on seeing such a terrible-Form of Mine as this; with your fear dispelled and with gladdened heart, now behold again this Form of Mine.

query: Krishna ne Arjun ko kya dikhaya?
document: संजय उवाच । इत्यर्जुनं वासुदेवस्तथोक्त्वा स्वकं रूपं दर्शयामास भूयः । आश्वासयामास च भीतमेनं भूत्...|Sanjaya further recounted: Having said this to Arjuna, the great Lord Vasudeva (Krishna) revealed to Arjuna, His human form once more. Thus the Lord of all beings gave peace to Arjuna’s fear and comforted a terrified Arjuna.

query: Krishna ke mukhya roop ko dekhkar, main kya kahunga?
document: अर्जुन उवाच । दृष्ट्वेदं मानुषं रूपं तव सौम्यं जनार्दन इदानीमस्मि संवृत्तः सचेताः प्रकृतिं गतः ॥ १...|Arjuna responded in relief: Now that I see your gentle human form Dear Krishna, I have returned back to my normal self with a peaceful mind and heart.

query: Krishna ne Arjun ko kya kahaa tha?
document: श्रीभगवानुवाच । सुदुर्दर्शमिदं रूपं दृष्टवानसि यन्मम देवा अप्यस्य रूपस्य नित्यं दर्शनकाङ्क्षिणः ॥ ...|The Blessed lord said: Dear Arjuna, the Divine form of Myself which you have seen with so much difficulty is an experience which even the other gods and godesses in heaven long to see.

query: Kya aise vyakti ko koi labh milta hai jo dharmik karyaon ka palan karta hai aur mujhe hi bhakti aur puja ka vishay banata hai?
document: नाहं वेदैर्न तपसा न दानेन न चेज्यया । शक्य एवंविधो द्रष्टुं दृष्टवानसि मां यथा ॥ ११.५३ ॥|Not even with such religious acts as ritual offerings, gifts to the unfortunate and poor, and by leading a life only of worship and devotion to Me, can one be so fortunate as to witness what you have.

query: Kya koi vyakti mere se prabhavshali sambandh banane ke liye prem aur aatm-samarpan ke bina nahin ho sakta hai?
document: भक्त्या त्वनन्यया शक्य अहमेवंविधोऽर्जुन । ज्ञातुं द्रष्टुं च तत्त्वेन प्रवेष्टुं च परंतप ॥ ११.५४ ॥|It is only by true love and selfless devotion that one can truly come to know Me, see Me in My true form, and be an eternal part of Me.

query: Kya koi vyakti jissey prem hai, uska sab kuch mere liye hi karna chahata hai aur jissey main hi sabse bada lakshya hai?
document: मत्कर्मकृन्मत्परमो मद्भक्तः सङ्गवर्जितः । निर्वैरः सर्वभूतेषु यः स मामेति पाण्डव ॥ ११.५५ ॥|He who truly loves Me; devotes his whole life to performing actions to please only Myself; who recognizes that I am the Supreme and final goal of life; who is free from all attachment and has love for all that I have created; that man comes to truly know who I am.

query: Arjun ne kya poochha tha, jinhone aapko nirgun aur gunn ke roop mein pooja kiya hai, unmein se kis prakaar ke yogi the?
document: अर्जुन उवाच । एवं सततयुक्ता ये भक्तास्त्वां पर्युपासते ये चाप्यक्षरमव्यक्तं तेषां के योगवित्तमाः ॥...|Arjuna asked: Those devotees who worship you as the one without attributes (formless) and those who worship you as the one with attributes (with form); which of these are better versed in Yoga?

query: Krishna ke paas kis tarah ki bhakti karni chahiye?
document: श्रीभगवानुवाच । मय्यावेश्य मनो ये मां नित्ययुक्ता उपासते श्रद्धया परयोपेतास्ते मे युक्ततमा मताः ॥ ...|The Blessed Lord said: Those who have fixed their minds on Me and worship me with total dedication and faith, them I consider perfect in Yoga.

query: Kya un logon ko bhi moksh prapt hota hai jo sabhi jeevon ki khushiyon ka khayal rakhte hain?
document: ये त्वक्षरमनिर्देश्यमव्यक्तं पर्युपासते । सर्वत्रगमचिन्त्यं च कूटस्थमचलं ध्रुवम् ॥ १२.३ ॥|But those who worship the formless, the Indefinable, the Imperishable, the Unmanifest, the Omnipresent, the Unthinkable, the Unchangeable, the Immovable, the External- Having controlled all of the senses, always evenminded, thinking of the welfare of all beings, they also come to Me.

query: Kis prakaar ke yogi ko bhi Bhagwan Krishna ki rachna mein milne ka mukhya darshak hai?
document: संनियम्येन्द्रियग्रामं सर्वत्र समबुद्धयः । ते प्राप्नुवन्ति मामेव सर्वभूतहिते रताः ॥ १२.४ ॥|But those who worship the formless, the Indefinable, the Imperishable, the Unmanifest, the Omnipresent, the Unthinkable, the Unchangeable, the Immovable, the External- Having controlled all of the senses, always evenminded, thinking of the welfare of all beings, they also come to Me.

query: Kya unse bhagwan ki pooja karna mushkil hai jo apne aaspaas nahin dekhe jate?
document: क्लेशोऽधिकतरस्तेषामव्यक्तासक्तचेतसाम् । अव्यक्ता हि गतिर्दुःखं देहवद्भिरवाप्यते ॥ १२.५ ॥|However, the worship of God without form is very difficult for the embodied because it is very hard to set the mind on the unmanifest, i.e. the one not capable of being recognized with the aid of the senses.

query: Krishna ke prati ekak chaithya se upasana karte hain, unke sab karyon ko unhe hi pradhaan banate hain, aur unhe apne antima lakshya ke roop mein samjhte hain.
document: ये तु सर्वाणि कर्माणि मयि संन्यस्य मत्पराः । अनन्येनैव योगेन मां ध्यायन्त उपासते ॥ १२.६ ॥|But those who worship Me, dedicating all actions to Me, regarding Me as the Supreme Goal, meditating on Me with single-mindness.

query: Arjun ko kya kaha hai ki unke bhakton ki chaahat unke paas aati hai?
document: तेषामहं समुद्धर्ता मृत्युसंसारसागरात् । भवामि न चिरात्पार्थ मय्यावेशितचेतसाम् ॥ १२.७ ॥|These worshippers’ thoughts are set on Me; hence O Arjuna, I become their saviour from the wheel of birth and death.

query: Krishna ke saath kya karna chahiye aur uske saath rehna kaise hai?
document: मय्येव मन आधत्स्व मयि बुद्धिं निवेशय । निवसिष्यसि मय्येव अत ऊर्ध्वं न संशयः ॥ १२.८ ॥|Therefore, fix your mind on Me alone, let your thoughts reside in Me. You will hereafter live in Me alone. Do not have any doubt about it.

query: Arjun ko yog se kaise prapt kiya ja sakta hai?
document: अथ चित्तं समाधातुं न शक्नोषि मयि स्थिरम् । अभ्यासयोगेन ततो मामिच्छाप्तुं धनंजय ॥ १२.९ ॥|If you are not able to set your mind on Me, O Arjuna, then wish to reach Me by the Yoga of constant practice.

query: Krishna ke paas kya karna chahiye jab hum apne yog ko nahin banaye paate?
document: अभ्यासेऽप्यसमर्थोऽसि मत्कर्मपरमो भव । मदर्थमपि कर्माणि कुर्वन्सिद्धिमवाप्स्यसि ॥ १२.१० ॥|If you are unable to perform the Yoga of constant practice, then be intent on doing your actions for My sake; thus, performing actions for My sake, you will attain perfection.

query: Kya karna chahiye jab koi kaam karne se koi faida nahi milta?
document: अथैतदप्यशक्तोऽसि कर्तुं मद्योगमाश्रितः । सर्वकर्मफलत्यागं ततः कुरु यतात्मवान् ॥ १२.११ ॥|If you cannot do actions for My sake, then taking refuge in Me, renounce (abandon) all the fruits of action by controlling yourself.

query: Kya karma ke phal se door rehne se shanti milti hai?
document: श्रेयो हि ज्ञानमभ्यासाज्ज्ञानाद्ध्यानं विशिष्यते । ध्यानात्कर्मफलत्यागस्त्यागाच्छान्तिरनन्तरम् ॥ १२...|To gain spiritual knowledge is better than to practise Yoga; Meditation is better than Knowledge, abandoning the fruit of action is better than meditation because peace immediately follows the abandoning of the fruits of action.

query: Krishna ke paas kis prakaar ka bhakt hai jo sabko mitrata aur daya se dekhta hai?
document: अद्वेष्टा सर्वभूतानां मैत्रः करुण एव च । निर्ममो निरहंकारः समदुःखसुखः क्षमी ॥ १२.१३ ॥|The Lord describes the divine qualities of a devotee: He who hates no one, who is friendly and compassionate to all, who is free of egoism, balanced in pain and pleasure and forgiving. He who is ever content, ever steady in meditation, self-controlled and firmly committed with mind and intellect fixed on Me, that devotee is dear to Me.

query: Krishna ke paas kis tarah ke bhakt hain?
document: संतुष्टः सततं योगी यतात्मा दृढनिश्चयः । मय्यर्पितमनोबुद्धिर्यो मद्भक्तः स मे प्रियः ॥ १२.१४ ॥|The Lord describes the divine qualities of a devotee: He who hates no one, who is friendly and compassionate to all, who is free of egoism, balanced in pain and pleasure and forgiving. He who is ever content, ever steady in meditation, self-controlled and firmly committed with mind and intellect fixed on Me, that devotee is dear to Me.

query: Kis prakaar ka bhakt mere pasandidha hai?
document: यस्मान्नोद्विजते लोको लोकान्नोद्विजते च यः । हर्षामर्षभयोद्वेगैर्मुक्तो यः स च मे प्रियः ॥ १२.१५ ॥|He who does not harm anyone in the world and from whom the world is not agitated, and he who knows no joy, envy, fear and anxiety, that devotee is dear to me.

query: Krishna ke paas kya vishesh gun hain jo unhein apne sabse pyare banate hain?
document: अनपेक्षः शुचिर्दक्ष उदासीनो गतव्यथः । सर्वारम्भपरित्यागी यो मद्भक्तः स मे प्रियः ॥ १२.१६ ॥|He who is free from desires, who is pure, expert, unconcerned, free from pain, selfless in all of his actions, he who is thus devoted to Me, is dear to Me.

query: Krishna ke paas kya hai jo kisi bhi cheez ko paane ya haane par khushi ya dukh nahin karta?
document: यो न हृष्यति न द्वेष्टि न शोचति न काङ्क्षति । शुभाशुभपरित्यागी भक्तिमान्यः स मे प्रियः ॥ १२.१७ ॥|He who neither rejoices (obtaining the desirable objects), nor hates (the undesirable objects), nor grieves (losing his beloved objects), nor desires (his beloved objects), free from the notions of good and evil, full of devotion, he is dear to Me.

query: Kya yah koi hai jo apne dushman aur mitr dono ke saath ek hi hai, aur jis par koi bhi sthiti ka prabhav nahin padta?
document: समः शत्रौ च मित्रे च तथा मानापमानयोः । शीतोष्णसुखदुःखेषु समः सङ्गविवर्जितः ॥ १२.१८ ॥|He who is the same to enemy and friend and also in honour and dishonour, in cold and heat, in pleasure and pain, and who is free from attachment-

query: Krishna ke paas kya vishay hai jo unhein kisi bhi cheez se khush rakhta hai?
document: तुल्यनिन्दास्तुतिर्मौनी सन्तुष्टो येन केनचित् । अनिकेतः स्थिरमतिर्भक्तिमान्मे प्रियो नरः ॥ १२.१९ ॥|He who is neutral in censure and praise, He who is silent, content with anything (in the world), does not claim any residence as his home, he who is steady-minded, full of devotion; that man is dear to Me.

query: Kya un logon ko aapka bahut pyaar hai jo aapko apna sabse bada lakshya maante hain?
document: ये तु धर्म्यामृतमिदं यथोक्तं पर्युपासते । श्रद्दधाना मत्परमा भक्तास्तेऽतीव मे प्रियाः ॥ १२.२० ॥|They who follow this immortal law as described above, endowed with faith, looking upon Me as their supreme goal and being devoted, are extermely dear to Me.

query: Krishna kya kehte hain apne shareer ko?
document: अर्जुन उवाच । प्रकृतिं पुरुषं चैव क्षेत्रं क्षेत्रज्ञमेव च एतद्वेदितुमिच्छामि ज्ञानं ज्ञेयं च केशव...|The Blessed Lord said: This body, O Arjuna, is called Kshetra (the field); he who knows it is called Kshetragya (the knower of the field) by the sages (those who have acquired spiritual knowledge).

query: Krishna kya kehta hai apne sharir ke baare mein?
document: श्रीभगवानुवाच । इदं शरीरं कौन्तेय क्षेत्रमित्यभिधीयते एतद्यो वेत्ति तं प्राहुः क्षेत्रज्ञ इति तद्व...|The Blessed Lord said: This body, O Kaunteya is called KSHETRA (the Field) and he who knows it is called KSHETRAJNA (the Knower-of-the-Field) by those who know them (KSHETRA and KSHETRAJNA) i. e. , by the sages .

query: Krishna kya kehte hain apne gyaan ke bare mein?
document: क्षेत्रज्ञं चापि मां विद्धि सर्वक्षेत्रेषु भारत । क्षेत्रक्षेत्रज्ञयोर्ज्ञानं यत्तज्ज्ञानं मतं मम ॥...|And you should know Me as the knower of the field in all fields, O Arjuna. The knowledge of both the field and the knower of the field is considered by Me to be real knowledge.

query: Krishna kya hai aur uske gunon aur lakshanon ka kya hai?
document: तत्क्षेत्रं यच्च यादृक्च यद्विकारि यतश्च यत् । स च यो यत्प्रभावश्च तत्समासेन मे शृणु ॥ १३.४ ॥|What the field is, what it is like, what is its nature, what are its properties and modifications, from what causes, and also, who He (the knower of the field) is, and what His powers are; hear briefly all that from Me.

query: Kya rishiyon ne kaise kaha hai ki kya hai jo jaane wala hai aur kya hai jo jaane wala nahin hai?
document: ऋषिभिर्बहुधा गीतं छन्दोभिर्विविधैः पृथक् । ब्रह्मसूत्रपदैश्चैव हेतुमद्भिर्विनिश्चितैः ॥ १३.५ ॥|RISHIS have sung (about the Field and the Knower-of-the-Field ) in many ways in various distinctive chants and also in the suggestive words indicative of BRAHMAN full of reason and decision.

query: Kya Arjun ko Krishna ne unke aaspaas ke sabhi tatvon ke baare mein kya kaha tha?
document: महाभूतान्यहंकारो बुद्धिरव्यक्तमेव च । इन्द्रियाणि दशैकं च पञ्च चेन्द्रियगोचराः ॥ १३.६ ॥|The great elements, egoism, intellect, and also the unmanifested (MOOLA-PRAKRITI) , the ten senses and the one (the mind) and the five objects-of-the-senses, . . .

query: Kya kshetra ka arth kya hai?
document: इच्छा द्वेषः सुखं दुःखं संघातश्चेतना धृतिः । एतत्क्षेत्रं समासेन सविकारमुदाहृतम् ॥ १३.७ ॥|Desire, hatred, pleasure, pain, the body, intelligence, firmness; these along with their modifications have been called the field (Kshetra).

query: Kya Shri Krishna ne kya gunon ko mahatva diya hai?
document: अमानित्वमदम्भित्वमहिंसा क्षान्तिरार्जवम् । आचार्योपासनं शौचं स्थैर्यमात्मविनिग्रहः ॥ १३.८ ॥|Humility, modesty, non-injury, forgiveness, uprightness, service of the teacher, purity, steadfastness, self-control.

query: Kya Krishna Arjun ko kya vishayon se alag rehne aur ahamkaar se door rehne ka mahatva batata hai?
document: इन्द्रियार्थेषु वैराग्यमनहंकार एव च । जन्ममृत्युजराव्याधिदुःखदोषानुदर्शनम् ॥ १३.९ ॥|Indifference to the sense-objects (such as sound, touch, etc.);absence of egoism (e.g. I am superior to all); reflection on the evil in birth, death, old age, sickness and pain.

query: Krishna kehne mein kya hai ki hum kisi bhi cheez se judkar nahi rehna chahiye?
document: असक्तिरनभिष्वङ्गः पुत्रदारगृहादिषु । नित्यं च समचित्तत्वमिष्टानिष्टोपपत्तिषु ॥ १३.१० ॥|Non-attachment, non-identification of self with son, wife, house, and the rest, and constant even-mindedness on the occurrence of the desirable and undesirable.

query: Krishna ke prati kis prakaar ki bhakti karni chahiye?
document: मयि चानन्ययोगेन भक्तिरव्यभिचारिणी । विविक्तदेशसेवित्वमरतिर्जनसंसदि ॥ १३.११ ॥|Unflinching devotion to Me by the Yoga of non-separation, resort to solitary places, distaste for the society of worldly-minded people.

query: Kya aapko atma-jnana ke bare mein kuchh jaankari di ja sakti hai?
document: अध्यात्मज्ञाननित्यत्वं तत्त्वज्ञानार्थदर्शनम् । एतज्ज्ञानमिति प्रोक्तमज्ञानं यदतोऽन्यथा ॥ १३.१२ ॥|Constant awareness of the Self (self-knowledge),perception of the end of true knowledge – that is declared to be the true knowledge, and what is opposed to it is ignorance.

query: Kya Bhagwan ka aadhi se judaav hai aur vah Sat aur Asat dono se bhi alag hai?
document: ज्ञेयं यत्तत्प्रवक्ष्यामि यज्ज्ञात्वामृतमश्नुते । अनादि मत्परं ब्रह्म न सत्तन्नासदुच्यते ॥ १३.१३ ॥|I shall now state that which has to be known, knowing which one attains to immortality; the Supreme Brahman is beginningless and he is called neither ‘Sat’ (being) nor ‘Asat’ (non-being).

query: Krishna ke bare mein kya kaha gaya hai jo sab kuch dekh sakta hai aur sab kuch samajh sakta hai?
document: सर्वतः पाणिपादं तत्सर्वतोऽक्षिशिरोमुखम् । सर्वतः श्रुतिमल्लोके सर्वमावृत्य तिष्ठति ॥ १३.१४ ॥|With hands and feet everywhere, with eyes, heads and mouths everywhere, with ears everywhere, He (the knower of the field) exists enveloping all.

query: Kya Krishna aapke anubhavon ko kaise samjhate hain jo sabhi indriyon ke kaaryon se prakashit hain lekin un indriyon ke bina hain?
document: सर्वेन्द्रियगुणाभासं सर्वेन्द्रियविवर्जितम् । असक्तं सर्वभृच्चैव निर्गुणं गुणभोक्तृ च ॥ १३.१५ ॥|Shining by the functions of all the senses (see previous verses for the names of the senses), yet without the senses (i.e. organs), unattached, yet supporting all. devoid of Gunas (qualities), yet He experiences them.

query: Krishna ka kya kaha hai jismein woh sabhi jeevon ke bahar aur andar hai?
document: बहिरन्तश्च भूतानामचरं चरमेव च । सूक्ष्मत्वात्तदविज्ञेयं दूरस्थं चान्तिके च तत् ॥ १३.१६ ॥|He is outside and inside all beings; the unmoving and also the moving ; because of His subtlety (like ether), he is unknowable. He is far and near.

query: Kya Krishna kaha hai iske bare mein ki vah kaise ek hai aur logon mein vibhakt hai?
document: अविभक्तं च भूतेषु विभक्तमिव च स्थितम् । भूतभर्तृ च तज्ज्ञेयं ग्रसिष्णु प्रभविष्णु च ॥ १३.१७ ॥|He is undivided and yet he appears to be divided in beings. He supports, swallows up and also creates all beings.

query: Krishna ka kya swaroop hai jo sabhi jyotiyon ki jyoti hai?
document: ज्योतिषामपि तज्ज्योतिस्तमसः परमुच्यते । ज्ञानं ज्ञेयं ज्ञानगम्यं हृदि सर्वस्य विष्ठितम् ॥ १३.१८ ॥|He is light of all lights and is said to be beyond darkness. He is Knowledge, the Knowable (that which has to be known) and the goal of Knowledge, and He is seated in the hearts of all.

query: Krishna ke paas kya hota hai jo apne bhakt ko ek banata hai?
document: इति क्षेत्रं तथा ज्ञानं ज्ञेयं चोक्तं समासतः । मद्भक्त एतद्विज्ञाय मद्भावायोपपद्यते ॥ १३.१९ ॥|Thus the field, knowledge and the knowable have been briefly stated (by Me). My devotee, on knowing this, becomes one with Me.

query: Kya prakriti se utpann hain sab gun aur parivartan?
document: प्रकृतिं पुरुषं चैव विद्ध्यनादी उभावपि । विकारांश्च गुणांश्चैव विद्धि प्रकृतिसंभवान् ॥ १३.२० ॥|You must know that nature and spirit are both without being, and know also that all modifications and qualities are born of nature.

query: Kya karan hai jeev ke anubhav mein dukh aur sukh ka?
document: कार्यकरणकर्तृत्वे हेतुः प्रकृतिरुच्यते । पुरुषः सुखदुःखानां भोक्तृत्वे हेतुरुच्यते ॥ १३.२१ ॥|Both the effect and the cause are generated from nature, and the spirit (soul) is the cause in the experience of pain and pleasure.

query: Kya prakriti ke gunon se judne se atma ki janm ki wajah kya hoti hai?
document: पुरुष: प्रकृतिस्थो हि भुङक्ते प्रकृतिजान्गुणान् । कारणं गुणसङ्गोऽस्य सदसद्योनिजन्मसु ॥ १३.२२...|The spirit (soul) residing in nature experiences the qualities born of nature; this attachment to the qualities is the cause of his birth in pure (good) and impure (evil) wombs.

query: Krishna kya kaha hai apne swaroop ko?
document: उपद्रष्टानुमन्ता च भर्ता भोक्ता महेश्वरः । परमात्मेति चाप्युक्तो देहेऽस्मिन्पुरुषः परः ॥ १३.२३ ॥|The Supreme Soul in this body is also called the spectator, the permitter, the supporter, the enjoyer, the Great Lord and the Supreme Self (Parmatma).

query: Kya jeev ke aur gunon ka samajhne se mukti prapt hoti hai?
document: य एवं वेत्ति पुरुषं प्रकृतिं च गुणैः सह । सर्वथा वर्तमानोऽपि न स भूयोऽभिजायते ॥ १३.२४ ॥|He who thus knows the Soul and Nature with the qualities, he is never born again regardless of the conditions he lives in.

query: Kya karm aur gyan ke yog ke madhyam se atma ko samajhne ki kya avashyakta hai?
document: ध्यानेनात्मनि पश्यन्ति केचिदात्मानमात्मना । अन्ये सांख्येन योगेन कर्मयोगेन चापरे ॥ १३.२५ ॥|Some by Yoga of meditation, behold the Self (supreme) in the self (intellect) by the self (purified mind); others by the Yoga of knowledge, and yet others by the Yoga of action.

query: Kya jis prakaar se log mujhe nahin jaante, ve to iske liye sunne ke roop mein puja karte hain aur unki suni hui baat se unka bhakti se mrityu ke baad chalna shuru ho jaata hai?
document: अन्ये त्वेवमजानन्तः श्रुत्वान्येभ्य उपासते । तेऽपि चातितरन्त्येव मृत्युं श्रुतिपरायणाः ॥ १३.२६ ॥|Those who may not know Me by other means, if worshipping Me as they have heard from others, they too go beyond death by their devotion to what they have heard.

query: Kya jeev aur ajeev dono ke janm ke peeche ek karan hai?
document: यावत्संजायते किंचित्सत्त्वं स्थावरजङ्गमम् । क्षेत्रक्षेत्रज्ञसंयोगात्तद्विद्धि भरतर्षभ ॥ १३.२७ ॥|Whatever is born, unmoving or moving, O Arjuna, know it to be from the union of the field and its knower.

query: Krishna ke bare mein kya kaha gaya hai jo sabhi jeevon mein ek hi hai?
document: समं सर्वेषु भूतेषु तिष्ठन्तं परमेश्वरम् । विनश्यत्स्वविनश्यन्तं यः पश्यति स पश्यति ॥ १३.२८ ॥|He who beholds the imperishable Supreme Lord, existing equally in all perishable beings, realizes the truth.

query: Kya jis prani ko har jagah ka Ishwar dekhne mein aata hai, use apne aap ko marne ka dar nahin hota hai?
document: समं पश्यन्हि सर्वत्र समवस्थितमीश्वरम् । न हिनस्त्यात्मनात्मानं ततो याति परां गतिम् ॥ १३.२९ ॥|Because he who sees the same Lord existing everywhere does not destroy the Self by the self (intellect); therefore, he goes to the highest goal (is released from the round of birth and death).

query: Kya Atman ki kriya karta hai ya prakriti?
document: प्रकृत्यैव च कर्माणि क्रियमाणानि सर्वशः । यः पश्यति तथात्मानमकर्तारं स पश्यति ॥ १३.३० ॥|He is the real seer (or sage) who sees that all actions are performed by nature alone, and that the Self (Atman) is actionless.

query: Kya jab koi vyakti samjhe ki sabhi jeevon ka ek hi adhar hai aur ve sab ek hi se utpann hain, toh uska kya hoga?
document: यदा भूतपृथग्भावमेकस्थमनुपश्यति । तत एव च विस्तारं ब्रह्म संपद्यते तदा ॥ १३.३१ ॥|When a man realizes that the whole variety of beings are residing in the One, and are an evolution from that One alone, then he becomes Brahman (united with the Supreme).

query: Krishna keh raha hai ki vah swaroop jo kabhi nahin bantha, kabhi nahin mitta, aur jisne sharir mein vastha kya hai, vah kya karta hai?
document: अनादित्वान्निर्गुणत्वात्परमात्मायमव्ययः । शरीरस्थोऽपि कौन्तेय न करोति न लिप्यते ॥ १३.३२ ॥|The Supreme Self without beginning, without qualities, imperishable, though dwelling in the body, O Arjuna, neither acts nor is attached to any action.

query: Aapko kya kaha gaya hai ki shareer mein baitha atma kis tarah se behtar hai?
document: यथा सर्वगतं सौक्ष्म्यादाकाशं नोपलिप्यते । सर्वत्रावस्थितो देहे तथात्मा नोपलिप्यते ॥ १३.३३ ॥|As the all pervading ether (sky) is not affected, by reasons of subtlety, so the Self (soul) seated in the body is not affected.

query: Kya Arjun ko kisi ek prakash se sab kshetra ka prakashit hona sikhaya gaya tha?
document: यथा प्रकाशयत्येकः कृत्स्नं लोकमिमं रविः । क्षेत्रं क्षेत्री तथा कृत्स्नं प्रकाशयति भारत ॥ १३.३४ ॥|Just as the one sun illuminates the whole world, so also the Lord of the field (Supreme Self) illuminates the whole field, O Arjuna.

query: Krishna kee baatein sunne mein kya hai jo logon ko mukti pradaan karti hai?
document: क्षेत्रक्षेत्रज्ञयोरेवमन्तरं ज्ञानचक्षुषा । भूतप्रकृतिमोक्षं च ये विदुर्यान्ति ते परम् ॥ १३.३५ ॥|They who know through the eye of intuition, this distinction between the field and its knower and also perceive the liberation from the Nature of being, go to the Supreme.

query: Krishna kya Arjun ko sabse adhik gyaan dene ke liye kaha?
document: श्रीभगवानुवाच । परं भूयः प्रवक्ष्यामि ज्ञानानां ज्ञानमुत्तमम् यज्ज्ञात्वा मुनयः सर्वे परां सिद्धिम...|The blessed Lord spoke: Now Arjuna, I shall expose to you the most supreme and highest of all the wisdom in this universe by which all the great sages in this universe have achieved the highest perfection.

query: Krishna ke paas kya logon ne aisa karna hai jo unhe prabhavita banate hai?
document: इदं ज्ञानमुपाश्रित्य मम साधर्म्यमागताः । सर्गेऽपि नोपजायन्ते प्रलये न व्यथन्ति च ॥ १४.२ ॥|By fully learning, understanding and practising this wisdom, these sages have become a part of Me. As a result, they are not born at the time of creation nor do they pass away at the time of destruction of the universe.

query: Kya Arjun ko Krishna ne kya keh diya hai?
document: मम योनिर्महद्ब्रह्म तस्मिन्गर्भं दधाम्यहम् । संभवः सर्वभूतानां ततो भवति भारत ॥ १४.३ ॥|O Arjuna, you must realize that it is from Me that all creation steam. The great Brahma, The Lord of all creation acts as My womb when I plant the seed of creation from which all beings evolve.

query: Krishna kaha kis samay aur sthaan par janam lete huye vyakti ka maa aur pita kaha jate hain?
document: सर्वयोनिषु कौन्तेय मूर्तयः संभवन्ति याः । तासां ब्रह्म महद्योनिरहं बीजप्रदः पिता ॥ १४.४ ॥|The blessed Lord said:Dear Arjuna, know that whenever and wherever a being is born, I am his parents, that is, both his mother and father, who gave him life in this world.

query: Krishna ne Arjun ko kya tri guno ke baare mein bataya?
document: सत्त्वं रजस्तम इति गुणाः प्रकृतिसंभवाः । निबध्नन्ति महाबाहो देहे देहिनमव्ययम् ॥ १४.५ ॥|Arjuna, that NATURE is made of three parts, namely: SATTVA (the light representing goodness); RAJAS (fire representing passion), and TAMAS (darkness representing evil). These bind down and limit the human mortal bodies from reaching true perfection and achieving the state of infinite Spirit and immortality.

query: Krishna ne Arjun ko kya tattva sikhaya jo logon ko duniya ke mazaan se jodta hai?
document: तत्र सत्त्वं निर्मलत्वात्प्रकाशकमनामयम् । सुखसङ्गेन बध्नाति ज्ञानसङ्गेन चानघ ॥ १४.६ ॥|Arjuna, understand these three natural elements: SATTVA, because it represents light and purity is a sign of good health, but binds the various beings in this world to worldly material happiness. This attachment also leads to lower knowledge, my friend.

query: Kya Rajas ka arth hai?
document: रजो रागात्मकं विद्धि तृष्णासङ्गसमुद्भवम् । तन्निबध्नाति कौन्तेय कर्मसङ्गेन देहिनम् ॥ १४.७ ॥|RAJAS, dear Arjuna, is that natural element representing passion which leads to material and worldly attachment. Rajas is known to bind the Soul of mortal men to action.

query: Kya Tamas guna ke kaaran manushya mein kuchh kshamataon ki kami hoti hai?
document: तमस्त्वज्ञानजं विद्धि मोहनं सर्वदेहिनाम् । प्रमादालस्यनिद्राभिस्तन्निबध्नाति भारत ॥ १४.८ ॥|But you should also know O Arjuna, that darkness and evil born out of the TAMAS GUNA, exists mainly because of the ignorance of man in this world. TAMAS creates laziness and dullness. One loses the value of time and no longer desires to work or to take part in constuctive action.

query: Krishna kehne mein kya hai jo ek insaan ko khushi mein bandhata hai?
document: सत्त्वं सुखे संजयति रजः कर्मणि भारत । ज्ञानमावृत्य तु तमः प्रमादे संजयत्युत ॥ १४.९ ॥|In reality O son of Kunti, SATTVA (or Goodness) binds one to happiness; RAJAS leads to attachment to action; and TAMAS (evil) leads one to be lazy, dull, unproductive and cause negligence due to one’s ignorance.

query: Arjun ko kya kaha gaya hai ki prakriti ki kya guna aadi se shasit hoti hai?
document: रजस्तमश्चाभिभूय सत्त्वं भवति भारत । रजः सत्त्वं तमश्चैव तमः सत्त्वं रजस्तथा ॥ १४.१० ॥|At times O Arjuna, the first element of nature, SATTVA, rules over the other two GUNAS (powers of nature) known as RAJAS and TAMAS. However, at times the RAJAS part of human nature takes over and rules the SATTVA and TAMAS elements and similarly the TAMAS mode of nature may overpower the SATTVA and RAJAS modes of nature.

query: Kya Satvik vyakti ke shareer mein kya guna hota hai?
document: सर्वद्वारेषु देहेऽस्मिन्प्रकाश उपजायते । ज्ञानं यदा तदा विद्याद्विवृद्धं सत्त्वमित्युत ॥ १४.११ ॥|When the light of true knowledge and wisdom sorrounds and comes forth from one’s body, it is a sign that the SATTVA state of nature has occupied the body and taken over the person’s body, evidenced by his good actions (therefore he is known as a SATTVIC person).

query: Kya Rajas guna ke prabhav se vyakti ka kya lakshan hota hai?
document: लोभः प्रवृत्तिरारम्भः कर्मणामशमः स्पृहा । रजस्येतानि जायन्ते विवृद्धे भरतर्षभ ॥ १४.१२ ॥|When the RAJAS GUNA has taken over a being, then it can be seen through a person’s excessive greed, lust, unrest, activity and other similar action (therefore the person is known to be RAJAS).

query: Kya Gita mein Tamas ke lakshanon ke baare mein kuchh bataya gaya hai?
document: अप्रकाशोऽप्रवृत्तिश्च प्रमादो मोह एव च । तमस्येतानि जायन्ते विवृद्धे कुरुनन्दन ॥ १४.१३ ॥|Dullness, inactivity, laziness, negligence, ignorance, and sheer delusion about the world are all signs that the TAMAS elements have taken control of the person’s actions, behaviour, and thinking.

query: Kya hota hai jab koi vyakti apne shareer se uttar jate samay satvik hota hai?
document: यदा सत्त्वे प्रवृद्धे तु प्रलयं याति देहभृत् । तदोत्तमविदां लोकानमलान्प्रतिपद्यते ॥ १४.१४ ॥|If a being is SATTVIC at the time that his soul departs from his body, his soul goes to the purest regions of the universe where truth and goodness prevail. He is therefore reborn at these same, pure regions of the earth O Arjuna.

query: Kya ek vyakti ki mrityu samay ka avastha uske punarjanm ke sthan par prabhav dalti hai?
document: रजसि प्रलयं गत्वा कर्मसङ्गिषु जायते । तथा प्रलीनस्तमसि मूढयोनिषु जायते ॥ १४.१५ ॥|Should a person be in the RAJAS state at the time of death, he is reborn in the places of the world where he is restless and constantly active. Similarly if a person is TAMASIC at the time of his death, he is reborn into a family of irrational behaviour, laziness and dullness.

query: Kya Sattva, Rajas aur Tamas ke avastha mein kaam karne se kya phal milte hain?
document: कर्मणः सुकृतस्याहुः सात्त्विकं निर्मलं फलम् । रजसस्तु फलं दुःखमज्ञानं तमसः फलम् ॥ १४.१६ ॥|The purity of SATTVA is characterized by the rewards that come out of good actions. However, the fruits of work that is done in the RAJAS state brings nothing but pain to a person; and work that is done in the TAMAS state, bears fruits of dullness and ignorance.

query: Kya gyaan, lobh aur andh-vishwas ke sambandh mein Bhagwad Gita mein kya kaha gaya hai?
document: सत्त्वात्संजायते ज्ञानं रजसो लोभ एव च । प्रमादमोहौ तमसो भवतोऽज्ञानमेव च ॥ १४.१७ ॥|From the SATTVIC state of human nature one receives wisdom, from the RAJAS state arises greed, and form TAMAS evolves dullness and ignorance.

query: Kya Arjun ko Krishna ne Sattva, Rajas aur Tamas ke baare mein kya kaha tha?
document: ऊर्ध्वं गच्छन्ति सत्त्वस्था मध्ये तिष्ठन्ति राजसाः । जघन्यगुणवृत्तिस्था अधो गच्छन्ति तामसाः ॥ १४.१८...|Those who are in the SATTVA state always follow the highest path or level of wisdom and intelligence; those who are in the RAJAS state always follow the middle level of intelligence and wisdom; and those who are under the influence of TAMAS from of human nature, always stoop to the lowest level of wisdom and knowledge and continually sink downwards along this path of ignorance.

query: Krishna kee kya baat hai jisse koi vyakti prakriti ke teen gunon ke baahar sthit hai?
document: नान्यं गुणेभ्यः कर्तारं यदा द्रष्टानुपश्यति । गुणेभ्यश्च परं वेत्ति मद्भावं सोऽधिगच्छति ॥ १४.१९ ॥|When a true wiseman and seer fully understands that these three parts of nature are virtually the three main stages of life in this vast universe, he begins to also realize that which lies beyond these three conditions of nature, that is Myself. Thus once this is realized by any being they become an eternal part of Me the SUPREME LORD.

query: Kya jeevan mein aatma ko mukti prapt karne ke liye kya karna hoga?
document: गुणानेतानतीत्य त्रीन्देही देहसमुद्भवान् । जन्ममृत्युजरादुःखैर्विमुक्तोऽमृतमश्नुते ॥ १४.२० ॥|A person whose soul has risen above these three conditions of nature that actually lie within the mortal body, he becomes free from the cycle of birth and death as well as from sorrow and temporary happiness. He then enters into Me and thus becomes immortal.

query: Krishna kee baat hai, kaise pata lagta hai ki koi vyakti prakriti ke teen gunon se parivaartit ho gaya hai?
document: अर्जुन उवाच । कैर्लिङ्गैस्त्रीन्गुणानेतानतीतो भवति प्रभो किमाचारः कथं चैतांस्त्रीन्गुणानतिवर्तते ॥...|Arjuna then asked the Almighty Lord: How can one know if a particular being has gone beyond or has transcended the three powers of nature O Krishna? What is his way of life and how does he manage to reach beyond the SATTVA, RAJAS, and TAMAS modes of nature?

query: Arjun ko kya kaha gaya hai jisey prakash aur anantya dono se koi iva chinta nahin hai?
document: श्रीभगवानुवाच । प्रकाशं च प्रवृत्तिं च मोहमेव च पाण्डव न द्वेष्टि संप्रवृत्तानि न निवृत्तानि काङ्क...|My dear Pandava (Arjuna), he who does not hate nor has any desire for light, (representing results which are born out of SATTVIC deeds), busy activity, and all that represents darkness whether they are near to him or far from him…

query: Krishna ne kya kehaya hai ki vyakti ko kaise apne aaspaas ke parivartan se prabhavit nahin hua karein?
document: उदासीनवदासीनो गुणैर्यो न विचाल्यते । गुणा वर्तन्त इत्येव योऽवतिष्ठति नेङ्गते ॥ १४.२३ ॥|The Lord further explained:…He who sits apart undisturbed and unaffected by varying conditions of the environment and observes the world around him knowing and fully understanding that it is the power of nature that acts on all beings in this world…

query: किसे कहते हैं जो दुख और सुख को एक समान समझता है?
document: समदुःखसुखः स्वस्थः समलोष्टाश्मकाञ्चनः । तुल्यप्रियाप्रियो धीरस्तुल्यनिन्दात्मसंस्तुतिः ॥ १४.२४ ॥|जो निरन्तर आत्म भाव में स्थित, दुःख-सुख को समान समझने वाला, मिट्टी, पत्थर और स्वर्ण में समान भाव वाला, ज्ञानी, प्रिय तथा अप्रिय को एक सा मानने वाला और अपनी निन्दा स्तुति में भी समान भाव वाला है ।

query: Kya koi vyakti apne dhan-vipakshon mein ek hi tarah ka vartan karta hai?
document: मानापमानयोस्तुल्यस्तुल्यो मित्रारिपक्षयोः । सर्वारम्भपरित्यागी गुणातीतः स उच्यते ॥ १४.२५ ॥|He who behaves the same in times of honour or in times of disgrace; who behaves the same with enemies and friends; and who has surrendered all desires for action as well as lust for rewards resulting from those actions.

query: Kya yehi koi hai jo mere prabhutva ke saath nischit bhakti se kaam karta hai aur isse gunon se parivaartit ho jaata hai?
document: मां च योऽव्यभिचारेण भक्तियोगेन सेवते । स गुणान्समतीत्यैतान्ब्रह्मभूयाय कल्पते ॥ १४.२६ ॥|And he who serves Me with an unfailing devotion, he is fit for becoming Brahman because he is gone beyond all the qualities (Gunas).

query: Krishna ka kya kaha hai jismein unhein nishchayta se nityam aur avinashi ke roop mein darshaya gaya hai?
document: ब्रह्मणो हि प्रतिष्ठाहममृतस्याव्ययस्य च । शाश्वतस्य च धर्मस्य सुखस्यैकान्तिकस्य च ॥ १४.२७ ॥|I am the abode of Brahman, the immortal, the immutable, the eternal (ever-lasting) dharma and absolute bliss.

query: Krishna ne Arjun ko kya ek bada, anant aur shuddh drishya bataya?
document: श्रीभगवानुवाच । ऊर्ध्वमूलमधःशाखमश्वत्थं प्राहुरव्ययम् छन्दांसि यस्य पर्णानि यस्तं वेद स वेदवित् ॥ ...|The Dear Lord explained to Arjuna:O Arjuna, there exists an enormous, everlasting, and divinely pure tree known as the indestructable ASVAATTHAM (COSMIC TREE OF LIFE). The extraordinary things about this tree, is that it has its roots above at its peak and its branches are located at the lowest part of the tree. It’s pure, green leaves are the VEDAS (Holy Scriptures and Sacred Songs). He who believes and realizes this truth, also knows and understands the VEDAS.

query: Arjun ko kya Krishna ne kaha tha jahaan usne prithvi se aakash tak ki shakhaayein aur aakarshak vastuein kee baat ki thi?
document: अधश्चोर्ध्वं प्रसृतास्तस्य शाखा गुणप्रवृद्धा विषयप्रवालाः । अधश्च मूलान्यनुसंततानि कर्मानुबन्धीनि...|Its branches extend both below and above, form the earth to heaven (and vice-versa). It is the great powers of nature that nourish the tree and give it life. Its ouds represent the sensual objects that inspire pleasure in all beings. The roots that stretch a far distance downward (from the heavens) into the world of man are bounded as firmly to the earth as man is bound to the mortal world because of his selfish actions and lust for material rewards.

query: Krishna ne kya kehaya hai kisi vyakti ko apne bandhanon se mukti prapt karne ke liye kya karna hoga?
document: न रूपमस्येह तथोपलभ्यते नान्तो न चादिर्न च संप्रतिष्ठा । अश्वत्थमेनं सुविरूढमूल- मसङ्गशस्त्रेण दृढ...|Man cannot see this celestial tree nor even perceive its greatness. Man cannot see its changing forms nor its beginning, its end, nor its foundations. The only way one may be able to free oneself from the roots of this tree (which have spread and created this world of material attachment), is to cut free from these roots with the mighty sword of non-attachment.

query: Krishna kehne mein kya hai jo manushya ko shanti ka ghar aur aashray pradan karta hai?
document: ततः पदं तत्परिमार्गितव्यं यस्मिन्गता न निवर्तन्ति भूयः । तमेव चाद्यं पुरुषं प्रपद्ये यतः प्रवृत्त...|If a man finds and proceeds along this path of non-attachment, he can say that he has truly discovered the way by which he can attain peaceful refuge and shelter in the Eternal Spirit (the Great beginning of all things is form whom all creation has evolved (namely, LORD KRISHNA Himself).

query: Kya kisi vyakti ke liye Paramatma ke ghar mein avastha prapt karne ka rasta safalta se sambhav hai?
document: निर्मानमोहा जितसङ्गदोषा अध्यात्मनित्या विनिवृत्तकामाः । द्वन्द्वैर्विमुक्ताः सुखदुःखसंज्ञै- र्गच्...|A man whose thinking is pure and consists of no evil; a man who has totally freed himself from the bondages of pride and delusion; who has broken free from the chains of attachment and all material desires; who has surrendered all selfish desires; who has learned to direct full concentration of the mind on the Supreme Spirit; and who has liberated himself from the opposing feelings of pleasure and pain, always achieves a place in the divine and Eternal Abode (shelter) that is within Me, the Almighty.

query: Kya Krishna ka Param Dhama hai jahan suraj ka prakash nahin padta, chandrama ka prakash nahin padta aur aag nahin jal rahi hai?
document: न तद्भासयते सूर्यो न शशाङ्को न पावकः । यद्गत्वा न निवर्तन्ते तद्धाम परमं मम ॥ १५.६ ॥|That place upon which the sun cannot cast its glorious radiance, where the moon can shed no light, and where no fire, burns is what is known as My Supreme Abode. Here only the radiant light of My Eternal Glory shines. Those who reach this sacred destination, never return to suffer in this world again O Arjuna.

query: Krishna ne Arjun ko kya kahaa tha?
document: ममैवांशो जीवलोके जीवभूतः सनातनः । मनःषष्ठानीन्द्रियाणि प्रकृतिस्थानि कर्षति ॥ १५.७ ॥|The Blessed Lord confided:O Arjuna, in this world, a certain fraction of My Eternal Spirit taken birth. This fragment of My Supreme Soul attracts the five senses plus an additional sixth one known as the mind and resides within the human body, in the realm of nature, on earth.

query: Krishna kya kehta hai aapke shareer se nikalne ke baad aapke aankhon, karnon aur man ke saath kya le jaate hain?
document: शरीरं यदवाप्नोति यच्चाप्युत्क्रामतीश्वरः । गृहित्वैतानि संयाति वायुर्गन्धानिवाशयात् ॥ १५.८ ॥|When I, the Lord of all the bodies that walk on this earth, enter a particular body. (and give it life and soul), and later when I leave this body (in the form of the body’s soul), I take the senses and the mind with Me and drift away like the wind that carries away sweet fragrances from their hidden sources within nature.

query: Krishna kya kehta hai apne roop mein prithvi par aane ke baad kya karta hai?
document: श्रोत्रं चक्षुः स्पर्शनं च रसनं घ्राणमेव च । अधिष्ठाय मनश्चायं विषयानुपसेवते ॥ १५.९ ॥|Therefore, O Arjuna, after I enter the body of a particular being in this world, as its soul, I bestow upon this being its five senses namely, its eyesight, hearing, touch, taste, and smell, as well as its mind and furthermore it is because of Me that these senses function and stay operable. Thus, a being is able to experience the various objects in this world through his senses.

query: Krishna ka kya kaha hai un logon ke bare mein jo unhe apne andar dekh nahin sakte?
document: उत्क्रामन्तं स्थितं वापि भुञ्जानं वा गुणान्वितम् । विमूढा नानुपश्यन्ति पश्यन्ति ज्ञानचक्षुषः ॥ १५.१...|O Arjuna, only those people whose vision is clouded and whose mind is deluded are unable to see and realize Me as actually existing within them as their inner-selves and they do not realize that I am a part of human nature itself, whether or not I stay or depart from within them.

query: Kya aapko yeh pata hai ki kis tarah ke logon ko Bhagwan ka darshan hoga?
document: यतन्तो योगिनश्चैनं पश्यन्त्यात्मन्यवस्थितम् । यतन्तोऽप्यकृतात्मानो नैनं पश्यन्त्यचेतसः ॥ १५.११ ॥|Those people who are pure at heart and are constantly striving to see Me, inevitably see Me, the Lord who dwells in their own heart. However those people who are impure at heart and in their minds never perceive Me, the Supreme Spirit, no matter how much they strive.

query: Krishna keh rahe hain ki sun ki roshni, chandrama ki roshni aur aag ki roshni kahan se aati hai?
document: यदादित्यगतं तेजो जगद्भासयतेऽखिलम् । यच्चन्द्रमसि यच्चाग्नौ तत्तेजो विद्धि मामकम् ॥ १५.१२ ॥|The Blessed Lord spoken in His Divine Voice: Arjuna, you should realize and always remember that the beautiful and overwhelming light that comes from the sun and illuminates the whole universe, the soft and splendrous light that is emitted by the moon, and the radiant glow of a fire, all come from within Me and exist because of me alone.

query: Kya Bhagwan Krishna ne Arjun ko kya kaha tha?
document: गामाविश्य च भूतानि धारयाम्यहमोजसा । पुष्णामि चौषधीः सर्वाः सोमो भूत्वा रसात्मकः ॥ १५.१३ ॥|Upon entering into this world from the Heavens, O Arjuna, it is My Divine Energy that gives life and support to all things on this earth. As such, My Glory is so Divine and Beautiful that I become the Sacred Some plant that nourishes all the other plants and herbs on this earth. (The Soma or Moon plant, as it is literally translated, contains syrup that is considered to be very nourishing and healthy.)

query: Krishna kya kehta hai apne aas-paas ke sabhi jeev ke andar jeevan ki aag kya hai?
document: अहं वैश्वानरो भूत्वा प्राणिनां देहमाश्रितः । प्राणापानसमायुक्तः पचाम्यन्नं चतुर्विधम् ॥ १५.१४ ॥|O Arjuna, at the same time, I also become the fire of life that exists in all things that breathe on this earth. Together, with the fiery breaths of life that flow in and flow out of body, I burn and digest the four kinds of pure foods on this earth, while residing in a being’s body.

query: Krishna kya kehta hai apne aas-paas ke sabhi jeevon mein jeevan ki aag kaise hoti hai?
document: सर्वस्य चाहं हृदि संनिविष्टो मत्तः स्मृतिर्ज्ञानमपोहनं च । वेदैश्च सर्वैरहमेव वेद्यो वेदान्तकृद्व...|O Arjuna, at the same time, I also become the fire of life that exists in all things that breathe on this earth. Together, with the fiery breaths of life that flow in and flow out of body, I burn and digest the four kinds of pure foods on this earth, while residing in a being’s body.

query: Arjuna, kya hai yeh do aatma?
document: द्वाविमौ पुरुषौ लोके क्षरश्चाक्षर एव च । क्षरः सर्वाणि भूतानि कूटस्थोऽक्षर उच्यते ॥ १५.१६ ॥|There are two souls or spirits in this universe O Arjuna, namely, the destructible and indestructible. The destructible are all the those souls that are living in this universe and the indestructible are those souls that can never be subjected to change and are steady in their devotion to Me (therefore achieving immortality).

query: Kya Bhagwan Krishna ne Arjun ko kya ek sabse adhik shaktishali atma ke bare mein bataya?
document: उत्तमः पुरुषस्त्वन्यः परमात्मेत्युदाहृतः । यो लोकत्रयमाविश्य बिभर्त्यव्यय ईश्वरः ॥ १५.१७ ॥|However dear Arjuna, there is another spirit that is the highest of all spirits and it is called the Supreme Spirit. The Supreme Spirit is none other than Me, the Eternal and Omniscient (existing everywhere) Lord who supports this entire universe.

query: Krishna ka kya kaha hai jisse vah sabhi vedon mein paramatma ke roop mein jaana jaata hai?
document: यस्मात्क्षरमतीतोऽहमक्षरादपि चोत्तमः । अतोऽस्मि लोके वेदे च प्रथितः पुरुषोत्तमः ॥ १५.१८ ॥|Lord Krishna explained:Because I am beyond all perishable objects on earth and because I even surpass all that is imperishable, I am known throughout the world and in all the Holy Scriptures (Vedas), as the Supreme and Divine Spirit.

query: Krishna ka sabse adhik vishvasham aur shuddh darshan kaise hota hai?
document: यो मामेवमसंमूढो जानाति पुरुषोत्तमम् । स सर्वविद्भजति मां सर्वभावेन भारत ॥ १५.१९ ॥|He who has a clear vision and is constantly occupied with only divine and pure thoughts, comes to immediately realize that I am the Highest and most Superior Being in this universe. He who truly realize this fact knows all that is to be known in this world and thus he worships Me, with all his might and soul.

query: Krishna ne aapko kya sabse gopniya aur sabse shreshth shiksha di hai?
document: इति गुह्यतमं शास्त्रमिदमुक्तं मयानघ । एतद्\u200cबुद्ध्वा बुद्धिमान्स्यात्कृतकृत्यश्च भारत ॥ १५.२० ॥|Dear Arjuna, I have thus revealed to you, the most secret and most sacred of all teachings in this world. By fully knowing and understanding this secret My Dear Devotee, any man can truly see the Divine Light of wisdom and he, thus, will have fulfilled all his tasks and duties in this world.

query: Krishna kee kahaani mein kya kya gun hain jo sabhi jeevon mein hotey hain?
document: श्रीभगवानुवाच । अभयं सत्त्वसंशुद्धिर्ज्ञानयोगव्यवस्थितिः दानं दमश्च यज्ञश्च स्वाध्यायस्तप आर्जवम् ...|All of the significant qualities in all beings such as: freedom from fear, purity of mind and heart, stability in knowledge and concentration, generosity in charity, self-control, sacrifice, constant study of the holy Scriptures, piousness and straightforwardness.

query: Krishna kehne mein kya hai jo sabhi gunon ko ek saath jodta hai?
document: अहिंसा सत्यमक्रोधस्त्यागः शान्तिरपैशुनम् । दया भूतेष्वलोलुप्त्वं मार्दवं ह्रीरचापलम् ॥ १६.२ ॥|…Non-violence, truth, freedom from anger, detachment from all things, peacefulness (with mind and self), restraint from finding faults with others, compassion towards all living beings, detachment from greedy craving, gentleness, modesty, and stability of the mind and emotions.

query: Kya Bhagwan Krishna ne Arjun ko kya gunon ka darshana diya?
document: तेजः क्षमा धृतिः शौचमद्रोहो नातिमानिता । भवन्ति संपदं दैवीमभिजातस्य भारत ॥ १६.३ ॥|Vigour, an attitude of forgiveness towards others, courage, purity, goodwill, towards others, and freedom from pride. All of these, dear Arjuna, are considered by Me to be the great characteristics of a man who possesses a divine nature and has come into this world from heaven.

query: Kya Arjun ko Krishna ne aag ke andar janm lekar aaye huye vyakti ke gunon ko bataya hai?
document: दम्भो दर्पोऽभिमानश्च क्रोधः पारुष्यमेव च । अज्ञानं चाभिजातस्य पार्थ संपदमासुरीम् ॥ १६.४ ॥|Characteristics such as deceitfulness, arrogance, excessive pride, anger, harshness, rudeness and ignorance are the makings of a man who has been born on to this earth from fiery hell.

query: Kya Bhagwan Krishna ne kisi ko swarg ki gati ke liye janm diya hota hai?
document: दैवी संपद्विमोक्षाय निबन्धायासुरी मता । मा शुचः संपदं दैवीमभिजातोऽसि पाण्डव ॥ १६.५ ॥|The qualities that exist within a person with a divine nature, leads that person to a blissful freedom and liberation from this world and all its material objects. However the evil traits that are found in a person with a demonic nature, blinds that person to this world and to the sensual objects it contains. But grieve not, beloved Devotee of Mine, you have been born with a divine personality and your final and ultimate destination is heaven.

query: Krishna ne Arjun ko do prakaar ke jeevon ke baare mein kya kaha tha?
document: द्वौ भूतसर्गौ लोकेऽस्मिन्दैव आसुर एव च । दैवो विस्तरशः प्रोक्त आसुरं पार्थ मे शृणु ॥ १६.६ ॥|There are basically two types of beings in this world O Arjuna. The first type is known to have a pure, pious and divine nature. The second however, has a demonic and evil nature. I have explained the divine nature to you in great length, O Arjuna. Now listen dear friend . as I describe the nature of the corrupt and evil and evil-doers in this world.

query: Kya Bhagwan Krishna ne Parth ko kya kehaya hai?
document: प्रवृत्तिं च निवृत्तिं च जना न विदुरासुराः । न शौचं नापि चाचारो न सत्यं तेषु विद्यते ॥ १६.७ ॥|Evil men O Partha. do not know the difference between what should and should not be done. Neither purity nor good conduct, nor even a single sign of truth exists in their hearts.

query: Kya aisi vyaktiyon ke liye Gita mein kya kaha gaya hai?
document: असत्यमप्रतिष्ठं ते जगदाहुरनीश्वरम् । अपरस्परसंभूतं किमन्यत्कामहैतुकम् ॥ १६.८ ॥|Men of this evil nature generally say that this world has no truth; is without a basis for morality and good-will; that no Lord exists and that nobody should show any love or devotion to Him; that there is no regular sequence (or law) of creation; and that birth is only the result of a natural union (of man and woman) and comes about due to pure lust and nothing else.

query: Kya Bhagwad Gita mein aisi vyaktiyon ki vritti ka varnan hai?
document: एतां दृष्टिमवष्टभ्य नष्टात्मानोऽल्पबुद्धयः । प्रभवन्त्युग्रकर्माणः क्षयाय जगतोऽहिताः ॥ १६.९ ॥|Standing firmly by these and other wrong beliefs throughout their lives, these evil men (whose souls have become corrupt and lost), show very little intelligence and are constantly absorbed in performing their evil tasks and wrong-doings. These demonic people are the enemies of this world and its people, and are leading it to total destruction.

query: Kya Krishna Arjun ko kaise un logon ke baare mein keh raha hai jo apne man mein kuchh galat karte hain?
document: काममाश्रित्य दुष्पूरं दम्भमानमदान्विताः । मोहाद्\u200cगृहीत्वासद्ग्राहान्प्रवर्तन्तेऽशुचिव्रताः ॥ १...|These corrupt beings darken their souls by surrendering to obsessive and unending evil desires. They are full of deceit, false pride and stubborness. They strongly support and encourage their evil views and continue to execute their corrupt and impure tasks.

query: Kya un logon ki jeevan mein kuch aur hi mahatvapurn hai jo unhein aashikta aur ananda ka mulya dena hai?
document: चिन्तामपरिमेयां च प्रलयान्तामुपाश्रिताः । कामोपभोगपरमा एतावदिति निश्चिताः ॥ १६.११ ॥|These evil-doers become obsessed with their several evil concerns and corrupt desires which remain with them all of their lives until their death. The highest goal in their lives (that is constantly on their minds), is the attainment of sensual enjoyment and material happiness in life and nothing else matters to them.

query: Krishna ne kya kahaa hai un logon ke baare mein jo apne lakshon ko pooraa karne ke liye galat tareeke se dhana utsaahit karte hain?
document: आशापाशशतैर्बद्धाः कामक्रोधपरायणाः । ईहन्ते कामभोगार्थमन्यायेनार्थसञ्चयान् ॥ १६.१२ ॥|The Blessed Lord described: They are bound to this world by hundreds of vain desires and hopes. They are obsessed with anger and lust. They also use unfair and often criminal means to gain enormous natural wealth in order to satisfy their neverending cravings to possess material items.

query: Kya Krishna ne Arjun ko kuchh is tarah ke vichar karne ke liye kaha tha?
document: इदमद्य मया लब्धमिमं प्राप्स्ये मनोरथम् । इदमस्तीदमपि मे भविष्यति पुनर्धनम् ॥ १६.१३ ॥|It is common to hear people utter such things in their conversations as: ‘I have gained this today, and I shall attain this desires later. This wealth belongs to me and more wealth shall also soon be mine.’

query: Krishna kya kehta hai rakshason ki soch ke baare mein?
